verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ ۖ فَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَإِنَّمَا عَلَيْهِ مَا حُمِّلَ وَعَلَيْكُم مَّا حُمِّلْتُمْ ۖ وَإِن تُطِيعُوهُ تَهْتَدُوا۟ ۚ وَمَا عَلَى ٱلرَّسُولِ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: Say, “Obey Allah and obey the messenger. But if you turn away, then on him (the messenger) lies (the responsibility of) what he is burdened with, and on you lies (the responsibility of) what you are burdened with. And if you obey him, you will get the right path. The duty of the Messenger is no more than to convey the message clearly.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَيَسْتَخْلِفَنَّهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمَا ٱسْتَخْلَفَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ وَلَيُمَكِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ دِينَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى ٱرْتَضَىٰ لَهُمْ وَلَيُبَدِّلَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ خَوْفِهِمْ أَمْنًا ۚ يَعْبُدُونَنِى لَا يُشْرِكُونَ بِى شَيْـًٔا ۚ وَمَن كَفَرَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Allah has promised those of you who believe and do good deeds that He will certainly make them (His) vicegerents in the land, as He made those before them, and will certainly establish for them their religion which He has chosen for them, and will certainly give them peace in place of fear in which they were before; (provided that) they worship Me, ascribing no partner to Me. And those who turn infidel after that are the transgressors.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: Establish Salāh and pay Zakāh and obey the messenger, so that you may be favored with mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا تَحْسَبَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مُعْجِزِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَمَأْوَىٰهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ ۖ وَلَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: Never think that the disbelievers are (able) to frustrate (Allah’s plan) on the earth. Their abode is the Fire. Indeed it is an evil terminus.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لِيَسْتَـْٔذِنكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يَبْلُغُوا۟ ٱلْحُلُمَ مِنكُمْ ثَلَـٰثَ مَرَّٰتٍ ۚ مِّن قَبْلِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلْفَجْرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنۢ بَعْدِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلْعِشَآءِ ۚ ثَلَـٰثُ عَوْرَٰتٍ لَّكُمْ ۚ لَيْسَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَا عَلَيْهِمْ جُنَاحٌۢ بَعْدَهُنَّ ۚ طَوَّٰفُونَ عَلَيْكُم بَعْضُكُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
verses.text: O you who believe, the slaves owned by you, and those of you who have not reached puberty, must seek your permission (to see you) at three times: before the prayer of Fajr, and when you take off your clothes at noon, and after the prayer of ‘Ishā’. These are three times of privacy for you. There is no harm, neither to you nor to them, after these (three times). They are your frequent visitors, as some of you are (frequent visitors) of the others. This is how Allah explains the verses to you. Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا بَلَغَ ٱلْأَطْفَـٰلُ مِنكُمُ ٱلْحُلُمَ فَلْيَسْتَـْٔذِنُوا۟ كَمَا ٱسْتَـْٔذَنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
verses.text: When the children from among you reach puberty, they must seek permission, as the permission is sought by those before them. This is how Allah explains His verses to you. Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْقَوَٰعِدُ مِنَ ٱلنِّسَآءِ ٱلَّـٰتِى لَا يَرْجُونَ نِكَاحًا فَلَيْسَ عَلَيْهِنَّ جُنَاحٌ أَن يَضَعْنَ ثِيَابَهُنَّ غَيْرَ مُتَبَرِّجَـٰتٍۭ بِزِينَةٍ ۖ وَأَن يَسْتَعْفِفْنَ خَيْرٌ لَّهُنَّ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: And those old women who have no hope for marriage, there is no sin on them, if they take off their (extra) clothes while they do not display their adornment. Still, that they refrain (even from this) is better for them. Allah is All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّيْسَ عَلَى ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ حَرَجٌ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلْأَعْرَجِ حَرَجٌ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلْمَرِيضِ حَرَجٌ وَلَا عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَن تَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنۢ بُيُوتِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ ءَابَآئِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ أُمَّهَـٰتِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ إِخْوَٰنِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ أَخَوَٰتِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ أَعْمَـٰمِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ عَمَّـٰتِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ أَخْوَٰلِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ خَـٰلَـٰتِكُمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكْتُم مَّفَاتِحَهُۥٓ أَوْ صَدِيقِكُمْ ۚ لَيْسَ عَلَيْكُمْ جُنَاحٌ أَن تَأْكُلُوا۟ جَمِيعًا أَوْ أَشْتَاتًا ۚ فَإِذَا دَخَلْتُم بُيُوتًا فَسَلِّمُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ تَحِيَّةً مِّنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ مُبَـٰرَكَةً طَيِّبَةً ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: There is no blame on a blind person, nor is there any blame on any lame one, nor is there any blame on a sick person, nor on yourselves in that you eat (something) from your own homes or from the homes of your fathers or the homes of your mothers or the homes of your brothers or the homes of your sisters or the homes of your paternal uncles, or the homes of your paternal aunts or the homes of your maternal uncles or the homes of your maternal aunts or from the places the keys of which you have under your control, or from (the home of) your friend.There is no sin on you if you eat together or separately. So when you enter homes, greet one another with Salām , a greeting prescribed by Allah, which is blessed, pleasant. This is how Allah explains the verses to you, so that you may understand.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَإِذَا كَانُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ جَامِعٍ لَّمْ يَذْهَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يَسْتَـْٔذِنُوهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَسْتَـْٔذِنُونَكَ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۚ فَإِذَا ٱسْتَـْٔذَنُوكَ لِبَعْضِ شَأْنِهِمْ فَأْذَن لِّمَن شِئْتَ مِنْهُمْ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمُ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: The believers are only those who believe in Allah and His messenger and who, when they are with him for a collective matter, do not leave unless they seek his permission. Surely, those who seek your permission are the ones who believe in Allah and His messenger. So, if they seek permission from you for some business of theirs, give permission to whom you wish from among them, and pray to Allah for their forgiveness. Surely, Allah is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا تَجْعَلُوا۟ دُعَآءَ ٱلرَّسُولِ بَيْنَكُمْ كَدُعَآءِ بَعْضِكُم بَعْضًا ۚ قَدْ يَعْلَمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتَسَلَّلُونَ مِنكُمْ لِوَاذًا ۚ فَلْيَحْذَرِ ٱلَّذِينَ يُخَالِفُونَ عَنْ أَمْرِهِۦٓ أَن تُصِيبَهُمْ فِتْنَةٌ أَوْ يُصِيبَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Do not take the call of the messenger among you as a call of one of you to another. Allah definitely knows those of you who sneak out hiding themselves under the cover of others. So, those who violate his (messenger’s) order must beware, lest they are visited by a trial or they are visited by a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَآ إِنَّ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ قَدْ يَعْلَمُ مَآ أَنتُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَيَوْمَ يُرْجَعُونَ إِلَيْهِ فَيُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌۢ
verses.text: Remember! To Allah belongs all that is there in the heavens and the earth. He knows the condition in which you are at present; and the Day on which they will be returned to Him, He will tell them what they did. Allah is fully aware of everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ ٱلْفُرْقَانَ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦ لِيَكُونَ لِلْعَـٰلَمِينَ نَذِيرًا
verses.text: Glorious is the One who has revealed the Criterion to His servant, so that he may be a warner to all the worlds,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَدًا وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ شَرِيكٌ فِى ٱلْمُلْكِ وَخَلَقَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ تَقْدِيرًا
verses.text: the One to whom belongs the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and who did neither have a son, nor is there any partner to him in the Kingdom, and who has created everything and designed it in a perfect measure.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً لَّا يَخْلُقُونَ شَيْـًٔا وَهُمْ يُخْلَقُونَ وَلَا يَمْلِكُونَ لِأَنفُسِهِمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُونَ مَوْتًا وَلَا حَيَوٰةً وَلَا نُشُورًا
verses.text: Yet they have adopted other gods, beside Him, who do not create any thing, as they themselves are created, and they possess no power to cause harm or benefit even to themselves, nor do they have any control over death or life or resurrection.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّآ إِفْكٌ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ وَأَعَانَهُۥ عَلَيْهِ قَوْمٌ ءَاخَرُونَ ۖ فَقَدْ جَآءُو ظُلْمًا وَزُورًا
verses.text: The disbelievers said, “This is nothing but a lie he (the messenger) has fabricated and some other people have helped him in it.” Thus they came up with sheer injustice and falsehood.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوٓا۟ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ٱكْتَتَبَهَا فَهِىَ تُمْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
verses.text: And they said, “(These are) the tales of the ancients he (the messenger) has caused to be written, and they are read out to him at morn and eve.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَنزَلَهُ ٱلَّذِى يَعْلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
verses.text: Say, “It is sent down by the One who knows the secret in the heavens and the earth. Indeed He is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ مَالِ هَـٰذَا ٱلرَّسُولِ يَأْكُلُ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشِى فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ ۙ لَوْلَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مَلَكٌ فَيَكُونَ مَعَهُۥ نَذِيرًا
verses.text: They said, “What sort of messenger is this who eats food and walks in the markets? Why is it that an angel has not been sent down to him who would have been a warner along with him.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ يُلْقَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِ كَنزٌ أَوْ تَكُونُ لَهُۥ جَنَّةٌ يَأْكُلُ مِنْهَا ۚ وَقَالَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ إِن تَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا رَجُلًا مَّسْحُورًا
verses.text: Or a treasure should have been thrown down to him, or he should have a garden to eat from it?” And the transgressors said (to the believers,) “You are following none but a bewitched man.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ ضَرَبُوا۟ لَكَ ٱلْأَمْثَـٰلَ فَضَلُّوا۟ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: See how they coined similes for you, so they have gone astray and cannot find a way.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِىٓ إِن شَآءَ جَعَلَ لَكَ خَيْرًا مِّن ذَٰلِكَ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ وَيَجْعَل لَّكَ قُصُورًۢا
verses.text: Glorious is the One who, if He so wills, would give you better than that - gardens beneath which rivers flow, and would give you palaces.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلسَّاعَةِ ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لِمَن كَذَّبَ بِٱلسَّاعَةِ سَعِيرًا
verses.text: But they have disbelieved the Hour (the Day of Judgment) and for those who disbelieve the Hour, We have prepared a flaming fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا رَأَتْهُم مِّن مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيدٍ سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا تَغَيُّظًا وَزَفِيرًا
verses.text: When it will see them from a distant place, they will hear (the sounds of) its raging and breathing,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ مِنْهَا مَكَانًا ضَيِّقًا مُّقَرَّنِينَ دَعَوْا۟ هُنَالِكَ ثُبُورًا
verses.text: and when they will be thrown into a narrow place therein, while they will be chained together, they will call for death.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا تَدْعُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ثُبُورًا وَٰحِدًا وَٱدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًا كَثِيرًا
verses.text: (Then it will be said to them,) “Do not call for one death today, but call for many a death.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ أَمْ جَنَّةُ ٱلْخُلْدِ ٱلَّتِى وُعِدَ ٱلْمُتَّقُونَ ۚ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَزَآءً وَمَصِيرًا
verses.text: Say, “Is that better or the eternal paradise the God-fearing are promised?” It will be a reward for them and a final abode.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّهُمْ فِيهَا مَا يَشَآءُونَ خَـٰلِدِينَ ۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ وَعْدًا مَّسْـُٔولًا
verses.text: For them there will be whatever they wish, while they will be eternal. This is a promise undertaken by your Lord, (the fulfillment of) which is worth praying for.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَيَقُولُ ءَأَنتُمْ أَضْلَلْتُمْ عِبَادِى هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ أَمْ هُمْ ضَلُّوا۟ ٱلسَّبِيلَ
verses.text: (Remember) the Day when He will gather them and what they used to worship beside Allah and will say (to the latter ones), “Did you mislead these My servants, or did they themselves lose the way?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَكَ مَا كَانَ يَنۢبَغِى لَنَآ أَن نَّتَّخِذَ مِن دُونِكَ مِنْ أَوْلِيَآءَ وَلَـٰكِن مَّتَّعْتَهُمْ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ نَسُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوْمًۢا بُورًا
verses.text: They will say, “Pure are You. It was not for us to adopt other guardians than You. Instead, You gave them and their fathers (worldly) benefits till they forgot the advice, and became a ruined people.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوكُم بِمَا تَقُولُونَ فَمَا تَسْتَطِيعُونَ صَرْفًا وَلَا نَصْرًا ۚ وَمَن يَظْلِم مِّنكُمْ نُذِقْهُ عَذَابًا كَبِيرًا
verses.text: Thus they will refute you in what you say, and you will not be able to repulse (the punishment,) or to receive help. Whoever commits injustice from among you, We will make him taste a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ إِلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ لَيَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشُونَ فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ ۗ وَجَعَلْنَا بَعْضَكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ فِتْنَةً أَتَصْبِرُونَ ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ بَصِيرًا
verses.text: We did not send any messengers before you (O prophet,) but all of them used to eat food and walk in the markets. And We have made some of you a test for some others. Would you observe patience? And your Lord is Ever-seeing.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَرْجُونَ لِقَآءَنَا لَوْلَآ أُنزِلَ عَلَيْنَا ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ أَوْ نَرَىٰ رَبَّنَا ۗ لَقَدِ ٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَعَتَوْ عُتُوًّا كَبِيرًا
verses.text: Said those who do not even expect to meet Us, “Why the angels are not sent down to us or why do we not see our Lord?” Indeed they think too highly of themselves, and have gone too far in rebellion.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ لَا بُشْرَىٰ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَيَقُولُونَ حِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا
verses.text: The Day they will see the angels, there will be no good news for the sinners that day, and they will say, “(We need) a shelter, fully protected!”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَدِمْنَآ إِلَىٰ مَا عَمِلُوا۟ مِنْ عَمَلٍ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ هَبَآءً مَّنثُورًا
verses.text: And We will proceed to whatever deeds they did, and will turn them into scattered dust.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَيْرٌ مُّسْتَقَرًّا وَأَحْسَنُ مَقِيلًا
verses.text: The people of Paradise, on that day, will be the best in (terms of their) abode and best in (terms of their) resting-place.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِٱلْغَمَـٰمِ وَنُزِّلَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ تَنزِيلًا
verses.text: The Day the sky will break open with a cloud, and the angels will be sent down in a majestic descent,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْمُلْكُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۚ وَكَانَ يَوْمًا عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ عَسِيرًا
verses.text: the Kingdom on that day will be for the RaHmān (the All-Merciful, Allah), and it will be a difficult day for the disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ يَعَضُّ ٱلظَّالِمُ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ يَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى ٱتَّخَذْتُ مَعَ ٱلرَّسُولِ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: And (Be mindful of) the Day the wrongdoer will bite his hands saying, “Would that I had taken a path along with the messenger!

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰوَيْلَتَىٰ لَيْتَنِى لَمْ أَتَّخِذْ فُلَانًا خَلِيلًا
verses.text: Woe to me! Would that I had not taken so-and-so for my friend!

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّقَدْ أَضَلَّنِى عَنِ ٱلذِّكْرِ بَعْدَ إِذْ جَآءَنِى ۗ وَكَانَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ خَذُولًا
verses.text: Indeed he led me astray from the advice after it had come to me.” And the Satan is man’s betrayer.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ ٱلرَّسُولُ يَـٰرَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِى ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مَهْجُورًا
verses.text: And the messenger will say, “O my Lord, my people had taken this Qur’ān as deserted.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَٰلِكَ جَعَلْنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِىٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ ۗ وَكَفَىٰ بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَنَصِيرًا
verses.text: In a similar way We made for every prophet an enemy from among the sinners, but your Lord suffices as a guide and as a supporter.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ جُمْلَةً وَٰحِدَةً ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ لِنُثَبِّتَ بِهِۦ فُؤَادَكَ ۖ وَرَتَّلْنَـٰهُ تَرْتِيلًا
verses.text: Said those who disbelieved, “Why has the Qur’ān not been revealed to him all at once?” (It has been sent down) in this way (i.e. in parts) so that We make your heart firm, and We revealed it little by little.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَأْتُونَكَ بِمَثَلٍ إِلَّا جِئْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَحْسَنَ تَفْسِيرًا
verses.text: They bring to you no hypothesis, but We bring to you the correct position and (an answer) better explained.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُحْشَرُونَ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Those who will be driven on their faces to Hell - they are the worst in situation and far more astray from the path.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلْنَا مَعَهُۥٓ أَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ وَزِيرًا
verses.text: Surely We gave Mūsā the Book, and appointed his brother Hārūn as a minister with him.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقُلْنَا ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا فَدَمَّرْنَـٰهُمْ تَدْمِيرًا
verses.text: So we said, “Go, both of you, to the people who have rejected Our signs” Then We annihilated them totally.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ لَّمَّا كَذَّبُوا۟ ٱلرُّسُلَ أَغْرَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ لِلنَّاسِ ءَايَةً ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لِلظَّـٰلِمِينَ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.text: As for the people of NūH, when they rejected the messengers, We drowned them and made them an example for mankind, and We have prepared a painful punishment for the transgressors.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعَادًا وَثَمُودَا۟ وَأَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلرَّسِّ وَقُرُونًۢا بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ كَثِيرًا
verses.text: And (We annihilated also the peoples of) ‘Ād and Thamūd and the people of Rass, and many generations in between them.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلًّا ضَرَبْنَا لَهُ ٱلْأَمْثَـٰلَ ۖ وَكُلًّا تَبَّرْنَا تَتْبِيرًا
verses.text: To each (of them) We cited examples, and each of them We brought to utter ruin.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَى ٱلْقَرْيَةِ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُمْطِرَتْ مَطَرَ ٱلسَّوْءِ ۚ أَفَلَمْ يَكُونُوا۟ يَرَوْنَهَا ۚ بَلْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ نُشُورًا
verses.text: Indeed they (the pagans of Makkah) have passed by the town that was afflicted by an evil rain sent down to it. So, have they not been seeing it? Rather, they do not believe in Resurrection.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْكَ إِن يَتَّخِذُونَكَ إِلَّا هُزُوًا أَهَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى بَعَثَ ٱللَّهُ رَسُولًا
verses.text: When they see you, they take you only as a laughing stock, (saying) “Is this the man whom Allah has sent as a messenger?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كَادَ لَيُضِلُّنَا عَنْ ءَالِهَتِنَا لَوْلَآ أَن صَبَرْنَا عَلَيْهَا ۚ وَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ حِينَ يَرَوْنَ ٱلْعَذَابَ مَنْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: He would have almost led us astray from our gods, had we not been so firm towards them.” They will know when they will see the punishment, who is farther astray in his way.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَـٰهَهُۥ هَوَىٰهُ أَفَأَنتَ تَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ وَكِيلًا
verses.text: Tell me about the one who has taken his desire as his god, would you then, become a guardian for him?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَحْسَبُ أَنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ يَسْمَعُونَ أَوْ يَعْقِلُونَ ۚ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا كَٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ ۖ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Or do you think that most of them listen or understand? They are but like cattle. Rather, they are even farther astray from the (right) way.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَيْفَ مَدَّ ٱلظِّلَّ وَلَوْ شَآءَ لَجَعَلَهُۥ سَاكِنًا ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَا ٱلشَّمْسَ عَلَيْهِ دَلِيلًا
verses.text: Have you not observed how your Lord stretched out the shadow (of the sun)? If He so willed, He would have made it stand still. Then We made the sun an indicator for it.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ قَبَضْنَـٰهُ إِلَيْنَا قَبْضًا يَسِيرًا
verses.text: Then We pulled it toward Us in a gradual manner.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا وَٱلنَّوْمَ سُبَاتًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلنَّهَارَ نُشُورًا
verses.text: He is the One who has made the night an apparel for you, and the sleep a means of rest, and has made the day a means of revival.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً طَهُورًا
verses.text: And He is the One who has sent the winds conveying good news before His mercy, and We have sent down purifying water from the heavens,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّنُحْـِۧىَ بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا وَنُسْقِيَهُۥ مِمَّا خَلَقْنَآ أَنْعَـٰمًا وَأَنَاسِىَّ كَثِيرًا
verses.text: so that We revive a dead land therewith, and give drink to the many cattle and humans created by Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ صَرَّفْنَـٰهُ بَيْنَهُمْ لِيَذَّكَّرُوا۟ فَأَبَىٰٓ أَكْثَرُ ٱلنَّاسِ إِلَّا كُفُورًا
verses.text: And We have distributed it (the water) among them, so that they may take lesson. Yet most of the people refused all but ungratefulness.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ شِئْنَا لَبَعَثْنَا فِى كُلِّ قَرْيَةٍ نَّذِيرًا
verses.text: Had We so willed, We would have sent a (separate) warner for every town, (but, according to Our wisdom, We have sent Muhammad as a prophet for all these towns)

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ وَجَـٰهِدْهُم بِهِۦ جِهَادًا كَبِيرًا
verses.text: So, (O Prophet,) do not obey the infidels, and strive against them with it (the Qur’ān), in utmost endeavor.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ هَـٰذَا عَذْبٌ فُرَاتٌ وَهَـٰذَا مِلْحٌ أُجَاجٌ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخًا وَحِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا
verses.text: He is the One who joined the two seas, so as this is sweet, very sweet, and this is bitter, very bitter, and made between them a buffer and an insurmountable barrier.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ بَشَرًا فَجَعَلَهُۥ نَسَبًا وَصِهْرًا ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ قَدِيرًا
verses.text: And He is the One who created man from water, then made of him relations created by lineage and relations created by marriage. Your Lord is All-Powerful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُهُمْ وَلَا يَضُرُّهُمْ ۗ وَكَانَ ٱلْكَافِرُ عَلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ ظَهِيرًا
verses.text: They worship, instead of Allah, what can neither give them any benefit nor can cause them any harm. The disbeliever is always a supporter (of Satan) against his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَـٰكَ إِلَّا مُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا
verses.text: We did not send you but as a bearer of good news and as a warner.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ أَن يَتَّخِذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Say, “I do not demand from you any return, except that one should adopt the (proper) way to his Lord, if he so wills.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْحَىِّ ٱلَّذِى لَا يَمُوتُ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِهِۦ ۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِهِۦ بِذُنُوبِ عِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرًا
verses.text: And place your trust in the Ever-Living who cannot die, and proclaim His purity along with His praise. Enough is He to be aware of the sins of His servants,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ۚ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ فَسْـَٔلْ بِهِۦ خَبِيرًا
verses.text: the One who created in six days the heavens and the earth and whatever lies between them, then He positioned Himself on the Throne. (He is) the RaHmān (the All-Merciful, Allah). So ask about Him someone who knows.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ قَالُوا۟ وَمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ أَنَسْجُدُ لِمَا تَأْمُرُنَا وَزَادَهُمْ نُفُورًا ۩
verses.text: And when it is said to them, “Prostrate yourselves to the RaHmān (the All-Merciful, Allah),” they say “What is RaHmān? Shall we prostrate ourselves to the one to whom you direct us?” And it increases nothing in them except aversion.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا سِرَٰجًا وَقَمَرًا مُّنِيرًا
verses.text: Glorious is the One who made stellar formations in the sky, and placed therein a lamp (i.e. the sun) and a bright moon.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ خِلْفَةً لِّمَنْ أَرَادَ أَن يَذَّكَّرَ أَوْ أَرَادَ شُكُورًا
verses.text: And He is the One who made the day and the night following each other, for the one who wishes to be mindful or wishes to show gratitude.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعِبَادُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ ٱلْجَـٰهِلُونَ قَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا
verses.text: The servants of the RaHmān (the All-Merciful, Allah) are those who walk on the earth humbly, and when the ignorant people speak to them, they reply peacefully,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَبِيتُونَ لِرَبِّهِمْ سُجَّدًا وَقِيَـٰمًا
verses.text: and those who pass the night prostrating themselves and standing before their Lord,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
verses.text: and those who say, “Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Jahannam (the Hell); indeed, its punishment is a persisting affliction.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا سَآءَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا
verses.text: Indeed, it is evil as an abode and a place to dwell in

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَآ أَنفَقُوا۟ لَمْ يُسْرِفُوا۟ وَلَمْ يَقْتُرُوا۟ وَكَانَ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ قَوَامًا
verses.text: - and those who, when they spend, are neither extravagant nor miserly, and it (i.e. their spending) is moderate in between (the two extremes,)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَدْعُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ وَلَا يَقْتُلُونَ ٱلنَّفْسَ ٱلَّتِى حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا يَزْنُونَ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ يَلْقَ أَثَامًا
verses.text: - and those who do not invoke any other god along with Allah, and do not kill a person whom Allah has given sanctity, except rightfully, nor do they fornicate; and whoever does it, shall face the recompense of his sin,

verses.arabicUthmani: يُضَـٰعَفْ لَهُ ٱلْعَذَابُ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ وَيَخْلُدْ فِيهِۦ مُهَانًا
verses.text: the punishment will be doubled for him, and he will remain there disdained, for ever,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صَـٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ حَسَنَـٰتٍ ۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
verses.text: except the one who repents and believes and does good deeds, then Allah will replace the evils of such people by good deeds, and Allah is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَإِنَّهُۥ يَتُوبُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَتَابًا
verses.text: Whoever repents and does righteous deeds turns to Allah truly

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَشْهَدُونَ ٱلزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّوا۟ بِٱللَّغْوِ مَرُّوا۟ كِرَامًا
verses.text: - and those who do not witness falsehood, and when they pass by the absurd things, Pass by them with dignity,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَمْ يَخِرُّوا۟ عَلَيْهَا صُمًّا وَعُمْيَانًا
verses.text: and those who, when they are reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall at them as deaf and blind ones,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّـٰتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَٱجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
verses.text: - and those who say, “Our Lord, Give us, from our spouses and our children, comfort of eyes, and make us heads of the God-fearing.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُجْزَوْنَ ٱلْغُرْفَةَ بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ وَيُلَقَّوْنَ فِيهَا تَحِيَّةً وَسَلَـٰمًا
verses.text: Such people will be rewarded with the high place - because they observed patience - and will be received therein with prayers of their eternal life and peace,

verses.arabicUthmani: خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ حَسُنَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا
verses.text: living in it (the Paradise) for ever. It is best as an abode and as a place to dwell in.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ مَا يَعْبَؤُا۟ بِكُمْ رَبِّى لَوْلَا دُعَآؤُكُمْ ۖ فَقَدْ كَذَّبْتُمْ فَسَوْفَ يَكُونُ لِزَامًۢا
verses.text: Say (O Prophet), “My Lord will never care about you, if you will not invoke Him. Now since you rejected (the truth), the punishment will be inseparable from you.”

verses.arabicUthmani: طسٓمٓ
verses.text: Tā sīn mīm.

verses.arabicUthmani: تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: These are the verses of the manifest Book.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: (O Prophet,) perhaps you are going to let yourself collapse in grief because they do not believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَـٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَـٰضِعِينَ
verses.text: If We so will, We can send down to them a sign from the sky, for which their necks will stay bent in submission.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: Never a new message comes to them from the RaHmān (the All-Merciful Allah), but they become averse to it.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَـٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: Thus they rejected (the Truth); well, soon will come to them the real descriptions of what they used to ridicule.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: Have they not looked at the earth, how many of the noble pairs (of vegetation) We have caused to grow in it?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when your Lord called Mūsā saying, “Go to the transgressing people,

verses.arabicUthmani: قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ أَلَا يَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: the people of Pharaoh. Do they not fear Allah?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
verses.text: He (Mūsā) said, “My Lord, I fear that they will reject me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَـٰرُونَ
verses.text: My heart gets straitened, and my tongue is not fluent; so send for Hārūn.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
verses.text: Moreover, they have (leveled) a charge of offence against me, and I fear they will kill me;”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
verses.text: He (Allah) said, “Never! (They will not be able to kill you.) So go, both of you, with Our signs. We are with you, listening (to the conversation you will have with him.)

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: So go, both of you, to Pharaoh and say, ‘We both are messengers of the Lord of all the worlds,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنْ أَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: (sent with the message) that you must send the children of Isrā’īl with us’”.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
verses.text: He (Pharaoh) said, “Did we not nourish you among us as a child? And you remained amidst us for years,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: and you did the blunder you did; still you are ungrateful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: He said, “I did that at a time when I was mistaken.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: Then I fled away from you when I feared you. Thereafter my Lord granted wisdom to me, and made me one of the messengers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: As for the favor with which you are obliging me, it is that you have enslaved the children of Isrā’īl.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَا رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Pharaoh said, “What is the Lord of the worlds?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
verses.text: He (Mūsā) said, “Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever there is between them, if you are to believe”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لِمَنْ حَوْلَهُۥٓ أَلَا تَسْتَمِعُونَ
verses.text: He (The Pharaoh) said to those around him, “Are you not hearing?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: He (Mūsā) said, “Your Lord and the Lord of your early forefathers”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: He (Pharaoh) said, “Your messenger who is sent to you is a mad man indeed.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: He (Mūsā) said, “Lord of the East and the West and whatever lies between them, if you are to understand.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَـٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ
verses.text: He (Pharaoh) said, “If you adopt a God other than me, I will certainly put you to prison.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكَ بِشَىْءٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: He (Mūsā) said “Will you (do this) even if I bring to you something evident?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Then bring it, if you are truthful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: So, he threw down his staff, and in no time it was a serpent, clearly visible,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
verses.text: and he drew out his hand, and right then it was a white light to the onlookers.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَسَـٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: He (Pharaoh) said to the chiefs around him “This man is certainly an expert sorcerer”.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
verses.text: He wants to expel you from your land with his sorcery. So what do you suggest?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ
verses.text: They said, “Leave him and his brother alone for some time, and send heralds to the cities,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَأْتُوكَ بِكُلِّ سَحَّارٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.text: so that they bring to you every highly expert sorcerer.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجُمِعَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ لِمِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.text: So the sorcerers were assembled for the appointed time of a known day,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقِيلَ لِلنَّاسِ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّجْتَمِعُونَ
verses.text: and it was said to the people, “Would you assemble,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
verses.text: so that we may follow the sorcerers if they are victorious?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا۟ لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
verses.text: So, when the sorcerers came, they said to Pharaoh, “Will there be a sure reward for us, if we are the victorious?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Yes, and of course, you will then be among the closer ones.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلْقُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ
verses.text: Mūsā said to them, “Throw you down what you are to throw.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَلْقَوْا۟ حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا۟ بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ
verses.text: So they threw down their ropes and their staffs and said, “By the majesty of Pharaoh, we will be the triumphant for sure.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
verses.text: Then Mūsā threw down his staff, and in no time it started swallowing the falsehood they invented.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سَـٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: So the sorcerers were made (by the truth they saw) to fall down in prostration.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We have believed in the Lord of the worlds,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبِّ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ
verses.text: the Lord of Mūsā and Hārūn.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَـٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: He (Pharaoh) said, “You have believed in him before I permit you. Surely, he (Mūsā) is the chief of you all, who has taught you sorcery. So you will soon know (your fate). I will cut off your hands and feet from different sides, and will crucify you all together.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
verses.text: They said, “There is no harm. We will return to our Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: We really hope that our Lord will forgive us our faults, as we are the first of the believers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
verses.text: And We revealed to Mūsā saying, “Make My servants travel at night. You will be pursued.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَرْسَلَ فِرْعَوْنُ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ
verses.text: So Pharaoh sent into the cities (his) men to muster (people)

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَشِرْذِمَةٌ قَلِيلُونَ
verses.text: saying, “These are a small band,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَنَا لَغَآئِظُونَ
verses.text: and indeed they are enraging us,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَجَمِيعٌ حَـٰذِرُونَ
verses.text: and we are a host, well-armed.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخْرَجْنَـٰهُم مِّن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: Thus We expelled them (i.e. the people of Pharaoh) from gardens and springs,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُنُوزٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: and from treasures and a noble abode.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ وَأَوْرَثْنَـٰهَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: Thus it was. And We made the children of Isrā’īl inherit all such things.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَتْبَعُوهُم مُّشْرِقِينَ
verses.text: So they (the people of Pharaoh) pursued them (the people of Mūsā) at the time of sunrise.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا تَرَٰٓءَا ٱلْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَـٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
verses.text: And when the two hosts saw each other, the companions of Mūsā said, “Surely we are overtaken.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
verses.text: He said, “Never! Indeed with me is my Lord. He will guide me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْبَحْرَ ۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍ كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So We revealed to Mūsā saying, “Strike the sea with your staff.” So it was severed apart, and each part became like a big mountain.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَزْلَفْنَا ثَمَّ ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: Then We brought others close to that place.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنجَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: And We saved Mūsā and all those with him.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: Then we drowned the others.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ نَبَأَ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.text: And recite before them the narrative of Ibrāhīm,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: when he said to his father and to his people, “What do you worship?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَـٰكِفِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We worship idols, and stay devoted to them.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ هَلْ يَسْمَعُونَكُمْ إِذْ تَدْعُونَ
verses.text: He said, “Do they listen to you when you call (them)

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ يَنفَعُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَضُرُّونَ
verses.text: or do they bring benefit to you or harm?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: They said, “No, but we have found our fathers doing like this.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: He said, “Have you then ever considered what you have been worshipping,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُمُ ٱلْأَقْدَمُونَ
verses.text: you and your ancient fathers,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: they all are an enemy to me, except the Lord of the worlds,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَنِى فَهُوَ يَهْدِينِ
verses.text: who created me, and who guides me,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِى هُوَ يُطْعِمُنِى وَيَسْقِينِ
verses.text: and Who feeds me and gives me drink,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا مَرِضْتُ فَهُوَ يَشْفِينِ
verses.text: and when I become sick, He heals me,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِى يُمِيتُنِى ثُمَّ يُحْيِينِ
verses.text: and who will make me die, then will give me life,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِى خَطِيٓـَٔتِى يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: and who, I hope, will forgive my fault on the Day of Retribution.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: O my Lord, give me wisdom, and make me join the righteous,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and destine for me a truthful description among the next generations,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱجْعَلْنِى مِن وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: and make me among those who will inherit the Garden of Bliss,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: and forgive my father. Indeed he was one of those who went astray,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تُخْزِنِى يَوْمَ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: and do not put me to disgrace on the Day when all will be raised to life,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ
verses.text: the Day when neither wealth will be of any use (to any one) nor sons,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
verses.text: except to him who will come to Allah with a sound heart,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: and the Paradise will be brought near to the God-fearing

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِلْغَاوِينَ
verses.text: and the Hell will be fully uncovered for the perverse,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: and it will be said to them, ‘Where is that which you used to worship

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
verses.text: beside Allah? Can they help you or help themselves?’

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكُبْكِبُوا۟ فِيهَا هُمْ وَٱلْغَاوُۥنَ
verses.text: So they (their false gods) will be thrown on their faces into it - they and the erring people

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجُنُودُ إِبْلِيسَ أَجْمَعُونَ
verses.text: and the entire army of Iblīs (Satan), all together.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ وَهُمْ فِيهَا يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: They will say when they will be quarreling there with each other,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: ‘By Allah, we were in open error

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ نُسَوِّيكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: when we used to equate you with the Lord of the worlds,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَضَلَّنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: and it is only the sinners who misguided us.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا لَنَا مِن شَـٰفِعِينَ
verses.text: Now we have neither any intercessors

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا صَدِيقٍ حَمِيمٍ
verses.text: nor any true friend.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Would that we have a chance to return whereby we may join the believers!’”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: The people of NūH rejected the messengers

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when their brother NūH said to them, “Do you not fear Allah?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: I am an honest messenger for you.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So, fear Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not claim from you any reward for it. My reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds;

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: so, fear Allah and obey me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لَكَ وَٱتَّبَعَكَ ٱلْأَرْذَلُونَ
verses.text: They said, “Shall we believe in you while you are followed by the lowest people?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, “I do not know about what they do;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: their account is with none but with my Lord, if you have sense.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِطَارِدِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: And I am not the one who would drive the believers away;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ أَنَا۠ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: I am no more than a plain warner.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ
verses.text: They said, “Should you not stop, O NūH, you will surely be stoned.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِى كَذَّبُونِ
verses.text: He said, “My Lord, my people have rejected me.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِى وَمَن مَّعِىَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: So judge between me and them with an open verdict, and save me and all the believers who are with me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنجَيْنَـٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
verses.text: So We saved him and those with him in the Ark that was fully occupied.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا بَعْدُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ
verses.text: Then We drowned, after that, all the remaining.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: The (people of) ‘Ād rejected the messengers

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when their brother Hūd said to them, “Do you not fear Allah?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: I am an honest messenger for you,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: so fear Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not claim from you any reward for it. My reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَبْنُونَ بِكُلِّ رِيعٍ ءَايَةً تَعْبَثُونَ
verses.text: Do you erect on every height a monument, having no sound purpose,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَتَّخِذُونَ مَصَانِعَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَخْلُدُونَ
verses.text: and take the objects of architecture as if you are going to live forever,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا بَطَشْتُم بَطَشْتُمْ جَبَّارِينَ
verses.text: and when you seize (someone) you seize as tyrants?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So fear Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَمَدَّكُم بِمَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: And fear the One who has supported you with what you know.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَدَّكُم بِأَنْعَـٰمٍ وَبَنِينَ
verses.text: He has supported you with cattle and sons,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: and with gardens and springs.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: In fact I fear for you the punishment of a horrible day.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٰعِظِينَ
verses.text: They said, “It is all equal for us, whether you give us advice or you do not become one of the advisors.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا خُلُقُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: This is nothing but the practice of the ancient,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.text: and we are not going to be punished.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Thus they rejected him, so We destroyed them. Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: The (people of) Thamūd rejected the messengers

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when their brother SāliH said to them, “Do you not fear Allah?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: I am an honest messenger for you.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So, fear Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not claim from you any reward for it. My reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتُتْرَكُونَ فِى مَا هَـٰهُنَآ ءَامِنِينَ
verses.text: Will you be left secure in whatever is here,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: in gardens and springs,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَزُرُوعٍ وَنَخْلٍ طَلْعُهَا هَضِيمٌ
verses.text: and in farms and date-palms, the spathes of which are interwoven?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا فَـٰرِهِينَ
verses.text: You hew out houses from the hills with pride.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So fear Allah and obey me,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تُطِيعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.text: and do not obey the order of the transgressors

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
verses.text: who make mischief on the land and who do not set things right”.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَحَّرِينَ
verses.text: They said, “You are merely one of those bewitched.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: You are nothing but a human like us. So, bring a sign if you are one of the truthful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.text: He said, “This is a she-camel. She has a share of water, and you have a share of water on a specified day.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: So do not touch her with evil (intent), lest you should be seized by a painful punishment.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَقَرُوهَا فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ نَـٰدِمِينَ
verses.text: But they killed her, then they became remorseful,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and the punishment seized them. Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: The people of LūT rejected the messengers

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when their brother LūT said to them, “Do you not fear Allah?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: I am an honest messenger for you.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So fear Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not claim from you any reward for it. My reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلذُّكْرَانَ مِنَ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Do you go to the males (for having sex) out of the whole universe,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
verses.text: and leave your wives whom your Lord has created for you? Indeed you are a people who cross (all) limits.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ
verses.text: They said, “If you do not stop O LūT, you shall be included among the outcast.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ إِنِّى لِعَمَلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلْقَالِينَ
verses.text: He said “Indeed, I am annoyed with your act.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبِّ نَجِّنِى وَأَهْلِى مِمَّا يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: My Lord, save me and my family from what they do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: So We saved him and his family, all of them

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عَجُوزًا فِى ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: except an old woman among those who remained behind.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: Then We destroyed the others,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: and subjected them to a terrible rain. So evil was the rain of those who were warned.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَ أَصْحَـٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: The people of Aaikah rejected the messengers

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when Shu‘aib said to them, “Do you not fear Allah?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: I am an honest messenger for you.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So fear Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And I do not claim from you any reward for it; my reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ
verses.text: Give full measure, and do not be among those who bring loss to others.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَزِنُوا۟ بِٱلْقِسْطَاسِ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِ
verses.text: Weigh with an even balance,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: and do not make people short of their things, and do not spread disorder in the land as mischief-makers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلْجِبِلَّةَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: and be fearful of the One who created you and the former generations.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَحَّرِينَ
verses.text: They said, “You are but one of the bewitched men.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: You are no more than a human like us, and in fact we consider you to be one of the liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: So cause a piece from the sky to fall down upon us, if you are one of the truthful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, “My Lord knows well what you do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: Thus they rejected him, so they were seized by the torment of the Day of Canopy. Indeed it was the punishment of a terrible day.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَنزِيلُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: This (Qur’ān) is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: نَزَلَ بِهِ ٱلرُّوحُ ٱلْأَمِينُ
verses.text: The Trusted Spirit has brought it down

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ لِتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
verses.text: upon your heart, so that you become one of the warners

verses.arabicUthmani: بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِىٍّ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: in plain Arabic language.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَفِى زُبُرِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: And of course, it is (mentioned) in the Scriptures of the former people.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُا۟ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: Is it not a proof for them that the knowledgeable of the children of Isrā’īl recognize him (the prophet)?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ نَزَّلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ بَعْضِ ٱلْأَعْجَمِينَ
verses.text: Even if We had revealed it to a Non-Arab,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and he had recited it to them, they would not have believed in it.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ سَلَكْنَـٰهُ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: This is how We have made it pass through the hearts of the sinners.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
verses.text: They will not believe in it until they will see the painful punishment

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَأْتِيَهُم بَغْتَةً وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: and it will come to them suddenly while they will not be anticipating (it),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَقُولُوا۟ هَلْ نَحْنُ مُنظَرُونَ
verses.text: and (then) they will say, “Is it (possible) that we are given some respite?”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: Is it then Our punishment that they are trying to hasten up?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتَ إِن مَّتَّعْنَـٰهُمْ سِنِينَ
verses.text: So tell me, if We give them enjoyment for years,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ جَآءَهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: then comes to them what they are warned of,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُمَتَّعُونَ
verses.text: what help can they receive from the comforts they were given to enjoy?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
verses.text: We did not destroy any town unless it has had warners

verses.arabicUthmani: ذِكْرَىٰ وَمَا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: to give advice, and We have never been unjust.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَنَزَّلَتْ بِهِ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ
verses.text: And this (Qur’ān) is not brought down by devils.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُمْ وَمَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
verses.text: It neither suits them, nor are they able to (do this).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّمْعِ لَمَعْزُولُونَ
verses.text: In fact, they are kept far away from hearing (it at the time of revelation).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.text: So do not invoke any other god along with Allah, otherwise you will be among those who are to be punished.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ ٱلْأَقْرَبِينَ
verses.text: And warn the nearest people of your clan,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and be kind with humbleness to the believers who followed you.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: So if they disobey you, then say, “I disown what you do,”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.text: and place your trust in the Mighty, the Merciful,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى يَرَىٰكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.text: Who sees you when you stand (in prayer,)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَقَلُّبَكَ فِى ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: and (sees) your movement among those who prostrate themselves.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: Surely, He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ
verses.text: Shall I tell you on whom the devils descend?

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنَزَّلُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ أَفَّاكٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.text: They descend on every sinful liar.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُلْقُونَ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ كَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: They give ear to hear (secretly,) and most of them tell lies.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشُّعَرَآءُ يَتَّبِعُهُمُ ٱلْغَاوُۥنَ
verses.text: As for the poets, they are followed by the straying people.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ
verses.text: Did you not see that they wander in every valley,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُمْ يَقُولُونَ مَا لَا يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: and that they say what they do not?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍ يَنقَلِبُونَ
verses.text: Except those who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah very much, and defend themselves after they are wronged. And the wrongdoers will soon know to which place they are going to return.

verses.arabicUthmani: طسٓ ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Tā Sīn . These are the verses of the Qur’ān and an enlightening book,

verses.arabicUthmani: هُدًى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: a guidance and good news to the believers

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: who establish Salāh and pay Zakāh and who have faith in the Hereafter.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
verses.text: As for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made their deeds look beautiful to them. So they are wandering astray.

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُوٓءُ ٱلْعَذَابِ وَهُمْ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ
verses.text: Those are the people who deserve the worst punishment and who are the worst losers in the Hereafter.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.text: Indeed you are being given the Qur’ān by a Wise, Knowledgeable Being.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهْلِهِۦٓ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوْ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابٍ قَبَسٍ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَصْطَلُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when Mūsā said to his family, “I have noticed a fire. I shall bring to you some news from it, or bring to you a live ember, so that you may warm yourselves.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهَا نُودِىَ أَنۢ بُورِكَ مَن فِى ٱلنَّارِ وَمَنْ حَوْلَهَا وَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: So when he came to it, he was called: “Blessed is the one who is in the fire and the one who is around it. And pure is Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: O Mūsā, the fact is that I AM ALLAH, the Mighty, the Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ ۚ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّى لَا يَخَافُ لَدَىَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: And cast your staff down.” So when he saw it moving, as if it was a snake, he retreated turning his back, and did not look behind. “O Mūsā, be not scared. I am such that the messengers are not scared before Me,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسْنًۢا بَعْدَ سُوٓءٍ فَإِنِّى غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: except him who did wrong, then after (having done) evil, replaced (it) with good, then I am Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَدْخِلْ يَدَكَ فِى جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ ۖ فِى تِسْعِ ءَايَـٰتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: And put your hand into your bosom, and it will come out white, without any evil, as one of the nine signs (sent) to Pharaoh and his people. Surely they have been a sinful people.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايَـٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: So when Our signs came to them as eye-openers, they said, “This is a clear magic.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَحَدُوا۟ بِهَا وَٱسْتَيْقَنَتْهَآ أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا ۚ فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: And they denied them out of sheer injustice and arrogance, though their hearts believed them (to be true). See, then, how was the fate of the mischief-makers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمَـٰنَ عِلْمًا ۖ وَقَالَا ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely We gave knowledge to Dāwūd and Sulaimān, and they said, “Praise belongs to Allah who made us excel many of His believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيْمَـٰنُ دَاوُۥدَ ۖ وَقَالَ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ عُلِّمْنَا مَنطِقَ ٱلطَّيْرِ وَأُوتِينَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ ۖ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: And Sulaimān inherited (the traits of) Dāwūd and said, “O people we have been taught the speech of birds, and all sorts of things are given to us. Indeed, this is the evident grace (of Allah).”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ جُنُودُهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ وَٱلطَّيْرِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
verses.text: And mustered for Sulaimān were his forces from among the Jinns and the humans and the birds. So all of them were kept under (his) control,

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ وَادِ ٱلنَّمْلِ قَالَتْ نَمْلَةٌ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّمْلُ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ مَسَـٰكِنَكُمْ لَا يَحْطِمَنَّكُمْ سُلَيْمَـٰنُ وَجُنُودُهُۥ وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: until when they reached the valley of the ants, one of the ants said, “O ants, enter your dwelling places, lest Sulaimān and his armies crush you unknowingly.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَـٰلِحًا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: So he (Sulaimān) smiled, laughing on her speech and said, “My Lord, enable me to become grateful to Your favor that you have bestowed on me and on my parents, and to do good deeds that You like, and admit me, with Your mercy, among Your righteous servants.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِىَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَآئِبِينَ
verses.text: And (once) he (Sulaimān) checked the birds and said, “How is it with me that I do not see the hudhud (hoopoe)? Rather he has disappeared.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُۥ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لَأَا۟ذْبَحَنَّهُۥٓ أَوْ لَيَأْتِيَنِّى بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: I will punish him with a severe punishment or slaughter him unless he brings to me a clear plea.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
verses.text: Then the hoopoe did not take long and said (to Sulaimān), “I have discovered what you did not, and have brought to you a sure information from Saba’ (Sheba).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: I have found a woman ruling over them, and all sorts of things are given to her, and she has a great throne.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: I have found her and her people prostrating themselves to the sun, instead of Allah, and the Satan has beautified their deeds for them, and has prevented them from the way, so they do not take the right path,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: that is, they do not prostrate to Allah who brings forth what is hidden in the heavens and the earth,-and who knows whatever you conceal and whatever you reveal.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ۩
verses.text: Allah! There is no god but He, the Lord of the Great Throne.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: He (Sulaimān) said, “We shall see whether you have told the truth or you are one of the liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱذْهَب بِّكِتَـٰبِى هَـٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: Go with this letter of mine, and deliver it down to them, then turn back from them, and see how they react.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَتْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ إِنِّىٓ أُلْقِىَ إِلَىَّ كِتَـٰبٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: She (the queen) said (to her officials after receiving the letter), “O chieftains, there has been delivered to me an esteemed letter.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ مِن سُلَيْمَـٰنَ وَإِنَّهُۥ بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.text: It is from Sulaimān, and it is (in the following words :) With the name of Allah, the All-Merciful, the Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَىَّ وَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: Do not rebel against me, and come to me in submission.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَتْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَفْتُونِى فِىٓ أَمْرِى مَا كُنتُ قَاطِعَةً أَمْرًا حَتَّىٰ تَشْهَدُونِ
verses.text: She said, “O chieftains, advise me in the matter I have (before me). I am not the one who decides a matter absolutely unless you are present with me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ نَحْنُ أُو۟لُوا۟ قُوَّةٍ وَأُو۟لُوا۟ بَأْسٍ شَدِيدٍ وَٱلْأَمْرُ إِلَيْكِ فَٱنظُرِى مَاذَا تَأْمُرِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We are powerful and tough fighters, and the decision lies with you; so consider what command you should give.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَتْ إِنَّ ٱلْمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُوا۟ قَرْيَةً أَفْسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوٓا۟ أَعِزَّةَ أَهْلِهَآ أَذِلَّةً ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: She said, “In fact when the kings enter a town, they put it to disorder, and put its honorable citizens to disgrace, and this is how they normally do.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنِّى مُرْسِلَةٌ إِلَيْهِم بِهَدِيَّةٍ فَنَاظِرَةٌۢ بِمَ يَرْجِعُ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: And I am going to send a gift to them, then see, what response the envoys will bring back.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ سُلَيْمَـٰنَ قَالَ أَتُمِدُّونَنِ بِمَالٍ فَمَآ ءَاتَىٰنِۦَ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ مِّمَّآ ءَاتَىٰكُم بَلْ أَنتُم بِهَدِيَّتِكُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ
verses.text: So when he (the envoy) came to Sulaimān, he said, “Are you extending a financial aid to me? So what Allah has given me is much better than what He has given to you. But you yourselves are proud of your gift.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱرْجِعْ إِلَيْهِمْ فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّهُم بِجُنُودٍ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُم بِهَا وَلَنُخْرِجَنَّهُم مِّنْهَآ أَذِلَّةً وَهُمْ صَـٰغِرُونَ
verses.text: Go back to them, and we will bring to them forces they have no power to face, and we will certainly drive them out from there in humiliation while they are disgraced.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَيُّكُمْ يَأْتِينِى بِعَرْشِهَا قَبْلَ أَن يَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: He said, “O chieftains, which one of you will bring her throne to me before they come to me submissively?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ عِفْرِيتٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن تَقُومَ مِن مَّقَامِكَ ۖ وَإِنِّى عَلَيْهِ لَقَوِىٌّ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: A stalwart of the Jinn said, “I will bring it to you before you rise up from your place, and for this (task) I am powerful, reliable.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ ٱلَّذِى عِندَهُۥ عِلْمٌ مِّنَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن يَرْتَدَّ إِلَيْكَ طَرْفُكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهُ مُسْتَقِرًّا عِندَهُۥ قَالَ هَـٰذَا مِن فَضْلِ رَبِّى لِيَبْلُوَنِىٓ ءَأَشْكُرُ أَمْ أَكْفُرُ ۖ وَمَن شَكَرَ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ رَبِّى غَنِىٌّ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: Said the one who had the knowledge of the book, “I will bring it to you before your glance returns to you.” So when he saw it (the throne) well placed before him, he said, “This is by the grace of my Lord, so that He may test me whether I am grateful or ungrateful. Whoever is grateful is grateful for his own benefit, and whoever is ungrateful, then my Lord is Need-Free, Bountiful”.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ نَكِّرُوا۟ لَهَا عَرْشَهَا نَنظُرْ أَتَهْتَدِىٓ أَمْ تَكُونُ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: He said, “Disguise the throne for her, and we will see whether she discovers the truth, or she does not recognize it.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْ قِيلَ أَهَـٰكَذَا عَرْشُكِ ۖ قَالَتْ كَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ ۚ وَأُوتِينَا ٱلْعِلْمَ مِن قَبْلِهَا وَكُنَّا مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: So when she came, it was said (to her), “Is your throne like this?” She said, “It seems to be the same. We have been made to recognize the truth even before this, and we have already submitted.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَدَّهَا مَا كَانَت تَّعْبُدُ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّهَا كَانَتْ مِن قَوْمٍ كَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: And she was prevented (from submitting before this) by that which she used to worship instead of Allah. Indeed she was from a disbelieving people.

verses.arabicUthmani: قِيلَ لَهَا ٱدْخُلِى ٱلصَّرْحَ ۖ فَلَمَّا رَأَتْهُ حَسِبَتْهُ لُجَّةً وَكَشَفَتْ عَن سَاقَيْهَا ۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُۥ صَرْحٌ مُّمَرَّدٌ مِّن قَوَارِيرَ ۗ قَالَتْ رَبِّ إِنِّى ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِى وَأَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمَـٰنَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It was said to her, “Enter the palace.” Then once she saw it, she thought it was flowing water, and uncovered her legs. He (Sulaimān) said, “This is a palace made of glasses.” She said, “My Lord, I had surely wronged myself, and now I submit, along with Sulaimān, to Allah, the Lord of all the worlds.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمْ صَـٰلِحًا أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَإِذَا هُمْ فَرِيقَانِ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: And We sent to Thamūd their brother SāliH saying (to them), “Worship Allah”. Then suddenly they became two groups quarrelling with each other.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ قَبْلَ ٱلْحَسَنَةِ ۖ لَوْلَا تَسْتَغْفِرُونَ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: He said, “My people, why do you seek evil to come sooner before good? Why do you not seek forgiveness from Allah, so that you are treated with mercy?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ ٱطَّيَّرْنَا بِكَ وَبِمَن مَّعَكَ ۚ قَالَ طَـٰٓئِرُكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تُفْتَنُونَ
verses.text: They said, “We regard you and those with you as a sign of bad omen.” He said, “Your omen is with Allah, but you are a people put to a test.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَانَ فِى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ تِسْعَةُ رَهْطٍ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
verses.text: And there were nine persons in the city who used to make mischief on the earth and did not put things right.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ تَقَاسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهْلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصَـٰدِقُونَ
verses.text: They said, “Let us swear a mutual oath by Allah that we shall attack him (SāliH) and his family at night, then will say to his heir, ‘We did not witness the destruction of his family, and we are really truthful.’”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: Thus they devised a plan, and We devised a plan, while they were not aware.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمْ أَنَّا دَمَّرْنَـٰهُمْ وَقَوْمَهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: So, look how was the fate of their plan, that We annihilated them and their people altogether.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتِلْكَ بُيُوتُهُمْ خَاوِيَةًۢ بِمَا ظَلَمُوٓا۟ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Now those are their houses, lying empty because of their transgression. Surely, in this there are signs for a people who have knowledge.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنجَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ يَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: And We saved those who believed and who used to be God-fearing.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلْفَـٰحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: And (We sent) LūT when he said to his people, “Do you commit the shameful act while you can see (its shamefulness)?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَئِنَّكُمْ لَتَأْتُونَ ٱلرِّجَالَ شَهْوَةً مِّن دُونِ ٱلنِّسَآءِ ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تَجْهَلُونَ
verses.text: Is it that you really come to men lustfully instead of women? No, you are a people committing acts of ignorance.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ أَخْرِجُوٓا۟ ءَالَ لُوطٍ مِّن قَرْيَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ أُنَاسٌ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ
