No female conceives (a baby) nor gives birth (to it) without His knowledge; and no aged person is made to advance in age, nor is a part curtailed from his age, but all this is (recorded) in a book. Surely all this is easy for Allah.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَسْتَوِى ٱلْبَحْرَانِ هَـٰذَا عَذْبٌ فُرَاتٌ سَآئِغٌ شَرَابُهُۥ وَهَـٰذَا مِلْحٌ أُجَاجٌ ۖ وَمِن كُلٍّ تَأْكُلُونَ لَحْمًا طَرِيًّا وَتَسْتَخْرِجُونَ حِلْيَةً تَلْبَسُونَهَا ۖ وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ فِيهِ مَوَاخِرَ لِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: And two seas are not alike; this one is sweet, saturating, pleasant to drink, and that one is salt, bitter. But from each, you eat fresh meat, and derive ornaments that you wear. And you see the boats therein cleaving through water, so that you may search for His grace, and that you may be grateful.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيْلَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِى ٱلَّيْلِ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ كُلٌّ يَجْرِى لِأَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِن قِطْمِيرٍ
verses.text: He makes the night enter into the day and makes the day enter into the night, and He has subjugated the sun and the moon; each one of them is running towards an appointed time. That is Allah, your Lord. To Him belongs the kingdom. And those whom you invoke beside Him do not own even the membrane on a date-stone.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن تَدْعُوهُمْ لَا يَسْمَعُوا۟ دُعَآءَكُمْ وَلَوْ سَمِعُوا۟ مَا ٱسْتَجَابُوا۟ لَكُمْ ۖ وَيَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ يَكْفُرُونَ بِشِرْكِكُمْ ۚ وَلَا يُنَبِّئُكَ مِثْلُ خَبِيرٍ
verses.text: If you call them, they do not hear your call, and even if they were to hear, they would not respond to you. And on the Day of Judgment they will deny your having held them as Allah’s partners. And none can inform you like Him who is Aware.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ أَنتُمُ ٱلْفُقَرَآءُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ وَٱللَّهُ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.text: O men, you are the ones who need Allah, and Allah is Free-of-All-Needs, the Ever-Praised.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن يَشَأْ يُذْهِبْكُمْ وَيَأْتِ بِخَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ
verses.text: If He so wills, He can do away with you and bring a new creation.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ بِعَزِيزٍ
verses.text: For Allah, that is not something difficult.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ ۚ وَإِن تَدْعُ مُثْقَلَةٌ إِلَىٰ حِمْلِهَا لَا يُحْمَلْ مِنْهُ شَىْءٌ وَلَوْ كَانَ ذَا قُرْبَىٰٓ ۗ إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَأَقَامُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ ۚ وَمَن تَزَكَّىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَتَزَكَّىٰ لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: No bearer will bear the burden of any other person. If a person carrying a heavy load calls (someone) to (share) his load, nothing from it shall be carried (by the latter), even though he be a near of kin. You can warn only those who fear their Lord, while He is unseen, and establish Salāh. Whoever gets purified gets purified for his own benefit. And to Allah is the final return.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَسْتَوِى ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ وَٱلْبَصِيرُ
verses.text: The blind and the sighted are not equal,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتُ وَلَا ٱلنُّورُ
verses.text: nor are darkness and light,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا ٱلظِّلُّ وَلَا ٱلْحَرُورُ
verses.text: nor shade and heat of the sun.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَسْتَوِى ٱلْأَحْيَآءُ وَلَا ٱلْأَمْوَٰتُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسْمِعُ مَن يَشَآءُ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ بِمُسْمِعٍ مَّن فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ
verses.text: And the living and the dead are not alike. Allah makes to hear whomsoever He wills. And you cannot make to hear those who are in the graves.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ أَنتَ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌ
verses.text: You are but a warner.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ بَشِيرًا وَنَذِيرًا ۚ وَإِن مِّنْ أُمَّةٍ إِلَّا خَلَا فِيهَا نَذِيرٌ
verses.text: Surely We have sent you with truth as a bearer of good news and as a warner, and there was no community without a warner having passed among them.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يُكَذِّبُوكَ فَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ جَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ وَبِٱلزُّبُرِ وَبِٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُنِيرِ
verses.text: If they reject you, (it is not something new, because) those before them have (also) rejected (messengers). Their messengers came to them with clear proofs and with scriptures and with the enlightening book.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَخَذْتُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۖ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.text: Then I seized those who disbelieved. So, how was My censure !

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦ ثَمَرَٰتٍ مُّخْتَلِفًا أَلْوَٰنُهَا ۚ وَمِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ جُدَدٌۢ بِيضٌ وَحُمْرٌ مُّخْتَلِفٌ أَلْوَٰنُهَا وَغَرَابِيبُ سُودٌ
verses.text: Did you not see that Allah has sent down water from the sky? Then We brought forth with it fruits having different colours. And among the mountains there are tracks, white and red- of different colours, and ( others) utterly black.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَٱلدَّوَآبِّ وَٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ مُخْتَلِفٌ أَلْوَٰنُهُۥ كَذَٰلِكَ ۗ إِنَّمَا يَخْشَى ٱللَّهَ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْعُلَمَـٰٓؤُا۟ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ غَفُورٌ
verses.text: And among humans and beasts and cattle, there are those having different colours as well. Only those of His slaves fear Allah who are knowledgeable. Surely Allah is Mighty, Forgiving.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتْلُونَ كِتَـٰبَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَقَامُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَنفَقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقْنَـٰهُمْ سِرًّا وَعَلَانِيَةً يَرْجُونَ تِجَـٰرَةً لَّن تَبُورَ
verses.text: Surely those who recite Allah’s Book and have established Salāh and have spent, secretly and openly, from what We have provided to them - they hope for a trade that will never crash,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيُوَفِّيَهُمْ أُجُورَهُمْ وَيَزِيدَهُم مِّن فَضْلِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ غَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ
verses.text: so that He pays them their rewards in full, and gives them more out of His grace. Surely He is Most-Forgiving, Very-Appreciative.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ هُوَ ٱلْحَقُّ مُصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ لَخَبِيرٌۢ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: The Book We have revealed to you is the Truth, confirming what was (revealed) before it. Surely Allah, in respect of His slaves, is All-Aware, All-Seeing.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ۖ فَمِنْهُمْ ظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ وَمِنْهُم مُّقْتَصِدٌ وَمِنْهُمْ سَابِقٌۢ بِٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
verses.text: Then We conveyed the Book as an heritage to those of Our slaves whom We chose. Now, some of them are those who wrong their own selves, and some of them are mediocre, and some of them are those who outpace (others) in righteous deeds with Allah’s permission. That is the great bounty,

verses.arabicUthmani: جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ يَدْخُلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوْنَ فِيهَا مِنْ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٍ وَلُؤْلُؤًا ۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمْ فِيهَا حَرِيرٌ
verses.text: gardens of eternity they enter. They will be ornamented with bracelets of gold and with pearls, and their dress therein will be (of) silk.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَذْهَبَ عَنَّا ٱلْحَزَنَ ۖ إِنَّ رَبَّنَا لَغَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ
verses.text: And they will say, “Praise be to Allah who has removed all sorrow from us. Surely our Lord is Most-Forgiving, Very-Appreciative,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَحَلَّنَا دَارَ ٱلْمُقَامَةِ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ لَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا نَصَبٌ وَلَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا لُغُوبٌ
verses.text: who, out of His grace, has made us land at a home of eternal living where we are neither touched by weariness, nor are we touched by boredom.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَهُمْ نَارُ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يُقْضَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ فَيَمُوتُوا۟ وَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنْهُم مِّنْ عَذَابِهَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى كُلَّ كَفُورٍ
verses.text: As for those who disbelieve, for them shall be the fire of Jahannam; neither they will be sentenced to death, so that they could die, nor will its torment be lightened for them. It is in this way that We punish every infidel.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُمْ يَصْطَرِخُونَ فِيهَا رَبَّنَآ أَخْرِجْنَا نَعْمَلْ صَـٰلِحًا غَيْرَ ٱلَّذِى كُنَّا نَعْمَلُ ۚ أَوَلَمْ نُعَمِّرْكُم مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُ فِيهِ مَن تَذَكَّرَ وَجَآءَكُمُ ٱلنَّذِيرُ ۖ فَذُوقُوا۟ فَمَا لِلظَّـٰلِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٍ
verses.text: And they will be crying therein, “Our Lord, take us out (from here), and we will act righteously, not in the way we have been doing before.” (Allah will say to them,) “Did We not give you an age in your life in which lesson could have been learnt by the one who wished to take lesson? And (furthermore) the warner had (also) come to you. So, have a taste, because the wrongdoers will have no supporter.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَـٰلِمُ غَيْبِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: Surely Allah is the Knower of the unseen in the heavens and the earth. Indeed He fully knows what lies in the hearts.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَكُمْ خَلَـٰٓئِفَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ فَمَن كَفَرَ فَعَلَيْهِ كُفْرُهُۥ ۖ وَلَا يَزِيدُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ كُفْرُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا مَقْتًا ۖ وَلَا يَزِيدُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ كُفْرُهُمْ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
verses.text: He is the One who has made you successors (of the past generations) on the earth. So the one who becomes infidel, his infidelity will go against himself. Their infidelity adds nothing to the infidels but anger from their Lord, and their infidelity adds nothing to the infidels but loss.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ شُرَكَآءَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَرُونِى مَاذَا خَلَقُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ لَهُمْ شِرْكٌ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ أَمْ ءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمْ كِتَـٰبًا فَهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَتٍ مِّنْهُ ۚ بَلْ إِن يَعِدُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ بَعْضُهُم بَعْضًا إِلَّا غُرُورًا
verses.text: Say, “Tell me about your (presumed) co-gods whom you invoke beside Allah. Show me that part of the earth that they have created. Or do they have a share in the (creation) of the heavens?” Or have We given them a book so that they are upon a clear proof from it? No, but the wrongdoers promise one another nothing but delusion.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُمْسِكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ أَن تَزُولَا ۚ وَلَئِن زَالَتَآ إِنْ أَمْسَكَهُمَا مِنْ أَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ حَلِيمًا غَفُورًا
verses.text: Undoubtedly, Allah holds back the heavens and the earth from leaving their existing state, and if they were to leave, there is none who can hold them back, except Him. Surely He is Forbearing, Most-Forgiving.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقْسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ جَهْدَ أَيْمَـٰنِهِمْ لَئِن جَآءَهُمْ نَذِيرٌ لَّيَكُونُنَّ أَهْدَىٰ مِنْ إِحْدَى ٱلْأُمَمِ ۖ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ نَذِيرٌ مَّا زَادَهُمْ إِلَّا نُفُورًا
verses.text: They had sworn forceful oaths that if a warner would come to them, they would be more receptive to guidance than any other community. But when a warner came to them, it added nothing to them but aversion,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱسْتِكْبَارًا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَكْرَ ٱلسَّيِّئِ ۚ وَلَا يَحِيقُ ٱلْمَكْرُ ٱلسَّيِّئُ إِلَّا بِأَهْلِهِۦ ۚ فَهَلْ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا سُنَّتَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ۚ فَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ تَبْدِيلًا ۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ تَحْوِيلًا
verses.text: because of their showing arrogance in the land and plotting of evil. And the evil plot engulfs none but its own people (who make it). So, they are looking for nothing but the (divine) practice with the earlier people. So you will never find in Allah’s practice any change, and you will never find in Allah’s practice any diversion.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَيَنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ وَكَانُوٓا۟ أَشَدَّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةً ۚ وَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ لِيُعْجِزَهُۥ مِن شَىْءٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَلِيمًا قَدِيرًا
verses.text: Did they not travel in the land and see how was the end of those before them? They were stronger than these in power. Allah is not such that something in the heavens or the earth can frustrate Him. Surely He is All-Knowing, All-Powerful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ يُؤَاخِذُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّاسَ بِمَا كَسَبُوا۟ مَا تَرَكَ عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِهَا مِن دَآبَّةٍ وَلَـٰكِن يُؤَخِّرُهُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ بَصِيرًۢا
verses.text: If Allah were to take mankind to task for what they did, He would have not left a living creature on its back, but He delays them upto an appointed time. So when their time will come, then Allah is the One who will see His slaves.

verses.arabicUthmani: يسٓ
verses.text: Yā Sīn

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: By the Qur’ān, that is full of wisdom,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: You are truly one of the messengers of Allah,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
verses.text: (and you are) on a straight path,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِيلَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.text: (this Qur’ān being) a revelation from the All- Mighty, the Very-Merciful,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَـٰفِلُونَ
verses.text: so that you may warn a people whose fathers were not warned, and hence, they are unaware.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: The word has indeed come true about most of them, so they will not believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنَـٰقِهِمْ أَغْلَـٰلًا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
verses.text: We have placed iron collars on their necks, so they are reaching up to their chins, and their heads are forced to remain upwards.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَـٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: And We have placed a barrier in front of them and a barrier behind them, and (thus) they are encircled by Us; so they do not see.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: It is all equal for them whether you warn them or do not warn them, they will not believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۖ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: You can (usefully) warn only the one who follows the advice and fears the RaHmān (the All-Merciful Allah) without seeing (Him). So give him the good news of forgiveness and of a noble reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوا۟ وَءَاثَـٰرَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ فِىٓ إِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Surely We will give new life to the dead, and We are recording whatever (deeds) they send before them and whatever effects they leave behind. Every thing is fully computed by Us in a manifest book of record.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱضْرِبْ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ إِذْ جَآءَهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: Cite to them the example of the People of the Town, when the messengers came to it,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: when We sent to them two (apostles), and they rejected both of them, so We confirmed them with a third one. So they said, “We are sent to you.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ
verses.text: They (the people of the Town) said, “You are no more than human beings like us, and the RaHmān (the All-Merciful Allah) has not sent down any thing. You are but telling a lie.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ رَبُّنَا يَعْلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: They (the messengers) said, “Our Lord knows that we are undoubtedly sent to you.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا عَلَيْنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: Our obligation is no more than to convey the message clearly.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا تَطَيَّرْنَا بِكُمْ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهُوا۟ لَنَرْجُمَنَّكُمْ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: They (the People of the Town) said, “We take you as a bad omen for us. If you do not desist, we will certainly stone you and you will be afflicted by a painful punishment from us.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ طَـٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمْ ۚ أَئِن ذُكِّرْتُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّسْرِفُونَ
verses.text: They said, “Your bad omen is with yourselves. (Do you take it as bad omen) if you are given a good counsel? Rather, you are a people who cross all limits.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَ مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٌ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And there came a man rushing from the farthest part of the city. He said, “O my people, follow the messengers.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَن لَّا يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ أَجْرًا وَهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: Follow those who do not claim any reward from you, and who are on the right path.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لِىَ لَآ أَعْبُدُ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: What excuse do I have if I do not worship the One who has created me and to whom you will be returned?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدْنِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ بِضُرٍّ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ
verses.text: Shall I adopt those gods besides Him whose intercession, if RaHmān (the All-Merciful Allah) intends to do harm to me, cannot help me in the least, nor can they come to my rescue?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّىٓ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: In that case, I will be in open error indeed.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّىٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَٱسْمَعُونِ
verses.text: Undoubtedly I have believed in your Lord; so listen to me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قِيلَ ٱدْخُلِ ٱلْجَنَّةَ ۖ قَالَ يَـٰلَيْتَ قَوْمِى يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: (Thereafter when his people killed him,) it was said to him, “Enter the Paradise”. He said, “Would that my people knew

verses.arabicUthmani: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِى رَبِّى وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
verses.text: how my Lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honoured ones!”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ مِن جُندٍ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
verses.text: And We did not send down to his people any army from the heavens after him, nor were We (in need) to send down.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خَـٰمِدُونَ
verses.text: It was no more than a single Cry, and in no time they were extinguished.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: Alas for the slaves (of Allah)! No messenger came to them, but they have been mocking at him.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: Did they not see how many generations We have destroyed before them who will not come back to them?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: All of them are but to be assembled together (and) to be arraigned before Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَـٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: And a sign for them is the dead land. We gave it life and brought forth grain from it; so from it they eat.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّـٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَـٰبٍ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ
verses.text: And We have placed gardens of date-palms and grapes, and caused springs to gush forth therein,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: so that they may eat fruits thereof, while it was not made by their hands. Would they not then offer gratitude?

verses.arabicUthmani: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Pure (from every fault) is the One who has created all the pairs of whatever the earth grows and of the humans themselves and of that which they do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
verses.text: And a sign for them is the night. We strip (the cover of) the day from it, and they are suddenly in darkness.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
verses.text: And the sun is quickly proceeding towards its destination. That is the designing of the All-Mighty, the All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَـٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
verses.text: And for the moon We have appointed measured phases, until it turned (pale, curved and fine) like an old branch of date palm.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
verses.text: Neither it is for the sun to overtake the moon, nor can the night outpace the day. Each one is floating in an orbit.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
verses.text: And it is a sign for them that We boarded their children in the loaded ship,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
verses.text: and created for them things similar to it on which they ride.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ
verses.text: And if We so will, We can drown them; then no one will respond to their cry, nor will they be rescued,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَمَتَـٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: unless there be mercy from Us, and (unless) We let them enjoy for a while.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَمَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: And (they pay no heed) when it is said to them, “Save yourselves from that (punishment) which is before you (in this world) and that which will come after you (die), so that you may receive mercy”.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ مِّنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: There comes to them no sign from the signs of your Lord, but they turn averse to it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَنُطْعِمُ مَن لَّوْ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطْعَمَهُۥٓ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: And when it is said to them, “Spend (to the needy) from the provision Allah has given to you”, the disbelievers say to the believers, “Shall we feed those whom Allah could have fed, if Allah so willed? You are but in open error.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: And they say, “When will this promise come true, if you are truthful?”

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ
verses.text: They are looking for nothing but for a single Cry that will seize them when they will be quarrelling.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَوْصِيَةً وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: So they will not be able to make a bequest, nor will they return to their household.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
verses.text: And the Horn will be blown, and suddenly they will be rushing from their graves towards their Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا ۜ ۗ هَـٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: They will say, “Woe to us! Who has raised us from our sleeping place? “This is what RaHmān (the All-Merciful Allah) had promised, and the messengers had told the truth.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: It will be no more than a single Cry, and in no time they will all be arraigned before Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Then, nobody will be subjected to injustice in the least, and you will not be recompensed but for what you used to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى شُغُلٍ فَـٰكِهُونَ
verses.text: The people of the Paradise are engaged today in (their) activities, happily enjoying (them).

verses.arabicUthmani: هُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُهُمْ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
verses.text: They and their spouses are in pleasant shades, reclining on couches.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَهُمْ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
verses.text: For them there are fruits, and for them there is whatever they ask for.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْلًا مِّن رَّبٍّ رَّحِيمٍ
verses.text: “Salām ”(Peace upon you) is the word (they receive) from Merciful Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱمْتَـٰزُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: And (it will be said to the infidels,) “Get apart (from the believers) today O the guilty ones.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يَـٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Did I not direct you, O children of ’Ādam (Adam), that you must not worship the Satan, (because) he is an open enemy for you,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنِ ٱعْبُدُونِى ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
verses.text: and that you must worship Me, (because) this is the straight path?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمْ جِبِلًّا كَثِيرًا ۖ أَفَلَمْ تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: He had misguided lot many people from among you. So, did you not have sense?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: (Now) this is the Jahannam of which you were consistently warned.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
verses.text: Enter it today, because you have been persistently denying (the truth).”

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: Today We will set a seal on their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their legs will bear witness about what they used to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: If We so will, We would wipe out their eyes (right here in this world), and they would be racing towards the way, but how would they see?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: And If We so will, We would disfigure them at their places, and they would not be able to move, nor would they return.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ ۖ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: And whomsoever We give long life, we reverse him in creation. Then, do they have no sense?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا عَلَّمْنَـٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: We did not teach him (the Holy Prophet) poetry, and it is not proper for him. It is nothing (of that sort,) but (it is) an advice and a readable book that explains (the Truth),

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: so that it may warn him who is alive (to listen to the truth), and so that the word may prove true against the disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعَـٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَـٰلِكُونَ
verses.text: Did they not see that We have created for them cattle, among things made (directly) by Our hands, and then they become their owners?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَذَلَّلْنَـٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: And We have brought them under their control, so as some of them are their means of transport, and some of them they eat.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: And for them there are (other) benefits in them and things to drink. So, would they not be grateful?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: They have adopted gods other than Allah, so that they may be helped (by them).

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: They cannot help them, rather they (the disbelievers themselves) are (like) an army brought forth for (protecting) them (the so-called co-gods)

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: So, their remarks must not grieve you. Surely We know what they conceal and what they disclose.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Did man not see that We have created him from a drop of semen? Then suddenly he stood as an open adversary (to Us).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًا وَنَسِىَ خَلْقَهُۥ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْىِ ٱلْعِظَـٰمَ وَهِىَ رَمِيمٌ
verses.text: He has set up an argument about Us and forgot his creation. He said, “Who will give life to the bones when they are decayed?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Say, “These will be revived by the same One who had created them for the first time, and who is fully aware of every creation,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ نَارًا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ
verses.text: - the One who created for you fire from the green tree, and in no time you kindle from it.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: Is it that the One who has created the heavens and the earth has no power to create ones like them? Why not? He is the Supreme Creator, the All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
verses.text: His practice, when He intends to do something, is no more than He says, “Be”, and it comes to be.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: So, pure (from every fault) is the One in whose hand is the dominion of all things. And towards Him you are to be returned.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلصَّـٰٓفَّـٰتِ صَفًّا
verses.text: (I swear) by those who stand in rows,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلزَّٰجِرَٰتِ زَجْرًا
verses.text: then by those who prevent firmly,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلتَّـٰلِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا
verses.text: then by those who recite the dhikr,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ إِلَـٰهَكُمْ لَوَٰحِدٌ
verses.text: surely your God is but One,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ
verses.text: the Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, and Lord of the points of sunrise.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلْكَوَاكِبِ
verses.text: Verily, We have decorated the nearest sky with an adornment, the stars,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحِفْظًا مِّن كُلِّ شَيْطَـٰنٍ مَّارِدٍ
verses.text: and (have made them) a security against every rebellious devil.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٍ
verses.text: They cannot listen to the Upper Realm and are hit from every side

verses.arabicUthmani: دُحُورًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ وَاصِبٌ
verses.text: to be driven off, and for them there is a lasting punishment;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ خَطِفَ ٱلْخَطْفَةَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ ثَاقِبٌ
verses.text: however, if one snatches a little bit, he is pursued by a bright flame.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَهُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَم مَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ ۚ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّن طِينٍ لَّازِبٍۭ
verses.text: Now ask them, “Are they stronger in the formation of their bodies, or those (other beings) that We have created?” Certainly, We did create them from sticky clay.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ عَجِبْتَ وَيَسْخَرُونَ
verses.text: But you wonder (at their denial), and they mock (at the idea of an Hereafter).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ لَا يَذْكُرُونَ
verses.text: And when any advice is given to them, they pay no heed to it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يَسْتَسْخِرُونَ
verses.text: And when they see a sign, they make fun of it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: and say, “This is nothing but an open magic.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
verses.text: Is it when we have died and become dust and bones, that we shall be raised again,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
verses.text: and even our fathers of aforetime?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ نَعَمْ وَأَنتُمْ دَٰخِرُونَ
verses.text: Say, “Yes, and you shall be disgraced (too)!”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ فَإِذَا هُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: So, it will be only a single castigating call, and all of a sudden they will begin to see.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: And they will be saying, “Woe to us; this is the Day of Retribution.”

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: (It will be said to them,) “This is the Day of Judgment that you used to deny.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ ٱحْشُرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ وَأَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: (It will be said to the angels,) “Muster all those who were unjust, and their fellows, and whatever they used to worship

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهْدُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: other than Allah, and show them the way to Jahannam ,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقِفُوهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُم مَّسْـُٔولُونَ
verses.text: and stop them (for a while,) for they are to be asked some questions.”

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنَاصَرُونَ
verses.text: (Then they will be asked, “What is wrong with you that you do not help each other?”

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ هُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ مُسْتَسْلِمُونَ
verses.text: On the contrary, that day all of them will have totally surrendered.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: And some of them (the followers of their chiefs) will turn to others (the chiefs), asking questions from one another.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَأْتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: They (the followers) will say, “You were the ones who used to come to (mislead) us forcefully.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَل لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: They (the chiefs) will say, “On the contrary, you yourselves were not believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَـٰنٍۭ ۖ بَلْ كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا طَـٰغِينَ
verses.text: We had no authority over you at all, but you yourselves were a transgressing people.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَحَقَّ عَلَيْنَا قَوْلُ رَبِّنَآ ۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ
verses.text: So, the word of our Lord has come true against us. Indeed, we have to taste (the punishment).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَغْوَيْنَـٰكُمْ إِنَّا كُنَّا غَـٰوِينَ
verses.text: We did misguide you, (because) we were ourselves erroneous”.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ
verses.text: So, that day, they will share each other in punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: This is how We deal with the criminals.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
verses.text: They were those to whom when it was said: “There is no god but Allah”, they waxed proud,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَّجْنُونٍۭ
verses.text: and used to say, “Are we really to leave our gods because of an insane poet?”

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ جَآءَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: No, he has come with Truth and has confirmed all the messengers (of Allah).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكُمْ لَذَآئِقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْأَلِيمِ
verses.text: Surely you have to taste the painful punishment,-

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: And you will be recompensed for nothing but for what you used to do-

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: unlike Allah’s chosen servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمْ رِزْقٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
verses.text: Those are the people for whom there is a known provision,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَٰكِهُ ۖ وَهُم مُّكْرَمُونَ
verses.text: the fruits; and they will be honored

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: in Gardens of Bliss

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
verses.text: facing each other on couches.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍۭ
verses.text: They will be served with a cup from a flowing drink,

verses.arabicUthmani: بَيْضَآءَ لَذَّةٍ لِّلشَّـٰرِبِينَ
verses.text: (that will be) white (and) delicious for those who drink.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ
verses.text: There will be no headache therein, nor will they be intoxicated with it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعِندَهُمْ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ عِينٌ
verses.text: and by their side there will be females restricting their gazes (to their husbands), having pretty big eyes,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيْضٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
verses.text: as if they were eggs hidden (under feathers, protected from pollution).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: Then they will turn to each other asking questions mutually.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌ
verses.text: A speaker from them will say, “I had a companion (in the worldly life)

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصَدِّقِينَ
verses.text: who used to say (to me), “Are you one of those who believe?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
verses.text: Is it when we have died and become dust and bones? Is it true that we are going to be recompensed (for our deeds)?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ
verses.text: He (the speaker) will say (to other people in Paradise) “Would you like to have a look (at Jahannam to find out what happened to that companion of mine)?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَءَاهُ فِى سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: So he will look and will see him in the middle of Jahannam.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرْدِينِ
verses.text: He (the speaker) will say (to his companion seen in Jahannam ), “By Allah, you were going almost to ruin me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْضَرِينَ
verses.text: But for the favor of my Lord, I would have been among those produced for punishment.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَيِّتِينَ
verses.text: (Then the speaker will address other people of Paradise in delight and wonder, saying,) “Are we not then to die anymore

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.text: beyond our first death, nor are we going to be punished?”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: This is, indeed, the great achievement.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِمِثْلِ هَـٰذَا فَلْيَعْمَلِ ٱلْعَـٰمِلُونَ
verses.text: For this kind (of achievement), all workers must work.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ نُّزُلًا أَمْ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
verses.text: Is that (blissful Paradise) better for hospitality or the tree of zaqqūm ?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَـٰهَا فِتْنَةً لِّلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: We have made it a test for the unjust.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِىٓ أَصْلِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: It is a tree that comes forth in the bottom of Jahannam.

verses.arabicUthmani: طَلْعُهَا كَأَنَّهُۥ رُءُوسُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ
verses.text: Its fruits are like the heads of devils.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
verses.text: So, they have to eat from it and have to fill their bellies with it.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًا مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ
verses.text: Then they will have, on top of it, a mixture made of boiling water.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ مَرْجِعَهُمْ لَإِلَى ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: Then, their final return is to the Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ أَلْفَوْا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ ضَآلِّينَ
verses.text: They found their fathers on the wrong path.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهُمْ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِمْ يُهْرَعُونَ
verses.text: So, they used to run in their footsteps.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ ضَلَّ قَبْلَهُمْ أَكْثَرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: Most of the earlier ones (too) had gone astray before them.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِم مُّنذِرِينَ
verses.text: We did send warners among them.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: So look, how was the end of those warned -

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except Allah’s chosen servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ نَادَىٰنَا نُوحٌ فَلَنِعْمَ ٱلْمُجِيبُونَ
verses.text: And NūH did call Us (for help after he was disappointed with his people), so (We accepted his prayer, as) We are the best to respond.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: And We delivered him and his family from the great agony,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُۥ هُمُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ
verses.text: and made his progeny the sole survivors (from the Deluge).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: And We left for him (a word of praise) among the later people, (that is):

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ نُوحٍ فِى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Salām be on NūH among (the people of) all the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Certainly, this is how We reward those who are good in their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: He was one of Our believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: Then, we drowned others.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.text: And certainly one of his adherents was Ibrāhīm.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
verses.text: (Remember) when he came to his Lord with a pure heart,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: when he said to his father and his people, “What is that which you worship?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَئِفْكًا ءَالِهَةً دُونَ ٱللَّهِ تُرِيدُونَ
verses.text: Do you wish (to have) fallacious gods other than Allah?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا ظَنُّكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Then, what do you think about the Lord of the worlds?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنَظَرَ نَظْرَةً فِى ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.text: Then, he cast a look at the stars,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ إِنِّى سَقِيمٌ
verses.text: and then said, “I feel indisposed”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ مُدْبِرِينَ
verses.text: So they went away from him, turning their backs.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمْ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: And he made his way to their ‘gods’ and said to them, “Why would you not eat?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: What is wrong with you that you do not speak?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَاغَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضَرْبًۢا بِٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: Then he attacked them striking with his right hand.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ يَزِفُّونَ
verses.text: Then, they (the idolaters) came to him rushing.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَتَعْبُدُونَ مَا تَنْحِتُونَ
verses.text: He said, “Do you worship what is carved by yourselves,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمْ وَمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: while Allah has created you and what you make?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ ٱبْنُوا۟ لَهُۥ بُنْيَـٰنًا فَأَلْقُوهُ فِى ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: They said, “Build for him a structure, and throw him into the blazing fire.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَرَادُوا۟ بِهِۦ كَيْدًا فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمُ ٱلْأَسْفَلِينَ
verses.text: So, they intended to bring harm to him, but We made them the lowest (by frustrating their plan).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ إِنِّى ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
verses.text: And he said, “I am going to my Lord. He will show me the way.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: O my Lord, bless me with a righteous son.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبَشَّرْنَـٰهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ حَلِيمٍ
verses.text: So, We gave him the good news of a forbearing boy.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعْىَ قَالَ يَـٰبُنَىَّ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰ فِى ٱلْمَنَامِ أَنِّىٓ أَذْبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَىٰ ۚ قَالَ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرُ ۖ سَتَجِدُنِىٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: Thereafter, when he (the boy) reached an age in which he could work with him, he (Ibrāhīm) said, “O my little son, I have seen in a dream that I am slaughtering you, so consider, what is your opinion?” He said, “O my dear father, do what you have been ordered to do. You will find me, inshā’allah , (if Allah wills) one of those who endure patiently.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّآ أَسْلَمَا وَتَلَّهُۥ لِلْجَبِينِ
verses.text: So, (it was a great episode) when both of them submitted themselves (to Allah’s will), and he laid him on his forehead (to slaughter him),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَـٰدَيْنَـٰهُ أَن يَـٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ
verses.text: and then We called out to him, “O Ibrāhīm,

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ صَدَّقْتَ ٱلرُّءْيَآ ۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: you did make the dream come true.” This is how We reward those who are good in their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْبَلَـٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: This was indeed a trial that clearly demonstrated (their obedience).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَدَيْنَـٰهُ بِذِبْحٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and We left for him (a word of praise) among the later people,

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.text: (that is,) “Salām be on Ibrāhīm!

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: This is how We reward those who are good in their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, he is among Our believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَشَّرْنَـٰهُ بِإِسْحَـٰقَ نَبِيًّا مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: And We gave him the good news of IsHāq (Isaac), a prophet from among the righteous.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَـٰرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ ۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحْسِنٌ وَظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ مُبِينٌ
verses.text: And We did bless him, and IsHāq. And among the progeny of both of them, some are good and some are utterly unjust to their own selves.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We bestowed favors upon Mūsā and Hārūn,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُمَا وَقَوْمَهُمَا مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: and We delivered them and their people from the great agony,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَصَرْنَـٰهُمْ فَكَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
verses.text: and We helped them, so they became victors,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمَا ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ٱلْمُسْتَبِينَ
verses.text: and We gave them the clear book,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُمَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ
verses.text: and guided them to the straight path.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِمَا فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: And We left for them (a word of praise) among the later people,

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ
verses.text: (that is,) Salām be on Mūsā and Hārūn!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: This is how We reward those who are good in their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, both of them were among Our believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ إِلْيَاسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And surely, Ilyās is one of the messengers.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when he said to his people: “Do you not fear Allah?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَدْعُونَ بَعْلًا وَتَذَرُونَ أَحْسَنَ ٱلْخَـٰلِقِينَ
verses.text: Do you invoke Ba‘l, and ignore the Best of the creators,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ وَرَبَّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: that is, Allah who is your Lord and the Lord of your forefathers?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: Then they rejected him. Therefore, they will be arraigned -

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except Allah’s chosen servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: And We left for him (a word of praise) among the later people,

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِلْ يَاسِينَ
verses.text: (that is,) “Salām on Ilyāsīn (Ilyās).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: This is how We reward those who are good in their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely, he was from among Our believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لُوطًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And surely, LūT is one of the messengers.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ نَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when We saved him and his family, all of them,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عَجُوزًا فِى ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: except an old woman among those remaining behind.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: After that, We destroyed others

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّكُمْ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيْهِم مُّصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: and you do pass by them at daybreak

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبِٱلَّيْلِ ۗ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: and by nightfall. Would you still not understand?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ يُونُسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And surely, Yūnus (Jonah) is from among the messengers.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ أَبَقَ إِلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
verses.text: (Remember) when he ran away towards the boat that was already loaded.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُدْحَضِينَ
verses.text: Then he participated in drawing lots (to offload one of the passengers) and was the one who was defeated.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْتَقَمَهُ ٱلْحُوتُ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
verses.text: Then the fish swallowed him while he was reproaching his own self.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَوْلَآ أَنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
verses.text: Had he not been of those who proclaim Allah’s purity,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَلَبِثَ فِى بَطْنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: he would have definitely lived in its belly till the day when the dead will be raised.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ سَقِيمٌ
verses.text: Then We cast him ashore in the open while he was ill,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنۢبَتْنَا عَلَيْهِ شَجَرَةً مِّن يَقْطِينٍ
verses.text: and We caused a tree of ourds to grow over him.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِا۟ئَةِ أَلْفٍ أَوْ يَزِيدُونَ
verses.text: And We had sent him (as messenger) to one hundred thousand, or more.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَـَٔامَنُوا۟ فَمَتَّعْنَـٰهُمْ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: So, they believed, then, We let them enjoy for a time.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَلِرَبِّكَ ٱلْبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
verses.text: So ask them, “Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَـٰثًا وَهُمْ شَـٰهِدُونَ
verses.text: Or, had We created angels as females while they were witnessing?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنْ إِفْكِهِمْ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.text: Beware! They are the ones who, by way of a lie of theirs, (have the audacity to) say,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَدَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: “Allah has children” - and they are absolute liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَصْطَفَى ٱلْبَنَاتِ عَلَى ٱلْبَنِينَ
verses.text: Is it that Allah has chosen daughters (for Himself) instead of sons?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: What is the matter with you? How (arbitrarily) do you judge?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Then, is it that you do not think about it?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ سُلْطَـٰنٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Or, is it that there is some open authority with you?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأْتُوا۟ بِكِتَـٰبِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Then bring your book, if you are truthful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلُوا۟ بَيْنَهُۥ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ نَسَبًا ۚ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلْجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: And they have made up between Him (Allah) and the Jinns some kinship, while the Jinns already know that they are bound to be seized.-

verses.arabicUthmani: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.text: -Pure is Allah from what they describe-

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except Allah’s chosen servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: So, you and those whom you worship,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَنتُمْ عَلَيْهِ بِفَـٰتِنِينَ
verses.text: none of you can make anyone turn away from Him (Allah),

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ هُوَ صَالِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: except him who is to burn in Jahannam.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
verses.text: And (the angels say,) “There is no one among us who does not have a known station,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلصَّآفُّونَ
verses.text: and We, surely We, are those who stand in rows

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْمُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.text: and We, surely We, are those who proclaim Allah’s purity.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن كَانُوا۟ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.text: And they (the pagans) used to say,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوْ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكْرًا مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: “Had there been a scripture with us like that of the former people,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَكُنَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: we would have certainly been Allah’s chosen servants.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَفَرُوا۟ بِهِۦ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Then (once the divine book came to them,) they disbelieved in it. So, very soon they will come to know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ سَبَقَتْ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And Our Word has already come to pass in favor of Our servants, the messengers

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ لَهُمُ ٱلْمَنصُورُونَ
verses.text: (that) they are the ones who will be supported,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ جُندَنَا لَهُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ
verses.text: and verily it is Our army (of chosen servants) that prevails.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: So, withdraw your attention from them for some time.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَبْصِرْهُمْ فَسَوْفَ يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: But, watch them. They shall soon see (the reality).

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: Are they asking for Our punishment to come sooner?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمْ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: So, when it will descend in their courtyard, then, evil will be the morning of those warned.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: So, withdraw your attention from them for some time,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَبْصِرْ فَسَوْفَ يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and watch. They shall soon see (the reality).

verses.arabicUthmani: سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.text: Pure is your Lord, the Lord of all might and honor, from what they describe

verses.arabicUthmani: وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَى ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: and Salām be on the messengers

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: and praised is Allah, the Lord of all the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: صٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ذِى ٱلذِّكْرِ
verses.text: Sād . I swear by the Qur’ān, (the book) containing advice, (this is true,)

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى عِزَّةٍ وَشِقَاقٍ
verses.text: but those who disbelieve are (involved) in false pride and opposition.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
verses.text: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, so they cried out (for mercy), while no time was left for having any refuge.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ ۖ وَقَالَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا سَـٰحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ
verses.text: They (the pagans) wonder that a warner has come to them from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, “This is a magician, a sheer liar.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْـَٔالِهَةَ إِلَـٰهًا وَٰحِدًا ۖ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌ
verses.text: Has he (not) turned all the gods into a single God? It is a very strange thing indeed.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱمْشُوا۟ وَٱصْبِرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ يُرَادُ
verses.text: And the leaders among them walked out saying (to their followers), “Walk away (from the Prophet,) and stay firm on (adhering to) your gods. This (call of the Prophet) is surely something designed (for his personal benefit).

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا سَمِعْنَا بِهَـٰذَا فِى ٱلْمِلَّةِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخْتِلَـٰقٌ
verses.text: We never heard of it in the classical faith (of ours). This is nothing but a false invention.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّن ذِكْرِى ۖ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِ
verses.text: Is it (believable) that the message of advice has been sent down to him (alone) from among all of us?” The fact is that they are in doubt about My message; rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْوَهَّابِ
verses.text: Do they have the treasures of the mercy of your Lord, the Mighty, the Bountiful?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُم مُّلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ فَلْيَرْتَقُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَسْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: Or do they have the ownership of the heavens and the earth and what lies between them? Then let them ascend (to the sky) by ropes.

verses.arabicUthmani: جُندٌ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ
verses.text: What is there (in Makkah) is just a host of the (opposing) groups that has to be defeated.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
verses.text: Even before them, the people of NūH and ‘Ād and Fir‘aun (Pharaoh), the man of stakes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ
verses.text: and Thamūd and the people of LūT and the people of Aaikah have rejected (the messengers). They were the (strong) groups.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
verses.text: All of them did nothing but declare the messengers as liars; hence, My punishment became due.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍ
verses.text: And these people are waiting for nothing but for a single Cry (the sound of the Trumpet to be blown on Doomsday) that will have no pause.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: And they say, “O our Lord, give us our share (of the punishment) sooner, before the Day of Reckoning.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلْأَيْدِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: Bear patiently with what they say, and remember Our servant Dawūd, the man of might. Surely he was ever-turning to Allah.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا سَخَّرْنَا ٱلْجِبَالَ مَعَهُۥ يُسَبِّحْنَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِشْرَاقِ
verses.text: We had subjugated the mountains to join him (in) making tasbīH (i.e. pronouncing Allah’s purity) at evening and sunrise,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلطَّيْرَ مَحْشُورَةً ۖ كُلٌّ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: and the birds as well, mustered together. All were turning to Allah with him.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَشَدَدْنَا مُلْكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَفَصْلَ ٱلْخِطَابِ
verses.text: And We made his kingdom strong, and gave him wisdom and decisive speech.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَصْمِ إِذْ تَسَوَّرُوا۟ ٱلْمِحْرَابَ
verses.text: Has there come to you the story of the litigants, when they entered the sanctuary by climbing over the wall?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ دَاوُۥدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنْهُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ خَصْمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعْضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تُشْطِطْ وَٱهْدِنَآ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ
verses.text: When they entered upon Dawūd, and he was scared of them, they said, “Be not scared. We are two litigants; one of us has wronged the other, so decide between us with truth, and do not cross the limits, and guide us to the right path.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَآ أَخِى لَهُۥ تِسْعٌ وَتِسْعُونَ نَعْجَةً وَلِىَ نَعْجَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ فَقَالَ أَكْفِلْنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِى فِى ٱلْخِطَابِ
verses.text: This is my brother; he has ninety nine ewes, and I have a single ewe; still he said, ‘Give it into my charge.’ And he overpowered me in speech.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لَقَدْ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعْجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِۦ ۖ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرًا مِّنَ ٱلْخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبْغِى بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَقَلِيلٌ مَّا هُمْ ۗ وَظَنَّ دَاوُۥدُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّـٰهُ فَٱسْتَغْفَرَ رَبَّهُۥ وَخَرَّ رَاكِعًا وَأَنَابَ ۩
verses.text: He (Dawūd) said, “He has certainly wronged you by demanding your ewe to be added to his ewe. Many partners oppress one another, except those who believe and do righteous deeds, and very few they are.” And Dawūd realized that We had put him to a test, so he prayed to his Lord for forgiveness, and bowing down, he fell in prostration, and turned (to Allah).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَغَفَرْنَا لَهُۥ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
verses.text: So we forgave him that (lapse), and surely he has a place of nearness in Our presence, and an excellent resort.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰدَاوُۥدُ إِنَّا جَعَلْنَـٰكَ خَلِيفَةً فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ شَدِيدٌۢ بِمَا نَسُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: O Dawūd, We have made you a vicegerent on earth, so judge between people with truth, and do not follow the selfish desire, lest it should lead you astray from Allah’s path. Surely those who go astray from Allah’s path will have a severe punishment, because they had forgotten the Day of Reckoning.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا بَـٰطِلًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ظَنُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۚ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: We did not create the heavens and the earth and what is between them in vain. That is the thinking of those who disbelieve. So, woe to the disbelievers because of the Fire (they have to face).

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ كَٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلْفُجَّارِ
verses.text: Shall We make those who believe and do righteous deeds equal to those who commit mischief on the earth? Or shall We make the God-fearing equal to the sinners?

verses.arabicUthmani: كِتَـٰبٌ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَـٰرَكٌ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: This is a blessed Book We have revealed to you, so that they deliberate in its verses, and so that the men of understanding may heed to advice.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَهَبْنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيْمَـٰنَ ۚ نِعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: And We blessed Dawūd with Sulaimān. He was an excellent servant (of Allah). Surely, he was great in turning (to Us, in penitence and praise).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ عُرِضَ عَلَيْهِ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ ٱلصَّـٰفِنَـٰتُ ٱلْجِيَادُ
verses.text: (Worth remembering is the incident) when the swift horses of high breeding were presented before him in the evening.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ
verses.text: He said, “I held the love of the good things (i.e. these horses) because of the remembrance of my Lord.” until it went behind the veil.

verses.arabicUthmani: رُدُّوهَا عَلَىَّ ۖ فَطَفِقَ مَسْحًۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلْأَعْنَاقِ
verses.text: (Then he said,) “Bring them back to me” - and he started passing his hands over the shanks and the necks (of the horses).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمَـٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
verses.text: And indeed We tested Sulaimān while We threw on his throne a body after which he turned (to Us).

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
verses.text: He said, “O my Lord, forgive me, and bless me with a kingdom that will not be available to anyone after me. Surely, You are the Bountiful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ
verses.text: Then We subjugated the wind for him that blew smoothly on his command to wherever he wished,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءٍ وَغَوَّاصٍ
verses.text: and (We subjugated to him) the devils (among Jinns), all builders and divers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِى ٱلْأَصْفَادِ
verses.text: and many others held in chains.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمْنُنْ أَوْ أَمْسِكْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
verses.text: This is Our gift. So, do favor (to someone) or withhold (it), with no (requirement to give) account.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
verses.text: He has a place of nearness in Our presence, and an excellent end.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
verses.text: And remember Our servant, Ayyūb - when he called his Lord saying, “The ShaiTān (Satan) has inflicted weariness and pain upon me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱرْكُضْ بِرِجْلِكَ ۖ هَـٰذَا مُغْتَسَلٌۢ بَارِدٌ وَشَرَابٌ
verses.text: (Allah said to him,) “Strike (the ground) with your foot: Here is a cool water to bathe, and a drink!”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: And We let him have his family and the like of them besides, as a mercy from Us, and a reminder for the people of understanding.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ ۗ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَـٰهُ صَابِرًا ۚ نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: And (We said to him,) “Take (a bundle of) thin twigs in your hand, and strike with it, and do not violate your oath. Surely, We found him very enduring. He was really an excellent servant. Surely, he was great in turning (to Us, in penitence and praise).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ عِبَـٰدَنَآ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْحَـٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ أُو۟لِى ٱلْأَيْدِى وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرِ
verses.text: And remember Our servants - Ibrāhīm and IsHāq and Ya‘qūb - the men of strength and the men of vision.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَخْلَصْنَـٰهُم بِخَالِصَةٍ ذِكْرَى ٱلدَّارِ
verses.text: We chose them for a trait of remembering the (eternal) Home (in the Hereafter).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُمْ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصْطَفَيْنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ
verses.text: And surely they are, in Our sight, among the chosen, the best of the righteous.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ إِسْمَـٰعِيلَ وَٱلْيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ ۖ وَكُلٌّ مِّنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ
verses.text: And remember Ismā‘īl and Al-Yasa‘ and Dhul-Kifl. Each one of them was among the best of the righteous.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا ذِكْرٌ ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
verses.text: This is a reminder (of what has passed). And surely the God-fearing will have the best place to return:

verses.arabicUthmani: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ مُّفَتَّحَةً لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَبْوَٰبُ
verses.text: - everlasting gardens, with (their) doors opened for them.

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَـٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ وَشَرَابٍ
verses.text: They will be relaxing in it, calling there for plenteous fruits and drinks;

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَعِندَهُمْ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ أَتْرَابٌ
verses.text: and in their company there will be females restricting their glances (to their husbands, and) of matching ages.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: This is what you are being promised for the Day of Reckoning.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ
verses.text: Surely, that is provision provided by Us, to which there is no end.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّـٰغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابٍ
verses.text: Having said this, the transgressors will surely have the most evil place to return:

verses.arabicUthmani: جَهَنَّمَ يَصْلَوْنَهَا فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمِهَادُ
verses.text: the Jahannam , in which they will enter. So, how evil is that place to rest?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا فَلْيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٌ وَغَسَّاقٌ
verses.text: Let them taste this: hot water and pus,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكْلِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجٌ
verses.text: and other things similar to it of various kinds.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا فَوْجٌ مُّقْتَحِمٌ مَّعَكُمْ ۖ لَا مَرْحَبًۢا بِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ صَالُوا۟ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: (When the leaders of the infidels will see their followers entering the Hell after them, they will say to each other,) “This is a multitude rushing into (the Hell) with you - they are not welcome - they are to burn in the Fire.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ أَنتُمْ لَا مَرْحَبًۢا بِكُمْ ۖ أَنتُمْ قَدَّمْتُمُوهُ لَنَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرَارُ
verses.text: They (the followers) will say (to their leaders) “No, it is you who are not welcome; you are the ones who brought this upon us.” So, how evil is the place to stay (for ever)!”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَـٰذَا فَزِدْهُ عَذَابًا ضِعْفًا فِى ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: They (the followers) will say, “Our Lord, whoever has brought this on us, do increase his punishment twofold in the Fire.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالًا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ
verses.text: And they (the infidels) will say, “What is the matter with us that we do not see those men (here in Hell) whom we used to count amongst the worst? (i.e the Muslims whom the infidels used to treat as the worst people among them)

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَّخَذْنَـٰهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا أَمْ زَاغَتْ عَنْهُمُ ٱلْأَبْصَـٰرُ
verses.text: Had we taken them as a laughing-stock (unjustly), or have our eyes missed them?”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقٌّ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: That is going to happen definitely, that is, the mutual quarrel of the people of the Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرٌ ۖ وَمَا مِنْ إِلَـٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ
verses.text: Say, “I am only a warner, and there is no god but Allah, the One, the All-Dominant,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّـٰرُ
verses.text: the Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, the Mighty, the Very-Forgiving.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ نَبَؤٌا۟ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: Say, “It is a great news

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنتُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ
verses.text: to which you are averse.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا كَانَ لِىَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۭ بِٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰٓ إِذْ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: I had no knowledge of the Heavenly Beings when they were debating (about the creation of ’Ādam).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Revelation is sent to me only because I am a plain warner.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَـٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن طِينٍ
verses.text: When your Lord said to the angels, “I am going to create man from clay.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَـٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: So, once I make him perfectly and breath My spirit into him, you must fall down in prostration before him.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
verses.text: Then, the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together -

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ ٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: except Iblīs (Satan). He waxed proud, and became one of the disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ ۖ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
verses.text: He (Allah) said, “O Iblīs, what did prevent you from prostrating yourself before what I created with My hands? Did you wax proud or were you among the lofty ones?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ ۖ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
verses.text: He said, “I am better than him. You created me from fire, and created him from clay.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
verses.text: He said, “Then, get out from here, for you are accursed,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ لَعْنَتِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: and on you shall remain My curse till the Day of Judgment.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: He said, “O my Lord, then give me respite till the day they are raised again.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Then, you have been given respite,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
verses.text: until the Day of the Appointed Time.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Then, I swear by Your Might, that I will definitely lead them astray, all of them -

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except Your chosen servants among them.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَٱلْحَقُّ وَٱلْحَقَّ أَقُولُ
verses.text: He (Allah) said, “Then, the truth is-and it is (always) the truth that I speak-

verses.arabicUthmani: لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: that I will definitely fill the Jahannam with you and with those who will follow you from among them, all together.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
verses.text: Say (O Prophet to the unbelievers,) “I do not demand from you any fee for it, nor am I from among those who make up things artificially.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It is nothing but an advice for all the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعْدَ حِينٍۭ
verses.text: And you will come to know its reality after a while.”

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِيلُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: This is the revelation of the Book from Allah, the Mighty, the Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَٱعْبُدِ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصًا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
verses.text: Surely We have revealed the Book to you with truth; so worship Allah making your submission exclusive for Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَا لِلَّهِ ٱلدِّينُ ٱلْخَالِصُ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ مَا نَعْبُدُهُمْ إِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُونَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ زُلْفَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَهُمْ فِى مَا هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَنْ هُوَ كَـٰذِبٌ كَفَّارٌ
verses.text: Remember, Allah alone deserves the exclusive submission. As for those who have adopted guardians other than Him (saying), “We worship them for no other reason but because they would bring us near to Allah closely”, Allah will judge between them in the matters in which they are differing. Surely, Allah does not guide anyone who is liar, highly infidel.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّوْ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا لَّٱصْطَفَىٰ مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥ ۖ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ
verses.text: Had Allah opted to have a son of His own, He would have definitely chosen anyone, as He wished, out of what He had created. (But), Pure is He. He is Allah, the Only One, the All-Dominant.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ يُكَوِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ عَلَى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُكَوِّرُ ٱلنَّهَارَ عَلَى ٱلَّيْلِ ۖ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ ۖ كُلٌّ يَجْرِى لِأَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۗ أَلَا هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّـٰرُ
verses.text: He created the heavens and the earth for just purpose. He wraps the night over the day and He wraps the day over the night, and He has put the sun and the moon under His command, each one of them moving for an appointed term. Remember, He is the Mighty, the Most-Forgiving.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفْسٍ وَٰحِدَةٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ ثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَزْوَٰجٍ ۚ يَخْلُقُكُمْ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَـٰتِكُمْ خَلْقًا مِّنۢ بَعْدِ خَلْقٍ فِى ظُلُمَـٰتٍ ثَلَـٰثٍ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ ۖ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُصْرَفُونَ
verses.text: He created you from a single person, then (once this person was created,) He made his match from him, and sent down for you eight pairs of the cattle. He creates you in the wombs of your mothers, creation after creation, in three layers of darkness. That is your Allah, your Lord. To Him belongs the whole Kingdom. There is no god but He. Then, to where are you being diverted (by your whims)?
