verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا لَعِبٌ وَلَهْوٌ ۚ وَإِن تُؤْمِنُوا۟ وَتَتَّقُوا۟ يُؤْتِكُمْ أُجُورَكُمْ وَلَا يَسْـَٔلْكُمْ أَمْوَٰلَكُمْ
verses.text: The worldly life is but play and pastime. If you believe and be God-fearing, He will give you your rewards, and will not ask you your riches.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن يَسْـَٔلْكُمُوهَا فَيُحْفِكُمْ تَبْخَلُوا۟ وَيُخْرِجْ أَضْغَـٰنَكُمْ
verses.text: If He were to ask you of it, and press you (to spend all your wealth), you would show miserliness, and He would expose your disgusts.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰٓأَنتُمْ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ تُدْعَوْنَ لِتُنفِقُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَمِنكُم مَّن يَبْخَلُ ۖ وَمَن يَبْخَلْ فَإِنَّمَا يَبْخَلُ عَن نَّفْسِهِۦ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ٱلْغَنِىُّ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلْفُقَرَآءُ ۚ وَإِن تَتَوَلَّوْا۟ يَسْتَبْدِلْ قَوْمًا غَيْرَكُمْ ثُمَّ لَا يَكُونُوٓا۟ أَمْثَـٰلَكُم
verses.text: Yes, you are such that you are called upon to spend in Allah’s way, but some of you withhold in miserliness- and he who withholds in miserliness withholds against himself- and Allah is the Need-Free, and you are the needy. And if you turn away, He will replace you by some other people, then they will not be like you.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا فَتَحْنَا لَكَ فَتْحًا مُّبِينًا
verses.text: Surely, We have granted you an open victory,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّيَغْفِرَ لَكَ ٱللَّهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِن ذَنۢبِكَ وَمَا تَأَخَّرَ وَيُتِمَّ نِعْمَتَهُۥ عَلَيْكَ وَيَهْدِيَكَ صِرَٰطًا مُّسْتَقِيمًا
verses.text: so that Allah may forgive you of your previous and subsequent faults, and may complete His favour upon you, and may guide you to a straight path,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَنصُرَكَ ٱللَّهُ نَصْرًا عَزِيزًا
verses.text: and so that Allah may support you with a mighty support.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ لِيَزْدَادُوٓا۟ إِيمَـٰنًا مَّعَ إِيمَـٰنِهِمْ ۗ وَلِلَّهِ جُنُودُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
verses.text: He (Allah) is such that He sent down tranquility into the hearts of the believers, so that they grow more in faith in addition to their (existing) faith- And to Allah belong the forces of the heavens and the earth, and Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise-

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّيُدْخِلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا وَيُكَفِّرَ عَنْهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ ۚ وَكَانَ ذَٰلِكَ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ فَوْزًا عَظِيمًا
verses.text: so that He admits believing men and believing women to the gardens beneath which rivers flow, to live therein for ever, and so that He may write off their evil deeds, which is a great achievement in Allah’s sight,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُعَذِّبَ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقَـٰتِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ وَٱلْمُشْرِكَـٰتِ ٱلظَّآنِّينَ بِٱللَّهِ ظَنَّ ٱلسَّوْءِ ۚ عَلَيْهِمْ دَآئِرَةُ ٱلسَّوْءِ ۖ وَغَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَعَنَهُمْ وَأَعَدَّ لَهُمْ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ وَسَآءَتْ مَصِيرًا
verses.text: and so that He may punish the hypocrites, men and women, and the mushriks (polytheists), men and women, who think evil thoughts about Allah. Bound for them there is a vicious circle, and Allah has become angry with them, and He has prepared Jahannam (Hell) for them, and it is an evil destination.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِلَّهِ جُنُودُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا
verses.text: To Allah belong the forces of the heavens and the earth, and Allah is All-Mighty, All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَـٰكَ شَـٰهِدًا وَمُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا
verses.text: Indeed, We have sent you (O prophet,) as a witness and as a bearer of good news and as a warner,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُعَزِّرُوهُ وَتُوَقِّرُوهُ وَتُسَبِّحُوهُ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
verses.text: so that you (O people,) believe in Allah and His Messenger, and support him and revere him, and pronounce His (Allah’s) purity morning and evening.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ يَدُ ٱللَّهِ فَوْقَ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۚ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَنْ أَوْفَىٰ بِمَا عَـٰهَدَ عَلَيْهُ ٱللَّهَ فَسَيُؤْتِيهِ أَجْرًا عَظِيمًا
verses.text: Those who pledge allegiance with you (by placing their hands in your hand)- they, in fact, pledge allegiance with Allah. Allah’s hand is over their hands. Then, whoever breaks his pledge breaks it to his own detriment, and whoever fulfils the covenant he has made with Allah, He will give him a great reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَقُولُ لَكَ ٱلْمُخَلَّفُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَعْرَابِ شَغَلَتْنَآ أَمْوَٰلُنَا وَأَهْلُونَا فَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لَنَا ۚ يَقُولُونَ بِأَلْسِنَتِهِم مَّا لَيْسَ فِى قُلُوبِهِمْ ۚ قُلْ فَمَن يَمْلِكُ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا إِنْ أَرَادَ بِكُمْ ضَرًّا أَوْ أَرَادَ بِكُمْ نَفْعًۢا ۚ بَلْ كَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرًۢا
verses.text: Those of the Bedouins who remained behind will say to you, “Our possessions and our families kept us busy, (hence we could not accompany you in your journey to Hudaibiyah). So, pray to Allah for our forgiveness.” They say with their tongues what is not in their hearts.Say, “Then, who has power to help you in any thing against Allah, if He intends to do you harm, or intends to do you good? Rather, Allah is fully aware of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَنقَلِبَ ٱلرَّسُولُ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِيهِمْ أَبَدًا وَزُيِّنَ ذَٰلِكَ فِى قُلُوبِكُمْ وَظَنَنتُمْ ظَنَّ ٱلسَّوْءِ وَكُنتُمْ قَوْمًۢا بُورًا
verses.text: But you thought that the Messenger and the believers would never ever return to their families, and it seemed good to your hearts, and you thought an evil thought and became a people who are ruined (by their selfishness).”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن لَّمْ يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ فَإِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَعِيرًا
verses.text: If one does not believe in Allah and His Messenger, then We have prepared a blazing fire for the disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِلَّهِ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ يَغْفِرُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيُعَذِّبُ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
verses.text: To Allah belongs the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. He forgives whomsoever He wills, and punishes whomsoever He wills. And Allah is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَقُولُ ٱلْمُخَلَّفُونَ إِذَا ٱنطَلَقْتُمْ إِلَىٰ مَغَانِمَ لِتَأْخُذُوهَا ذَرُونَا نَتَّبِعْكُمْ ۖ يُرِيدُونَ أَن يُبَدِّلُوا۟ كَلَـٰمَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قُل لَّن تَتَّبِعُونَا كَذَٰلِكُمْ قَالَ ٱللَّهُ مِن قَبْلُ ۖ فَسَيَقُولُونَ بَلْ تَحْسُدُونَنَا ۚ بَلْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
verses.text: Those who remained behind will say, when you will proceed to the spoils (of war) to receive them, “Let us follow you.”They wish to change the words of Allah. Say, “You shall not follow us. Allah had said like this beforehand.” Then they will say, “No, but you are jealous of us.” On the contrary, they do not understand (the reality) but a little.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُل لِّلْمُخَلَّفِينَ مِنَ ٱلْأَعْرَابِ سَتُدْعَوْنَ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ أُو۟لِى بَأْسٍ شَدِيدٍ تُقَـٰتِلُونَهُمْ أَوْ يُسْلِمُونَ ۖ فَإِن تُطِيعُوا۟ يُؤْتِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ أَجْرًا حَسَنًا ۖ وَإِن تَتَوَلَّوْا۟ كَمَا تَوَلَّيْتُم مِّن قَبْلُ يُعَذِّبْكُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.text: Say to those of the Bedouins who remained behind, “You will be called against a people possessed of strong fighting power; you will have to fight them until they submit. So if you obey, Allah will give you a good reward, and if you turn away, as you had turned away earlier, He will punish you with a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّيْسَ عَلَى ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ حَرَجٌ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلْأَعْرَجِ حَرَجٌ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلْمَرِيضِ حَرَجٌ ۗ وَمَن يُطِعِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ يُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۖ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ يُعَذِّبْهُ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.text: There is no blame on the blind, nor is there any blame on the lame, nor is there any blame on the sick. Whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger, He will admit him to the gardens beneath which rivers flow. But whoever turns away, He will punish him with a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ لَّقَدْ رَضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِذْ يُبَايِعُونَكَ تَحْتَ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ فَعَلِمَ مَا فِى قُلُوبِهِمْ فَأَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَأَثَـٰبَهُمْ فَتْحًا قَرِيبًا
verses.text: Allah was pleased with the believers when they were pledging allegiance with you (by placing their hands in your hands) under the tree, and He knew what was in their hearts, so He sent down tranquility upon them, and rewarded them with a victory, near at hand,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَغَانِمَ كَثِيرَةً يَأْخُذُونَهَا ۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا
verses.text: and many spoils that they would receive. And Allah is Mighty, Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعَدَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَغَانِمَ كَثِيرَةً تَأْخُذُونَهَا فَعَجَّلَ لَكُمْ هَـٰذِهِۦ وَكَفَّ أَيْدِىَ ٱلنَّاسِ عَنكُمْ وَلِتَكُونَ ءَايَةً لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَيَهْدِيَكُمْ صِرَٰطًا مُّسْتَقِيمًا
verses.text: Allah had promised you many spoils that you would receive, so He gave these to you sooner, and stopped the hands of the people from (harming) you. And (He did this) so that it becomes a sign for believers, and so that He guides you to the right path.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُخْرَىٰ لَمْ تَقْدِرُوا۟ عَلَيْهَا قَدْ أَحَاطَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرًا
verses.text: And (there is) another (victory) that has not come within your power as yet, (but) Allah has encompassed it. And Allah is Powerful over every thing.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ قَـٰتَلَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوَلَّوُا۟ ٱلْأَدْبَـٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يَجِدُونَ وَلِيًّا وَلَا نَصِيرًا
verses.text: Had the disbelievers fought you, they would have certainly turned their backs, then they would have found neither a supporter nor a helper-

verses.arabicUthmani: سُنَّةَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِى قَدْ خَلَتْ مِن قَبْلُ ۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّةِ ٱللَّهِ تَبْدِيلًا
verses.text: - according to the consistent practice of Allah that went on since before, and you will never find a change in Allah’s consistent practice.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى كَفَّ أَيْدِيَهُمْ عَنكُمْ وَأَيْدِيَكُمْ عَنْهُم بِبَطْنِ مَكَّةَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَنْ أَظْفَرَكُمْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
verses.text: And He is the One who restrained their hands from you and your hands from them in the valley of Makkah after He had let you prevail over them, and Allah is watchful over what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَصَدُّوكُمْ عَنِ ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلْحَرَامِ وَٱلْهَدْىَ مَعْكُوفًا أَن يَبْلُغَ مَحِلَّهُۥ ۚ وَلَوْلَا رِجَالٌ مُّؤْمِنُونَ وَنِسَآءٌ مُّؤْمِنَـٰتٌ لَّمْ تَعْلَمُوهُمْ أَن تَطَـُٔوهُمْ فَتُصِيبَكُم مِّنْهُم مَّعَرَّةٌۢ بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ ۖ لِّيُدْخِلَ ٱللَّهُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ لَوْ تَزَيَّلُوا۟ لَعَذَّبْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.text: They are those who disbelieved and prevented you from the Sacred Mosque (Al-Masjid-ul-Harām ), and (prevented) the sacrificial animals that were detained from reaching their due place. And (Allah would have allowed you to fight,) had there not been believing men and believing women whom you did not know that you might have trampled them, and thus a painful situation might have arisen for you because of them unknowingly; (This situation was avoided) so that Allah may admit to His mercy whom He wills.And if they (the believing men and women) had moved (from Makkah), We would surely have punished those of them who disbelieved with a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ جَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلْحَمِيَّةَ حَمِيَّةَ ٱلْجَـٰهِلِيَّةِ فَأَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ سَكِينَتَهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ وَعَلَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَأَلْزَمَهُمْ كَلِمَةَ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَكَانُوٓا۟ أَحَقَّ بِهَا وَأَهْلَهَا ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمًا
verses.text: When the disbelievers developed in their hearts indignation, the indignation of ignorance; then Allah sent down tranquility from Himself upon His Messenger and upon the believers, and made them stick to the word of piety, and they were very much entitled to it and competent for it. And Allah is All-Knowing about every thing.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّقَدْ صَدَقَ ٱللَّهُ رَسُولَهُ ٱلرُّءْيَا بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ لَتَدْخُلُنَّ ٱلْمَسْجِدَ ٱلْحَرَامَ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ءَامِنِينَ مُحَلِّقِينَ رُءُوسَكُمْ وَمُقَصِّرِينَ لَا تَخَافُونَ ۖ فَعَلِمَ مَا لَمْ تَعْلَمُوا۟ فَجَعَلَ مِن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ فَتْحًا قَرِيبًا
verses.text: Indeed, Allah has made true to His Messenger the dream (shown) with truth: You will definitely enter the Sacred Mosque inshā’allāh (if Allah wills,) peacefully, with your heads shaved, and your hairs cut short, having no fear. So He knew what you did not know, and He assigned before that a victory, near at hand.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلْحَقِّ لِيُظْهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦ ۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِٱللَّهِ شَهِيدًا
verses.text: He is the One who has sent His Messenger with Guidance and the religion of truth, so that He makes it prevail over all religions. And enough is Allah for being a witness (to His promise).

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّحَمَّدٌ رَّسُولُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ أَشِدَّآءُ عَلَى ٱلْكُفَّارِ رُحَمَآءُ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ تَرَىٰهُمْ رُكَّعًا سُجَّدًا يَبْتَغُونَ فَضْلًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنًا ۖ سِيمَاهُمْ فِى وُجُوهِهِم مِّنْ أَثَرِ ٱلسُّجُودِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ مَثَلُهُمْ فِى ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةِ ۚ وَمَثَلُهُمْ فِى ٱلْإِنجِيلِ كَزَرْعٍ أَخْرَجَ شَطْـَٔهُۥ فَـَٔازَرَهُۥ فَٱسْتَغْلَظَ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَىٰ سُوقِهِۦ يُعْجِبُ ٱلزُّرَّاعَ لِيَغِيظَ بِهِمُ ٱلْكُفَّارَ ۗ وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ مِنْهُم مَّغْفِرَةً وَأَجْرًا عَظِيمًۢا
verses.text: Muhammad(ﷺ) is the messenger of Allah, and those who are with him are hard on the disbelievers, compassionate among themselves; you will see them bowing down in Rukū‘, prostrating themselves in Sajdah, seeking grace from Allah, and (His) good pleasure; their distinguishing feature is on their faces from the effect of Sajdah (prostration). This is their description in Torah; and their description in Injīl is: like a sown crop that brings forth its shoot, then makes it strong, then it grows thick and stands straight on its stem, looking good to the farmers, so that He may enrage the disbelievers through them. Allah has promised forgiveness and a huge reward to those of them who believe and do good deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىِ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: O you who believe, do not proceed ahead of Allah and His Messenger, and fear Allah. Surely Allah is All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَرْفَعُوٓا۟ أَصْوَٰتَكُمْ فَوْقَ صَوْتِ ٱلنَّبِىِّ وَلَا تَجْهَرُوا۟ لَهُۥ بِٱلْقَوْلِ كَجَهْرِ بَعْضِكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ أَن تَحْبَطَ أَعْمَـٰلُكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: O you who believe, do not raise your voices above the voice of the Prophet, and be not loud when speaking to him, as you are loud when speaking to one another, lest your good deeds should become void while you are not aware.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَغُضُّونَ أَصْوَٰتَهُمْ عِندَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱمْتَحَنَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمْ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ ۚ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌ وَأَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: Surely, those who lower their voices before Allah’s Messenger are the ones whose hearts Allah has tested for piety; for them there is forgiveness, and a great reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُنَادُونَكَ مِن وَرَآءِ ٱلْحُجُرَٰتِ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: As for those who call you from behind the chambers, most of them have no sense.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ صَبَرُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ تَخْرُجَ إِلَيْهِمْ لَكَانَ خَيْرًا لَّهُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: Had they remained patient until you come out to them, it would have been much better for them. And Allah is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِن جَآءَكُمْ فَاسِقٌۢ بِنَبَإٍ فَتَبَيَّنُوٓا۟ أَن تُصِيبُوا۟ قَوْمًۢا بِجَهَـٰلَةٍ فَتُصْبِحُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَعَلْتُمْ نَـٰدِمِينَ
verses.text: O you who believe, if a sinful person brings you a report, verify its correctness, lest you should harm a people out of ignorance, and then become remorseful on what you did.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ فِيكُمْ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ لَوْ يُطِيعُكُمْ فِى كَثِيرٍ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ لَعَنِتُّمْ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ حَبَّبَ إِلَيْكُمُ ٱلْإِيمَـٰنَ وَزَيَّنَهُۥ فِى قُلُوبِكُمْ وَكَرَّهَ إِلَيْكُمُ ٱلْكُفْرَ وَٱلْفُسُوقَ وَٱلْعِصْيَانَ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلرَّٰشِدُونَ
verses.text: And know that among you there is the Messenger of Allah. If he obeys you in many a matter, you will certainly fall into hardship. But Allah has endeared to you the Faith, and made it beautiful in your hearts, and made detestable to you the disbelief and sins and disobedience. Such people are rightly guided,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَضْلًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَنِعْمَةً ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
verses.text: as a grace from Allah, and as a blessing. And Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن طَآئِفَتَانِ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱقْتَتَلُوا۟ فَأَصْلِحُوا۟ بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ فَإِنۢ بَغَتْ إِحْدَىٰهُمَا عَلَى ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ فَقَـٰتِلُوا۟ ٱلَّتِى تَبْغِى حَتَّىٰ تَفِىٓءَ إِلَىٰٓ أَمْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ فَإِن فَآءَتْ فَأَصْلِحُوا۟ بَيْنَهُمَا بِٱلْعَدْلِ وَأَقْسِطُوٓا۟ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُقْسِطِينَ
verses.text: If two groups of the believers fight each other, seek reconciliation between them. And if one of them commits aggression against the other, fight the one that commits aggression until it comes back to Allah’s command. So if it comes back, seek reconciliation between them with fairness, and maintain justice. Surely Allah loves those who maintain justice.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ فَأَصْلِحُوا۟ بَيْنَ أَخَوَيْكُمْ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: All believers are but brothers, therefore seek reconciliation between your two brothers, and fear Allah, so that you may be blessed with mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا يَسْخَرْ قَوْمٌ مِّن قَوْمٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونُوا۟ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا نِسَآءٌ مِّن نِّسَآءٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُنَّ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُنَّ ۖ وَلَا تَلْمِزُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَلَا تَنَابَزُوا۟ بِٱلْأَلْقَـٰبِ ۖ بِئْسَ ٱلِٱسْمُ ٱلْفُسُوقُ بَعْدَ ٱلْإِيمَـٰنِ ۚ وَمَن لَّمْ يَتُبْ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: O you who believe, no men should ever scoff at other men. May be, the latter are better than the former. Nor should women (ever scoff) at other women. May be, the latter women are better than the former ones. And do not find fault with one another, nor call one another with bad nicknames. Bad is the name of sinfulness after embracing Faith. If anyone does not repent, then such people are the wrongdoers.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱجْتَنِبُوا۟ كَثِيرًا مِّنَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِنَّ بَعْضَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِثْمٌ ۖ وَلَا تَجَسَّسُوا۟ وَلَا يَغْتَب بَّعْضُكُم بَعْضًا ۚ أَيُحِبُّ أَحَدُكُمْ أَن يَأْكُلَ لَحْمَ أَخِيهِ مَيْتًا فَكَرِهْتُمُوهُ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ تَوَّابٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O you who believe, abstain from many of the suspicions. Some suspicions are sins. And do not be curious (to find out faults of others), and do not backbite one another. Does one of you like that he eats the flesh of his dead brother? You would abhor it. And fear Allah. Surely Allah is Most-Relenting, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰكُم مِّن ذَكَرٍ وَأُنثَىٰ وَجَعَلْنَـٰكُمْ شُعُوبًا وَقَبَآئِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَتْقَىٰكُمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: O mankind, We have created you from a male and a female, and made you into races and tribes, so that you may identify one another. Surely the noblest of you, in Allah’s sight, is the one who is most pious of you. Surely Allah is All-Knowing, All-Aware.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قَالَتِ ٱلْأَعْرَابُ ءَامَنَّا ۖ قُل لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ وَلَـٰكِن قُولُوٓا۟ أَسْلَمْنَا وَلَمَّا يَدْخُلِ ٱلْإِيمَـٰنُ فِى قُلُوبِكُمْ ۖ وَإِن تُطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ لَا يَلِتْكُم مِّنْ أَعْمَـٰلِكُمْ شَيْـًٔا ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: The Bedouins say, “We have come to believe.” Say, “You have not come to believe; instead, you (should) say, ‘We have surrendered’ and the belief has not entered your hearts so far. If you obey Allah and His Messenger, He will not curtail (the reward of) any of your deeds in the least. Surely Allah is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَرْتَابُوا۟ وَجَـٰهَدُوا۟ بِأَمْوَٰلِهِمْ وَأَنفُسِهِمْ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّـٰدِقُونَ
verses.text: Believers, in fact, are those who believe in Allah and His Messenger, then have no doubt, and struggle, with their riches and their lives, in the way of Allah. Those are the truthful.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَتُعَلِّمُونَ ٱللَّهَ بِدِينِكُمْ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Say, “Would you apprise Allah of your religion, while Allah knows all that is in the heavens and all that is in the earth, and Allah is All-Knowing about every thing?”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَمُنُّونَ عَلَيْكَ أَنْ أَسْلَمُوا۟ ۖ قُل لَّا تَمُنُّوا۟ عَلَىَّ إِسْلَـٰمَكُم ۖ بَلِ ٱللَّهُ يَمُنُّ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنْ هَدَىٰكُمْ لِلْإِيمَـٰنِ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: They oblige you that they have accepted Islam, (as if it was a favour shown to you). Say, “Do not oblige me for your accepting Islam. Rather, Allah makes you obliged for His having guided you to the Faith, if you are truthful.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ غَيْبَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بَصِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Surely Allah knows the Unseen of the heavens and the earth, and Allah keeps in sight whatever you do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْمَجِيدِ
verses.text: Qāf . (I swear) by the glorious Qur’ān, (you are sent as a messenger.)

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ عَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا شَىْءٌ عَجِيبٌ
verses.text: But they wonder that a warner has come to them from among themselves; so the disbelievers said, “This is something strange.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌۢ بَعِيدٌ
verses.text: Is it when we die and become dust (that we will be brought to life again?) That is a return, far (from understanding).”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَـٰبٌ حَفِيظٌۢ
verses.text: We know very well how much of them is diminished by the earth, and We have a Book that Preserves every thing.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِىٓ أَمْرٍ مَّرِيجٍ
verses.text: Rather, they rejected the truth when it came to them; so they are in a confused state.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍ
verses.text: Did they not, then, look to the sky above them, how We have built it and beautified it, and it has no cracks?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍ
verses.text: As for the earth, We have spread it out, and cast on it firm hills, and caused to grow therein every kind of delightful things,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.text: as a source of vision and as a lesson to every servant (of Allah) who turns (to Him for guidance).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً مُّبَـٰرَكًا فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَحَبَّ ٱلْحَصِيدِ
verses.text: And We sent down blessed water from the sky, and caused to grow therewith gardens and grain of harvest,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَـٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ
verses.text: and towering date palms that have spadices, put one upon another,

verses.arabicUthmani: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ
verses.text: as a provision to the servants (of Allah). And We gave life with it to a dead land. Similar will be the exit (of the dead from their graves).

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
verses.text: It (resurrection) was rejected before them by the people of NūH, and the people of Rass and Thamūd,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَٰنُ لُوطٍ
verses.text: and ‘Ād, and Fir’aun (Pharaoh), and the brothers of LūT,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ ۚ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
verses.text: and dwellers of Aaikah, and the people of Tubba’. Each one of them rejected the messengers; so My threat came true.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ
verses.text: Is it, then, that We were worn out by the first creation? No, but they are still in confusion about the new creation.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
verses.text: Indeed We have created man, and We know whatever thoughts his inner self develops, and We are closer to him than (his) jugular vein,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ
verses.text: when the two receiving angels receive (every human act to record it), seated (one) on the right and (one) on the left.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ
verses.text: Not a single word is uttered by one but there is a watcher near him, ready (to record).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
verses.text: The daze of death has (to) come with truth. That is what you tried to escape.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْوَعِيدِ
verses.text: And the Horn will be blown. That will be the day of (which) threat (was given).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌ وَشَهِيدٌ
verses.text: And everybody will come, along with one (angel) to drive (him to the field of reckoning) and one (angel) to testify (about his deeds).

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ
verses.text: “You were heedless of this. Now We have removed your veil from you; so your sight today is sharp.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَـٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ
verses.text: And his companion (i.e. the angel who recorded his deeds) will say, “This is what I have with me, ready (to be presented as his record of deeds).”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
verses.text: (Then it will be said,) “Cast, (O two angels,) into Jahannam (Hell) every obstinate disbeliever

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ
verses.text: who used to prevent (others) from good (behavior), who transgressed all bounds, who cast doubts (in true faith),

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
verses.text: who set up another god along with Allah. So cast him (O angels) in the painful punishment.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَـٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍ
verses.text: His (evil) companion (i.e. the Satan) will say, “O our Lord, I did not cause him to rebel, but he was himself (involved) in straying far from the track.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ
verses.text: He (Allah) will say, “Do not quarrel before Me, while I had sent to you My threat well in advance.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّـٰمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
verses.text: The Word is not changed with Me, and I Am not so unjust to My servants.”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ
verses.text: (Remind them of) the Day when We will say to Jahannam (Hell), “Are you filled up?” and it will say, “Are there some more?”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
verses.text: And the Jannah (Paradise) will be brought close for the God-fearing, no longer distant.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ
verses.text: (And it will be said,) “This is what you were promised for everyone who was oft-returning to Allah, vigilant (against sins),

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.text: the one who feared the RaHmān (The All-Merciful Allah), without seeing Him, and came up with a heart oriented towards Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ
verses.text: Enter it in peace. That is the Day of Eternity.”

verses.arabicUthmani: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ
verses.text: They will have in it whatever they wish, and with Us there are things even more than that.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُوا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
verses.text: And how many a generation We have destroyed before them who were stronger than these in their grip on power, and they searched out the cities. Was there any place (for them) to escape?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
verses.text: Indeed, there is a lesson in all this for him who has a heart and gives ear (to the truth) attentively.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ
verses.text: We created the heavens and the earth and all that is between them in six days, and no weariness even touched Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ
verses.text: So, (O Prophet,) endure with patience what they say, and proclaim His purity, along with your Lord’s praise, before sunrise and before sunset.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَـٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
verses.text: And in hours of night, proclaim His purity, and at the ends of prostration.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ ٱلْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ
verses.text: And listen: The Day when the caller will call out from a near place,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيْحَةَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُرُوجِ
verses.text: the Day they will hear the Cry in reality- that will be the Day of Resurrection.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: Surely We alone give life and bring death, and to Us is the final return

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌ
verses.text: on the Day when the earth will burst apart exposing them, while they will be hurrying up (to come out). That is an assembly, so easy for Us (to muster).

verses.arabicUthmani: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
verses.text: We know well what they say, and you are not (sent) as one who compels them. So exhort, through the Qur’ān, the one who fears My warning.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلذَّٰرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا
verses.text: By those (winds) that scatter dust,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا
verses.text: then those that bear load (of clouds),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا
verses.text: then those that float with ease,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا
verses.text: then those who distribute things,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
verses.text: whatever you are being promised is surely true,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
verses.text: and Recompense (of deeds) is sure to happen.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
verses.text: By the sky, having paths,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
verses.text: you are (involved) in a contradictory discussion.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
verses.text: Turned away from this (Qur’ān) is the one who is turned away (totally from the truth.)

verses.arabicUthmani: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
verses.text: Death upon those who make conjectures (against the true faith),

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
verses.text: - those who are drowned in ignorance, forgetful!

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: They ask, “When shall be the Day of Recompense?”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
verses.text: (It will be) the Day when they will be heated on the Fire,

verses.arabicUthmani: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: (and it will be said to them,) “Taste (the punishment of) your mischief. This is what you have been asking to be brought sooner.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: The God-fearing (on the other hand) will be in gardens and springs,

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: receiving what their Lord will have given to them. Indeed, prior to this, they were good in their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
verses.text: They used to sleep little in the night;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
verses.text: and in the hours before dawn they used to pray for forgiveness,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
verses.text: and in their wealth, there was a right for one who asks and for one who is deprived.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
verses.text: In the earth, there are signs for those who (seek truth to) believe,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and in your own selves! So, do you not perceive?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: And in the heavens, there is your sustenance and all that you have been promised.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: So, by the Lord of the heavens and the earth, it (the Day of Recompense) is a reality, as sure as the fact that you (can) speak.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
verses.text: Has there come to you the story of the honoured guests of Ibrāhīm?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
verses.text: When they (the angels in human form) entered unto him and said, “We greet you with Salām .” He said, “Salām on you.” (And he said to himself,) “(They are) unknown people.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
verses.text: Then he slipped off to his home and fetched a fattened calf.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: So he presented it before them (to eat, but being angels, they refrained.) He said, “Would you not eat?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.text: So he felt some fear in his heart. They said, “Be not scared.” And they gave him the good news of (the birth of) a knowledgeable boy.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
verses.text: So his wife came forward with a clamor, and slapped her own face and said, “(How can I have a child when I am) a barren old woman?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: They said, “This is how your Lord has said. Surely, He is All-Wise, All-Knowing.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: He (Ibrāhīm) said (to the angels), “Then, what is your mission O messengers?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We are sent to a guilty people, (i.e. the people of Sodom)

verses.arabicUthmani: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
verses.text: so that we may send down upon them stones of clay,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.text: marked by your Lord for the transgressors.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: So, We let the believers who were there to come out (from danger),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: but We did not find in it any Muslims, except one house.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
verses.text: And We left in this (event) a sign (of deterrence) for those who fear the painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: And (We left a similar sign) in (the story of) Mūsā, when We sent him to Fir‘aun (Pharaoh) with a clear proof.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: So he turned away along with his chiefs and said, “ (Mūsā is) a magician or a madman!”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
verses.text: So We seized him and his army, and cast them into the sea, as he was of culpable behaviour.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
verses.text: And (a similar sign was left) in (the story of) ‘Ād, when We sent upon them the wind that was barren (from any benefit);

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
verses.text: it spared nothing it came upon, but rendered it like a stuff smashed by decay.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: And (a similar sign was left) in (the story of) Thamūd, when it was said to them, “Enjoy yourselves for a while.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: Then they rebelled against the command of your Lord; so the thunderbolt (of divine punishment) seized them, while they were looking on.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
verses.text: Then they were neither able to stand (before the punishment), nor could they defend themselves.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: And (We have destroyed) the people of NūH even before; indeed they were a sinful people.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
verses.text: And the sky was built by Us with might; and indeed We are the expanders.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ
verses.text: And the earth was spread out by Us as a floor; so how well have We spread it out!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: And from every thing We have created pairs of twos, so that you may heed.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: So, flee to Allah. Indeed I am a plain warner sent by Him for you.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: And do not make up any other god along with Allah. Indeed I am a plain warner sent by Him for you.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: In similar way, no messenger came to those before them, but they said, “(He is) a magician or a madman.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
verses.text: Have they handed down (this saying) to each other as a legacy? Rather they are a rebellious people.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
verses.text: So, turn away from them, for you are not blamed.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: And keep reminding, because reminding benefits the believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
verses.text: I did not create the Jinns and the human beings except for the purpose that they should worship Me.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
verses.text: I do not want any sustenance from them, nor do I want them to feed Me.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
verses.text: In fact, Allah is the All-Sustainer, Possessor of power, the Strong.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
verses.text: So, those who did wrong will have their turn like the turn of their counterparts. So, they should not ask Me to hasten on.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: Woe, then, to those who disbelieve because of the Day of theirs that they are promised (for punishment).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلطُّورِ
verses.text: By the mount of Tūr,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكِتَـٰبٍ مَّسْطُورٍ
verses.text: and by a book, written

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى رَقٍّ مَّنشُورٍ
verses.text: on an unrolled scroll,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْمَعْمُورِ
verses.text: and by the Populated House (Al-Bait-ul-Ma‘mūr) ,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّقْفِ ٱلْمَرْفُوعِ
verses.text: and by the roof, raised high,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْبَحْرِ ٱلْمَسْجُورِ
verses.text: and by the sea, flared up (with fire),

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
verses.text: the punishment of your Lord is sure to fall.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعٍ
verses.text: There is nothing to push it back,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًا
verses.text: the Day when the sky will tremble, a horrible trembling,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلْجِبَالُ سَيْرًا
verses.text: and the mountains will move about, a terrible movement.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: So, woe to those who reject (the true faith),

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
verses.text: who are indulged in vain talk, playing (with truth),

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
verses.text: the Day they will be pushed to the Fire forcefully,

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: (and it will be said to them,) “This is the Fire you used to deny.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَسِحْرٌ هَـٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: Is it then magic, or do you not see?

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Enter it. Now, whether you endure (it) patiently or impatiently, it is all the same for you; you are merely rewarded for what you used to do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَعِيمٍ
verses.text: Of course, the God-fearing will be in gardens and bliss,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَـٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: enjoying what their Lord will have given to them, and their Lord will have saved them from the punishment of Hell.

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: (It will be said to them,) “Eat and drink pleasantly because of what you used to do,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
verses.text: relaxing on lined up couches”. And We will marry them with big-eyed houris.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَـٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَـٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍ ۚ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ
verses.text: And those who believed and their children followed them in belief, We will join their children with them, and will not curtail (the reward of) any of their deeds at all. Every person will be pledged for what he earned.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمْدَدْنَـٰهُم بِفَـٰكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.text: And We will go on giving them whatever they desire of fruits and meat.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَتَنَـٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
verses.text: They will snatch from one another (in a friendly manner) a glass (of wine) carrying neither absurd talk, nor something leading to sin.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
verses.text: And their own serving boys will rotate around them, (who will be as neat and clean) as if they were hidden pearls.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: And they will advance to one another, asking (about each other’s welfare).

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
verses.text: They will say, “Indeed we were afraid (of Allah’s punishment) when we were amidst our family,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
verses.text: but Allah did favour to us and saved us from the torment of Fire’s scorching breath.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: We used to pray to Him before. He is surely the Most-Kind, the Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: So keep reminding (them), because by the grace of your Lord, you are neither a soothsayer, nor a mad man.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
verses.text: Do they rather say, “He is a poet for whom we are awaiting the accident of death?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
verses.text: Say, “Wait! I am waiting with you, too.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَـٰمُهُم بِهَـٰذَآ ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
verses.text: Is it their intellects that direct them to (say) this, or are they a rebellious people?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Do they rather say, “He has forged it (the Qur’ān.)”? No, but they do not believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: So, let them bring a discourse like this, if they are truthful.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
verses.text: Is it that they are created by none, or are they themselves the creators?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: Or have they created the heavens and the earth? No, but they are sure of nothing.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have the treasures of your Lord, or have they acquired control (over them)?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Or have they a stairway (to the heavens) by means of which they listen (to the divine decrees)? If so, their listener must bring a clear proof.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَـٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
verses.text: Is it that He has daughters and you have sons?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.text: Or is it that you (O prophet) ask them for a fee, and therefore they are burdened with a liability?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.text: Or have they the knowledge of the Unseen, and they are recording it?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
verses.text: Or do they intend to plan to do harm (to the prophet)? Then the disbelievers themselves shall be harmed by the plan.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have a god other than Allah? Pure is Allah from what they associate with Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
verses.text: Even if they see a piece falling down from the sky, they would say, “It is a cumulated cloud.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
verses.text: So, leave them alone until they face their Day, in which they will be turned unconscious,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: the Day their planning will not benefit them in the least, nor will they be helped.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: And for those who did wrong there is another punishment before that, but most of them do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.text: And (O Prophet) be patient about the decision of your Lord, because you are in front of Our Eyes. And proclaim the purity of your Lord along with His praise when you stand (in Prayer),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.text: And, in parts of night too, proclaim His purity, and at the time of setting of the stars.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّجْمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ
verses.text: By the star when it goes down to set,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمْ وَمَا غَوَىٰ
verses.text: your fellow (the Holy Prophet) has neither missed the way, nor did he deviate.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰٓ
verses.text: He does not speak out of (his own) desire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا وَحْىٌ يُوحَىٰ
verses.text: It is but revelation revealed (to him).

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَهُۥ شَدِيدُ ٱلْقُوَىٰ
verses.text: It is taught to him by one (angel) of strong faculties,

verses.arabicUthmani: ذُو مِرَّةٍ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ
verses.text: the one of vigour. So he stood poised,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: while he was on the upper horizon.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ دَنَا فَتَدَلَّىٰ
verses.text: Then he drew near, and came down,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوْسَيْنِ أَوْ أَدْنَىٰ
verses.text: so as he was at a distance like that of two bows (joined together), rather even nearer.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦ مَآ أَوْحَىٰ
verses.text: Thus He (Allah) revealed to His slave what He revealed.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا كَذَبَ ٱلْفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰٓ
verses.text: The heart did not err in what he saw.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَتُمَـٰرُونَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَا يَرَىٰ
verses.text: Do you quarrel with him in what he sees?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ نَزْلَةً أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: Indeed he saw him another time

verses.arabicUthmani: عِندَ سِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.text: by Sidrat-ul-Muntahā (the lote-tree in the upper realm),

verses.arabicUthmani: عِندَهَا جَنَّةُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰٓ
verses.text: near which there is Jannat-ul-Ma’wā (the Paradise of Abode),

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ يَغْشَى ٱلسِّدْرَةَ مَا يَغْشَىٰ
verses.text: when the lote-tree was covered by that which covered it.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا زَاغَ ٱلْبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغَىٰ
verses.text: The eye neither went wrong, nor did exceed the limit.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: He has indeed seen a part of the biggest signs of your Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱللَّـٰتَ وَٱلْعُزَّىٰ
verses.text: Have you ever considered about the (idols of) Lāt and ‘Uzzā,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَنَوٰةَ ٱلثَّالِثَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: and about the other, the third (idol), namely, Manāt,?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَكُمُ ٱلذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: Is it that you have males and He (Allah) has females?

verses.arabicUthmani: تِلْكَ إِذًا قِسْمَةٌ ضِيزَىٰٓ
verses.text: If so, it is a bizarre division.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطَـٰنٍ ۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ ۖ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
verses.text: These are nothing but names you and your fathers have invented; Allah has sent down no authority attached to them. They are following nothing but conjecture and what their own souls desire, while guidance from their Lord has surely reached them.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ مَا تَمَنَّىٰ
verses.text: Is it that man can get whatever he wishes?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: (No,) because to Allah alone belongs the (good of) the Hereafter and the former life (of this world).

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
verses.text: How many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession cannot benefit (any one) at all, but after Allah allows (it) for whomsoever He wills and pleases.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: Those who do not believe in the Hereafter call the angels by names of females.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
verses.text: They do not have knowledge about it. They follow nothing but conjecture, and conjecture is of no avail in (the matter of) Truth.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.text: So, turn away from him who turns away from Our advice, and seeks nothing but (pleasure of) the worldly life.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
verses.text: That is the limit of their access to knowledge. Indeed only your Lord knows well about the one who has gone astray from his way, and He knows well about the one who has adopted the right path.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَـٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
verses.text: To Allah belongs whatever there is in the heavens and whatever there is in the earth, so that He gives punishment to evildoers for what they did, and gives good reward to those who did good

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَـٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ ۚ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَـٰتِكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
verses.text: -those who abstain from the major sins and from shameful acts, except minor involvements. Indeed your Lord is extensive in forgiveness. He knows you more than anyone else (from a time) when He created you from the earth and when you were embryos in the wombs of your mothers. So, do not claim purity (from faults) for your selves. He knows best who is God-fearing.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: Did you see the one who turned away,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَعْطَىٰ قَلِيلًا وَأَكْدَىٰٓ
verses.text: and gave a little, and stopped?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَهُوَ يَرَىٰٓ
verses.text: Does he have knowledge of the Unseen whereby he sees (what he believes)?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
verses.text: Has he not been told of what was (revealed) in the scriptures of Mūsā

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلَّذِى وَفَّىٰٓ
verses.text: and of Ibrāhīm who fulfilled (his duties)?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: (It was) that no bearer of burden shall bear the burden of the other,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.text: and that a man shall not deserve but (the reward of) his own effort,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ سَعْيَهُۥ سَوْفَ يُرَىٰ
verses.text: and that his effort will soon be seen,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يُجْزَىٰهُ ٱلْجَزَآءَ ٱلْأَوْفَىٰ
verses.text: then he will be recompensed for it in full,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.text: and that to your Lord is the end (of every one),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضْحَكَ وَأَبْكَىٰ
verses.text: and that He is the One who makes (one) laugh and makes (him) weep,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَا
verses.text: and that He is the One who gives death and gives life,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: and that He creates the pairs, male and female,

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ إِذَا تُمْنَىٰ
verses.text: from a sperm-drop when it is poured (into a womb),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ عَلَيْهِ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: and that the second creation is undertaken by Him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغْنَىٰ وَأَقْنَىٰ
verses.text: and that He is the One who gives wealth and preserves (it),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعْرَىٰ
verses.text: and that He is the One who is the Lord of Sirius (the star worshipped by pagans),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥٓ أَهْلَكَ عَادًا ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: and that He has destroyed the earlier ‘Ād,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثَمُودَا۟ فَمَآ أَبْقَىٰ
verses.text: and Thamūd, so spared none,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ
verses.text: and (destroyed) the people of NūH even earlier. Surely they were more unjust and more rebellious.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَةَ أَهْوَىٰ
verses.text: And He destroyed the overturned towns (of the people of LūT) also,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ
verses.text: so enveloped they were by that which enveloped.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ
verses.text: Then concerning which of your Lord’s bounties would you remain in doubt?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا نَذِيرٌ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ
verses.text: This (Prophet) is a warner from the (genus of the) previous warners.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَزِفَتِ ٱلْـَٔازِفَةُ
verses.text: The Imminent (Hour of Judgment) has approached.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
verses.text: There is no one, beside Allah, to remove it.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمِنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ تَعْجَبُونَ
verses.text: Do you then wonder at this discourse,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَضْحَكُونَ وَلَا تَبْكُونَ
verses.text: and laugh (at it), and not weep,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنتُمْ سَـٰمِدُونَ
verses.text: while you are engaged in vain play?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ ۩
verses.text: Now, fall down in prostration and worship (Allah).

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.text: The Hour (of doom) has drawn near, and the moon has split asunder.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
verses.text: When these people see a sign, they turn away and say, “(This is) a transient magic.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
verses.text: They have rejected (the Truth) and followed their desires, while every matter has to settle (at some time).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
verses.text: And there has come to them as much news (of the earlier communities) as it is enough to deter,

verses.arabicUthmani: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.text: (containing) a perfect wisdom. But the warnings are of no avail (to them).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
verses.text: Therefore, turn aside (O Prophet,) from them. (They will see the reality) on the day in which the caller will call (them) to a gruesome object.

verses.arabicUthmani: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
verses.text: With their eyes humbled, they will come out of the graves like locusts spread all over,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
verses.text: rushing quickly towards the caller. (On that Day) the disbelievers will say, “This is a hard day.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
verses.text: The people of NūH denied (the truth) before them. So they rejected Our servant, and said, “(He is) a madman”, and he was (also) threatened (by them).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
verses.text: So he prayed to his Lord saying, “I am overpowered, so defend (me).”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
verses.text: So We opened the gates of the sky with water pouring forth profusely,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
verses.text: and We caused the earth to gush forth as springs; so the water (of both kinds) met together for a destined event.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
verses.text: And We caused him (NūH) to board that (ship) which had planks and nails,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.text: which sailed under Our Eyes, as a reward for the one who was rejected (by the infidels).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: And We left it (the ship) as a sign. So, is there one to take lesson?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: Then how was My torment and My warnings?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: Indeed We have made the Qur’ān easy for seeking advice. So, is there one to heed to the advice?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: (The people of) ‘Ād rejected (their prophet). So how was My torment and My warnings?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
verses.text: We did send to them a furious wind in a day of continuous misfortune,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
verses.text: plucking people away, as if they were trunks of uprooted palm-trees.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So how was My torment and My warnings?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: Indeed We have made the Qur’ān easy for seeking advice. So, is there one to heed to the advice?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: (The people of) Thamūd rejected the warners.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.text: So they said, “Shall we follow a single human being from among us? Then we will be in error and insanity.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
verses.text: Is it that the advice has been cast upon him alone out of all of us? No, but he is a bragging liar.”

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
verses.text: Tomorrow they will know who the bragging liar is!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
verses.text: We are going to send the she-camel as a trial for them; so watch them (O SāliH,) and keep patience,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
verses.text: and tell them that water (of the well) is to be shared between them (and the she-camel), so as the right of having water shall be attended by each (alternatively).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.text: Then they called their man (to kill the she-camel,) so he undertook (the task) and killed (the she-camel).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So how was My torment and My warnings?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
verses.text: We sent upon them a single Cry, and they were like crushed leafs of a hedge-builder.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: Indeed We have made the Qur’ān easy for seeking advice. So, is there one to heed to the advice?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: The people of LūT rejected the warners.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
verses.text: We sent upon them a rain of stones, except the family of LūT whom We saved in the last hours of night,

verses.arabicUthmani: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
verses.text: as a grace from Us. This is how We reward the one who offers gratitude.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: And he (LūT) had certainly warned them of Our grasp, but they disputed the warnings.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: And they had even tried to tempt him against his guests (so that they may snatch them away for bad purpose,) but We blinded their eyes: “Now taste My torment and My warnings!”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
verses.text: And on the next morning, a lasting torment overtook them:

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: “Now taste My torment and My warnings.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: Indeed We have made the Qur’ān easy for seeking advice. So, is there one to heed to the advice?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.text: And the warners came to the family of Fir‘aun (Pharaoh).

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
verses.text: (But) they rejected all Our signs; so We seized them- a seizure by One Mighty, Powerful.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.text: Are the disbelievers among you in a better position than all of the aforesaid (punished people), or do you have immunity (recorded) in the sacred books?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
verses.text: Or do they say, “We are a large group, well-defended.”?

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
verses.text: Soon this ‘large group’ shall be defeated, and all of them will turn their backs.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
verses.text: Rather the Hour (of judgment) is their appointed time (for their full recompense), and the Hour is more calamitous and much more bitter.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.text: Surely the guilty ones are in error and madness.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
verses.text: On the Day when they will be dragged into the Fire on their faces, (it will be said to them,) “Taste the touch of Hell.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
verses.text: Verily, We have created every thing according to (Our) predestination.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
verses.text: And (implementation of) Our command is no more than a single act like the twinkling of an eye.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: We have destroyed people like you; so, is there one to take lesson?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.text: And every thing they have done is recorded in the books (of deeds).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
verses.text: And every thing, small and big, is written down.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
verses.text: Of course, the God-fearing will be in gardens and rivers,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
verses.text: in a seat of Truth, near to the Omnipotent Sovereign.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ
verses.text: The RaHmān (The All-Merciful Allah)

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ
verses.text: has taught the Qur’ān.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ
verses.text: He has created man.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَهُ ٱلْبَيَانَ
verses.text: He has taught him (how) to express himself.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ بِحُسْبَانٍ
verses.text: The sun and the moon are (bound) by a (fixed) calculation.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسْجُدَانِ
verses.text: And the vine and the tree both prostrate (to Allah).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
verses.text: He raised the sky high, and has placed the scale,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْمِيزَانِ
verses.text: so that you should not be wrongful in weighing.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا۟ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
verses.text: Observe the correct weight with fairness, and do not make weighing deficient.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ
verses.text: As for the earth, He has placed it for creatures,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَٱلنَّخْلُ ذَاتُ ٱلْأَكْمَامِ
verses.text: in which there are fruits and date palms having sheaths,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْحَبُّ ذُو ٱلْعَصْفِ وَٱلرَّيْحَانُ
verses.text: and the grain having chaff, and fragrant flowers.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, (O mankind and Jinn,) which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ كَٱلْفَخَّارِ
verses.text: He has created man from dry clay, ringing like pottery,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
verses.text: and created Jann (father of the Jinn) from a smokeless flame of fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, (O mankind and Jinn,) which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَغْرِبَيْنِ
verses.text: He is the Lord of both points of sunrise and both points of sunset.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ
verses.text: He let forth the two seas to meet together,

verses.arabicUthmani: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ
verses.text: while there is a barrier between them; they do not encroach (upon one another).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا ٱللُّؤْلُؤُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.text: From both of them come forth the pearl and the coral.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ
verses.text: And His are the sailing ships raised up in the sea like mountains.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُّ مَنْ عَلَيْهَا فَانٍ
verses.text: Every one who is on it (the earth) has to perish.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.text: And your Lord’s Countenance will remain, full of majesty, full of honour.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ
verses.text: All those in the heavens and the earth beseech Him (for their needs.) Every day He is in a state of action.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنَفْرُغُ لَكُمْ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ
verses.text: Soon We are going to spare Ourselves for you (to reckon your deeds), O two heavy species (of Jinn and mankind)!

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ
verses.text: O genera of Jinn and mankind, If you are able to penetrate beyond the realms of the heavens and the earth, then penetrate. You cannot penetrate without power.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّن نَّارٍ وَنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
verses.text: A flame of fire and a smoke will be loosed against you, and you will not (be able) to defend.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةً كَٱلدِّهَانِ
verses.text: So, (it will be a terrible event) when the sky will be split apart and will become rosy, like (red) hides.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.text: On that day, neither a man will be questioned about his sin, nor a Jinn.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَـٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ
verses.text: The guilty ones will be recognized (by angels) through their marks and will be seized by foreheads and feet.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: This is Jahannam (Hell) that the guilty people deny.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَطُوفُونَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانٍ
verses.text: They will circle around between it and between hot, boiling water.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ
verses.text: And for the one who is fearful of having to stand before his Lord, there are two gardens, -

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَوَاتَآ أَفْنَانٍ
verses.text: - both having branches.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ تَجْرِيَانِ
verses.text: In both there are two flowing springs.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ زَوْجَانِ
verses.text: In both there are two kinds of every fruit.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
verses.text: (The people of these gardens will be) reclining on floorings whose (even) linings will be of thick silk, and the fruits plucked from the two gardens will be at hand.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.text: In them there will be maidens restraining (their) glances, whom neither a man might have touched before them, nor a Jinn.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلْيَاقُوتُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.text: They will look like rubies and corals.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ جَزَآءُ ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنُ
verses.text: Is there any reward for goodness other than goodness?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ
verses.text: And besides these two, there are two other gardens (for the second category of the God-fearing),-

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: مُدْهَآمَّتَانِ
verses.text: - both (gardens are) dark green!

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So, which of the bounties of your Lord will you deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ
verses.text: In both there are two springs gushing forth profusely.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
