verses.text: And how many a township rebelled against the command of its Lord, and against His messengers, so We called them to a severe account, and punished them with a punishment that was unimagined by them.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَاقَتْ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهَا وَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ أَمْرِهَا خُسْرًا
verses.text: Thus they tasted the evil consequence of their acts, and the end of their conduct was loss.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَعَدَّ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا ۖ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ يَـٰٓأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ۚ قَدْ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَيْكُمْ ذِكْرًا
verses.text: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment; so fear Allah O men of understanding who have believed! Allah has sent down to you a Reminder,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّسُولًا يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ مُبَيِّنَـٰتٍ لِّيُخْرِجَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَـٰلِحًا يُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ قَدْ أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُۥ رِزْقًا
verses.text: a messenger who recites to you the verses of Allah, making (the truth) clear, so that He may bring forth those who believe and do righteous deeds from the layers of darkness into the light. And whoever believes in Allah, and acts righteously, He will admit him to the gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein such people will live forever. Allah has made for him a good provision.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ وَمِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ مِثْلَهُنَّ يَتَنَزَّلُ ٱلْأَمْرُ بَيْنَهُنَّ لِتَعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَدْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًۢا
verses.text: Allah is the One who has created seven skies, and their like from earth. The Command descends among them, so that you may know that Allah is powerful over every thing, and that Allah has encompassed every thing in knowledge.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ لِمَ تُحَرِّمُ مَآ أَحَلَّ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ۖ تَبْتَغِى مَرْضَاتَ أَزْوَٰجِكَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O Prophet, why do you ban (on your self) something that Allah has made lawful for you, seeking to please your wives? And Allah is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ فَرَضَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ تَحِلَّةَ أَيْمَـٰنِكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Allah has prescribed (the way of) absolution from your oaths. And Allah is your protector, and He is the All- Knowing, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ أَسَرَّ ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِلَىٰ بَعْضِ أَزْوَٰجِهِۦ حَدِيثًا فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَتْ بِهِۦ وَأَظْهَرَهُ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ عَرَّفَ بَعْضَهُۥ وَأَعْرَضَ عَنۢ بَعْضٍ ۖ فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَهَا بِهِۦ قَالَتْ مَنْ أَنۢبَأَكَ هَـٰذَا ۖ قَالَ نَبَّأَنِىَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.text: And (remember) when the Prophet told one of his wives something in secret. So, when she disclosed it (to another wife), and Allah made it known to him, he told (the disclosing wife) part of it,and avoided another part. So when he informed her about it, she said, “Who told you about this?” He said, “I was told of it by the All-Knowing, the All-Aware.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن تَتُوبَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ صَغَتْ قُلُوبُكُمَا ۖ وَإِن تَظَـٰهَرَا عَلَيْهِ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ مَوْلَىٰهُ وَجِبْرِيلُ وَصَـٰلِحُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ۖ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ ظَهِيرٌ
verses.text: (O two wives of the Prophet,) If both of you repent to Allah, then (your conduct calls for it, because) your hearts have departed from the correct way. And if you back each other against him (the Prophet), then Allah is his supporter, and Jibra’īl (Gabriel) and righteous believers, and after all that, angels are his helpers.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَسَىٰ رَبُّهُۥٓ إِن طَلَّقَكُنَّ أَن يُبْدِلَهُۥٓ أَزْوَٰجًا خَيْرًا مِّنكُنَّ مُسْلِمَـٰتٍ مُّؤْمِنَـٰتٍ قَـٰنِتَـٰتٍ تَـٰٓئِبَـٰتٍ عَـٰبِدَٰتٍ سَـٰٓئِحَـٰتٍ ثَيِّبَـٰتٍ وَأَبْكَارًا
verses.text: It is hoped that, if he divorces you, Allah will give him in your place wives better than you, submissive to Allah, believing, devout, penitent, steadfast in worship, fasting, previously married and virgins.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَهْلِيكُمْ نَارًا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ عَلَيْهَا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌ شِدَادٌ لَّا يَعْصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
verses.text: O you who believe, save yourselves and your families from a fire, the fuel of which is human beings and stones, appointed on which are angels, stern and severe, who do not disobey Allah in what He orders them, and do whatever they are ordered to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَا تَعْتَذِرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: O you who disbelieve, do not make excuses today. You will only be recompensed for what you have been doing.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ تَوْبَةً نَّصُوحًا عَسَىٰ رَبُّكُمْ أَن يُكَفِّرَ عَنكُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتِكُمْ وَيُدْخِلَكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ يَوْمَ لَا يُخْزِى ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّبِىَّ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ ۖ نُورُهُمْ يَسْعَىٰ بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَـٰنِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ أَتْمِمْ لَنَا نُورَنَا وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: O you who believe, turn to Allah with a faithful repentance. It is hoped from your Lord that he will write off your faults, and will admit you to the gardens beneath which rivers flow, on the Day when Allah will not disgrace the Prophet and those who believed with him. Their light will run before them and to their right hands. They will say, “Our Lord, perfect for us our light, and forgive us. Indeed you are powerful over every thing.”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ جَـٰهِدِ ٱلْكُفَّارَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ وَٱغْلُظْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ وَمَأْوَىٰهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: O Prophet, carry out Jihād (struggle) against the disbelievers and the hypocrites, and be harsh with them. Their final abode is Jahannam (Hell), and it is an evil end.

verses.arabicUthmani: ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ٱمْرَأَتَ نُوحٍ وَٱمْرَأَتَ لُوطٍ ۖ كَانَتَا تَحْتَ عَبْدَيْنِ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا صَـٰلِحَيْنِ فَخَانَتَاهُمَا فَلَمْ يُغْنِيَا عَنْهُمَا مِنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا وَقِيلَ ٱدْخُلَا ٱلنَّارَ مَعَ ٱلدَّٰخِلِينَ
verses.text: Allah has cited for the disbelievers the example of the wife of NūH and the wife of LūT. Both were married with two of Our righteous servants, but betrayed them. So they could not benefit them against Allah at all, and it was said, “Enter the Fire along with those who enter.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱمْرَأَتَ فِرْعَوْنَ إِذْ قَالَتْ رَبِّ ٱبْنِ لِى عِندَكَ بَيْتًا فِى ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَنَجِّنِى مِن فِرْعَوْنَ وَعَمَلِهِۦ وَنَجِّنِى مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: And Allah has cited for the believers the example of the wife of Fir’aun (Pharaoh), when she said, “My Lord, build for me, near You, a house in the Paradise, and deliver me from Fir’aun and his deeds, and deliver me from the unjust people.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَرْيَمَ ٱبْنَتَ عِمْرَٰنَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتْ بِكَلِمَـٰتِ رَبِّهَا وَكُتُبِهِۦ وَكَانَتْ مِنَ ٱلْقَـٰنِتِينَ
verses.text: And (Allah has also cited the example of) Maryam, daughter of ‘Imrān who guarded her chastity, so We breathed into her Our spirit, and she testified to the truth of the words of her Lord and His books, and she was one of the devout.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: Glorious is the One in whose hand is the Kingdom (of the whole universe), and He is powerful over every thing,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفُورُ
verses.text: the One who created death and life, so that He may test you as to which of you is better in his deeds. And He is the All-Mighty, the Most-Forgiving,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا ۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِن تَفَـٰوُتٍ ۖ فَٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورٍ
verses.text: who has created seven skies, one over the other. You will see nothing out of proportion in the creation of the RaHmān (the All-Merciful Allah). So, cast your eye again. Do you see any rifts?

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْبَصَرُ خَاسِئًا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٌ
verses.text: Then cast your eye again and again, and the eye will come back to you abased, in a state of weariness.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِمَصَـٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلْنَـٰهَا رُجُومًا لِّلشَّيَـٰطِينِ ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لَهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: And We have decorated the nearest sky with lamps, and have made them devices to stone the devils, and We have prepared for them the punishment of Hell.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِرَبِّهِمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: And for those who disbelieved in their Lord, there is the punishment of Jahannam , and it is an evil end.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ فِيهَا سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا شَهِيقًا وَهِىَ تَفُورُ
verses.text: When they will be thrown in it, they will hear a terrible sound from it, and it will be boiling,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلْغَيْظِ ۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلْقِىَ فِيهَا فَوْجٌ سَأَلَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَذِيرٌ
verses.text: seeming as if it will burst out of fury. Whenever a group is thrown into it, its keepers will say to them, “Had no warner come to you?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرٌ فَكَذَّبْنَا وَقُلْنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ كَبِيرٍ
verses.text: They will say, “Yes, a warner had come to us, but We had rejected, and said, ‘Allah has not revealed anything. You are only in great error.’”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْ كُنَّا نَسْمَعُ أَوْ نَعْقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِىٓ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: And they will say, “Had we been listening or understanding, we would not have been among the people of the Hell.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱعْتَرَفُوا۟ بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسُحْقًا لِّأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: Thus they will confess their sin. So, away with the people of the Hell!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌ وَأَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ
verses.text: Surely, for those who have awe of their Lord without seeing (Him), there is forgiveness and a big reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَسِرُّوا۟ قَوْلَكُمْ أَوِ ٱجْهَرُوا۟ بِهِۦٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: Whether you keep your talk secret or make it aloud, He knows well what lies in the hearts.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.text: Is it (imaginable) that He who has created (them) will not have (such a) knowledge, while He is the Knower of the finest things, the All-Aware?

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
verses.text: He is the One who has made the earth subjugated for you, so walk on its shoulders, and eat out of His provision, and to Him is the Resurrection.

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخْسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَمُورُ
verses.text: Have you become fearless of Him who is in the sky if He makes you sink into the earth, and it starts trembling at once?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرْسِلَ عَلَيْكُمْ حَاصِبًا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ كَيْفَ نَذِيرِ
verses.text: Or, have you become fearless of Him who is in the sky if He looses a violent wind with stones against you? So, you will soon come to know how was My warning!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.text: And of course, those before them (also) rejected (the truth). So, how was My censure?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ فَوْقَهُمْ صَـٰٓفَّـٰتٍ وَيَقْبِضْنَ ۚ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۭ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: Have they not looked to the birds above them spreading their wings, and (at times) they fold (them) in? No one holds them up except the RaHmān (the All-Merciful Allah). Surely He is watchful of every thing.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى هُوَ جُندٌ لَّكُمْ يَنصُرُكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۚ إِنِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ إِلَّا فِى غُرُورٍ
verses.text: Now, who is there to act as a force for you to help you, except the RaHmān ? The disbelievers are in nothing but delusion.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَرْزُقُكُمْ إِنْ أَمْسَكَ رِزْقَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّجُّوا۟ فِى عُتُوٍّ وَنُفُورٍ
verses.text: Or, who is there to give you sustenance, if He withholds His sustenance? Still, they persist in rebellion and aversion.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمَن يَمْشِى مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِهِۦٓ أَهْدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمْشِى سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
verses.text: Then, is the one who walks falling down (frequently) on his face more right or the one who walks properly on a straight path?

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۖ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Say, “He is the One who has originated you, and made for you ears and eyes and hearts. How little you pay gratitude!”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
verses.text: Say, “He is the One who has scattered you on the earth, and to Him you will be assembled.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: And they say, “When will this promise (of the Day of Judgment) be fulfilled, if you are true?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Say, “The knowledge (of that Day) is only with Allah, and I am only a plain warner.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهُ زُلْفَةً سِيٓـَٔتْ وُجُوهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَقِيلَ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَدَّعُونَ
verses.text: Then, once they will see it approaching, the faces of the disbelievers will be turned awkward, and it will be said, “This is what you were calling for!”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَهْلَكَنِىَ ٱللَّهُ وَمَن مَّعِىَ أَوْ رَحِمَنَا فَمَن يُجِيرُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.text: Say, “Tell me, if Allah destroys me and those who are with me (as you wish), or has mercy on us (as we wish), who can (in either case) save the disbelievers from a painful punishment?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Say, “He is the RaHmān; we have believed in Him, and in Him we placed our trust. So, you will soon come to know who is in open error.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَآؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَآءٍ مَّعِينٍۭ
verses.text: Say, “Tell me, Should your water vanish into the earth, who will bring you a flowing (stream of) water?

verses.arabicUthmani: نٓ ۚ وَٱلْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُونَ
verses.text: Nūn , by the pen and what they write,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: with the grace of your Lord, you are not insane.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لَكَ لَأَجْرًا غَيْرَ مَمْنُونٍ
verses.text: And you will definitely have a reward that will never end.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: And you are surely on an excellent standard of character.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَتُبْصِرُ وَيُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: So, you will see, and they will see

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلْمَفْتُونُ
verses.text: which of you is demented.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
verses.text: Surely your Lord knows best who has strayed from his way, and He is well aware of those who are on the right path.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: So, do not obey those who reject (the true faith.)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تُدْهِنُ فَيُدْهِنُونَ
verses.text: They wish that you become flexible (in your faith), so that they should become flexible (in their hostile attitude.)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تُطِعْ كُلَّ حَلَّافٍ مَّهِينٍ
verses.text: And do not obey any contemptible one who swears much,

verses.arabicUthmani: هَمَّازٍ مَّشَّآءٍۭ بِنَمِيمٍ
verses.text: a slanderer who goes about with calumnies,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.text: one who prevents good, (and who is) transgressor, sinful,

verses.arabicUthmani: عُتُلٍّۭ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ زَنِيمٍ
verses.text: harsh, (and) after all that, notorious,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن كَانَ ذَا مَالٍ وَبَنِينَ
verses.text: (do not obey such a person merely) because he is a man of wealth and sons.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, “(These are) the tales of the ancient.”

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنَسِمُهُۥ عَلَى ٱلْخُرْطُومِ
verses.text: We will soon brand him on the snout.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَـٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: We have tested them as We had tested the Owners of the Garden, when they had sworn an oath that they would pluck its fruits on the next morning,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَسْتَثْنُونَ
verses.text: and did not make any exception (by saying inshā’allāh ).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: Then, there whirled around it a whirl (of calamity) from your Lord, while they were asleep.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَصْبَحَتْ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ
verses.text: Thus, on the next morning, it was like a harvested field.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَنَادَوْا۟ مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: So, they called out each other as the morning broke,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰرِمِينَ
verses.text: saying, “Set out early, if you are going to pluck (the fruits).”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱنطَلَقُوا۟ وَهُمْ يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ
verses.text: So they set out while they were whispering to each other,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ
verses.text: saying, “Let no poor man enter into it upon you today.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَغَدَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْدٍ قَـٰدِرِينَ
verses.text: And in early hours they rushed quickly, while they were (assuming themselves) powerful (to pluck the fruits and prevent the poor.)

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.text: But when they saw it (the place of the ruined garden), they said, “We have missed the way.”

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.text: (Then, once they realized that the garden is the same, but it has been destroyed, they said,) “No, but we are deprived (of the fruits).”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.text: Said he who was the best among them, “Did I not say to you, ‘Why do you not pronounce tasbīH (Allah’s purity)?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We pronounce the purity of our Lord. No doubt, we were wrongdoers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَلَـٰوَمُونَ
verses.text: Then, (at the beginning,) they started reproaching one another;

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَـٰغِينَ
verses.text: (and at last,) they said, “Woe to us! In fact, we (all) were outrageous.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
verses.text: We hope that our Lord will give us in exchange something better than this. Truly we turn to Allah.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: In this way the punishment comes. And, of course, the punishment of the Hereafter is even greater, if they but realize!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: Surely, for the God-fearing there are gardens of bliss.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَنَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ كَٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: Otherwise, shall We make the obedient like the sinners?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: What has happened to you? How do you judge?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ كِتَـٰبٌ فِيهِ تَدْرُسُونَ
verses.text: Do you have a book in which you read

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لَكُمْ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.text: that for you there is what you choose?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَـٰنٌ عَلَيْنَا بَـٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: Or do you have oaths sworn by Us, remaining effective up to the Day of Judgment, that you will get what you decide?

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلْهُمْ أَيُّهُم بِذَٰلِكَ زَعِيمٌ
verses.text: Ask them which of them stands surety for that.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Or do they have associate-gods (who have guaranteed safety for them)? Then, let them bring their associate-gods, if they are true.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when the Shin will be exposed, and they will be called upon to prostrate themselves, they will not be able to.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَـٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: With their eyes downcast, they will be enveloped by ignominy. They used to be called upon to prostrate when they were healthy (but they did not.)

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَرْنِى وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: So, leave Me alone with those who reject this discourse. We will draw them on little by little (towards Hell) from a way they do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُمْلِى لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ كَيْدِى مَتِينٌ
verses.text: And I give them respite. Indeed, My plan is firm.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.text: Is it that you ask them for a fee, due to which they are burdened with debt?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have the (knowledge of the) Unseen, and they write it down?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌ
verses.text: So, remain patient with your Lord’s judgment, and be not like the Man of the Fish, he cried out while he was in anguish.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌ
verses.text: Had not a favour from His Lord come to his help, he would have been cast in the wilderness in a reproachable state.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: Then his Lord chose him, and made him one of the righteous.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَـٰرِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: And indeed the disbelievers seem to trip you up with their glances when they hear the Reminder, and say, “He is a madman indeed.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And it is nothing else but a Reminder for all the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: The Imminent Happening!

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: What is the Imminent Happening?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: And what can let you know what the Imminent happening is?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادٌۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ
verses.text: Thamūd and ‘Ād had denied (the happening of) the Shocking Event (the Day of Judgment).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا ثَمُودُ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِٱلطَّاغِيَةِ
verses.text: As for Thamūd, they were destroyed by that (dreadful cry), which exceeded all limits.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
verses.text: And as for ‘Ād, they were destroyed by a violent windstorm

verses.arabicUthmani: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
verses.text: that He imposed on them for seven nights and eight consecutive days; so you could see them thrown on the ground, as if they were trunks of hollow palm-trees.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ
verses.text: Now, do you see any remnant of them?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَـٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
verses.text: And Fir‘aun (Pharaoh) and those before him and the overthrown towns came up with evil,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
verses.text: and they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with an extremely severe seizure.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
verses.text: When the water overflowed (in the Deluge of NūH), We let you (O mankind,) board the floating ship,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
verses.text: so that We make it a reminder for you, and so that a preserving ear (that hears their story) may preserve it.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
verses.text: Then, once the Trumpet will be blown for the first time,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً
verses.text: and the earth and the mountains will be lifted and crushed into pieces with a single blow,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
verses.text: then on that Day the Happening will happen,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاهِيَةٌ
verses.text: and the sky will burst apart, while it will have become frail on that day.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ
verses.text: And the angels will be on its borders. And on that Day, the Throne of your Lord will be carried above them by eight (angels).

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
verses.text: On that day, you will be brought forward in a way that no secret of yours will remain secret.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
verses.text: Now, as for him who is given his book in his right hand, he will say (to his colleagues), “Come here, read my book.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَـٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.text: I was sure that I would encounter my reckoning.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
verses.text: So he will be in a well-pleasing life

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ
verses.text: in a lofty garden,

verses.arabicUthmani: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ
verses.text: the fruits of which will be close at hand.

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
verses.text: (It will be said to such people,) “Eat and drink with pleasure, as a reward for what you did in advance during past days.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
verses.text: As for him who will be given his book in his left hand, he will say, “ Oh, would that I had not been given my book,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.text: and I had never known what my account is!

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ
verses.text: Oh, would that it (death) had been the end of the matter!

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنِّى مَالِيَهْ ۜ
verses.text: My wealth has not been of any use to me.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَـٰنِيَهْ
verses.text: My power has gone from me for good.”

verses.arabicUthmani: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
verses.text: (Then it will be said to angels,) “Seize him, then put a collar around his neck,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
verses.text: and then, let him burn in the blazing fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
verses.text: Thereafter, fasten him with a chain the measure of which is seventy hands.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: Indeed, he did not believe in Allah, the Almighty,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.text: and did not persuade (others) to feed the needy.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هَـٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌ
verses.text: So, he has no friend here today,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنْ غِسْلِينٍ
verses.text: nor any food except that which comes out from wounds when washing,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَأْكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْخَـٰطِـُٔونَ
verses.text: which is eaten by none but the sinners.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: I swear by what you see,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and what you do not see,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: it is surely the speech of a noble Messenger, (that he conveys from Allah).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: and it is not the speech of a poet, (but) little you believe,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: nor is it the speech of a soothsayer, (but) little you heed to the advice.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It is a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ
verses.text: Had he (the prophet) forged some statements in Our name,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَأَخَذْنَا مِنْهُ بِٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: We would have certainly seized him by the right hand,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعْنَا مِنْهُ ٱلْوَتِينَ
verses.text: and then severed his life-artery,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ
verses.text: and none of you could have saved him from it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذْكِرَةٌ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: It is infact a Reminder for the God-fearing.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَنَعْلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: And, of course, We know that among you there are deniers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَسْرَةٌ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: And surely, it is a cause of remorse for the disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: And it is surely an absolute truth.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So, pronounce the purity of the name of your magnificent Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَأَلَ سَآئِلٌۢ بِعَذَابٍ وَاقِعٍ
verses.text: A demanding person has asked for the punishment that is going to befall

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّلْكَـٰفِرِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُۥ دَافِعٌ
verses.text: the disbelievers; there is no one to avert it,

verses.arabicUthmani: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِى ٱلْمَعَارِجِ
verses.text: (and it will come) from Allah, the Lord of the stairways,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ
verses.text: to whom ascend the angels and the Spirit in a day the length of which is fifty thousand years.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا
verses.text: So, observe patience, a good patience.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ يَرَوْنَهُۥ بَعِيدًا
verses.text: They see it far off,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَرَىٰهُ قَرِيبًا
verses.text: and We see it near.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَكُونُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ كَٱلْمُهْلِ
verses.text: (This punishment will befall) on the Day when the sky will be like dregs of oil,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ
verses.text: and the mountains will be like dyed wool,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَسْـَٔلُ حَمِيمٌ حَمِيمًا
verses.text: and no friend will ask about any friend,

verses.arabicUthmani: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ ۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِى مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذٍۭ بِبَنِيهِ
verses.text: (though) they will be made to see each other. A guilty person will desire that he may be able to ransom himself from the torment of that day even by his sons,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَـٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَأَخِيهِ
verses.text: and his wife and his brother,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَصِيلَتِهِ ٱلَّتِى تُـْٔوِيهِ
verses.text: and his kindred that sheltered him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
verses.text: and all those on earth, then he may redeem himself.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ
verses.text: By no means! It is the flaming fire

verses.arabicUthmani: نَزَّاعَةً لِّلشَّوَىٰ
verses.text: that will pull out the skin of the scalp.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَدْعُوا۟ مَنْ أَدْبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: It will call him who had turned his back and fled away (from the truth)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَمَعَ فَأَوْعَىٰٓ
verses.text: and accumulated (wealth) and hoarded (it).

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا
verses.text: Indeed man is created weak in courage,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا
verses.text: very upset when touched by evil,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلْخَيْرُ مَنُوعًا
verses.text: and very niggard when visited by good (fortune),

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.text: except the performers of Salāh,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ دَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: who are regular in their Salāh,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ مَّعْلُومٌ
verses.text: and those in whose riches there is a specified right

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
verses.text: for the one who asks and the one who is deprived,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُصَدِّقُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: and those who believe in the Day of Judgment as true,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
verses.text: and those who are fearful of the torment of their Lord-

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّهِمْ غَيْرُ مَأْمُونٍ
verses.text: -Indeed the torment of their Lord is not something to be fearless from.-

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَـٰفِظُونَ
verses.text: and those who guard their private parts,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
verses.text: except from their wives and those (slave-girls) owned by their hands,- because they are not to be blamed,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
verses.text: but the one who seeks (sexual gratification) beyond that, then such people are the transgressors,-

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَـٰنَـٰتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَٰعُونَ
verses.text: and those who are careful about their trusts and covenants,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِشَهَـٰدَٰتِهِمْ قَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: and those who are upright in their testimonies,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ
verses.text: and those who take due care of their Salāh .

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ مُّكْرَمُونَ
verses.text: Those will be honoured in gardens (of Jannah ).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَالِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ قِبَلَكَ مُهْطِعِينَ
verses.text: So what has happened to those who disbelieve that they are rushing towards you

verses.arabicUthmani: عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ عِزِينَ
verses.text: from the right and from the left, in groups?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ
verses.text: Does every one of them aspire to be admitted to the garden of bliss?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّمَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: By no means! We have created them from what they know.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
verses.text: So, I swear by the Lord of the points of sunrise and those of sunset, We are powerful

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
verses.text: to bring those better than them in their place, and We are not to be frustrated.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: So, leave them involved in pastime and play until they encounter their Day, which they are promised,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ
verses.text: the Day they will come out of the graves quickly, as if they were rushing toward idols,

verses.arabicUthmani: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: with their eyes downcast, enveloped by ignominy. That is the Day, which they were being promised.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: We sent NūH to his people (and said to him): “Warn your people before a painful punishment comes to them.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: He said, “O my people, I openly warn you

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: that you must worship Allah, and fear Him, and obey me,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: and Allah will forgive you your sins, and will respite you to an appointed term. Indeed when Allah’s term comes, it is not deferred, if you only know!”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
verses.text: He said, “My Lord, I have called my people night and day,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًا
verses.text: but my call added only to their flight (from the truth).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصَـٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
verses.text: Whenever I called them, so that You might forgive them, they put their fingers into their ears, and wrapped their clothes around themselves, and grew obstinate, and waxed proud in extreme arrogance.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُهُمْ جِهَارًا
verses.text: Then I called them loudly,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
verses.text: and then I spoke to them in public and spoke to them in private.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
verses.text: So I said, ‘Pray to your Lord for your forgiveness,- Indeed He is Very-Forgiving, -

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا
verses.text: and He will cause the heavens to rain upon you in abundance,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَٰلٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَـٰرًا
verses.text: and will help you with riches and sons, and will cause gardens to grow for you, and cause rivers to flow for you.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
verses.text: What has happened to you that you do not appreciate the Majesty of Allah,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
verses.text: while He has created you in different phases?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
verses.text: Did you not see how Allah has created seven heavens one upon another,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
verses.text: and has made the moon a light therein, and made the sun a lamp?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
verses.text: And Allah has caused you to grow well out of the earth,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا
verses.text: then He will send you back into it, and will bring you forth once again.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
verses.text: And Allah has made the earth a spread for you,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّتَسْلُكُوا۟ مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا
verses.text: so that you may go about its broad ways.’”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
verses.text: And said NūH, “My Lord, they disobeyed me, and followed him whose wealth and children added nothing to him but loss,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا
verses.text: and they devised a mighty plot,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
verses.text: and said (to their people), “Never forsake your gods, and never forsake Wadd, nor Suwā‘, nor Yaghūth and Ya‘ūq and Nasr.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَـٰلًا
verses.text: And they have led many astray. And (O my Lord,) let not the wrongdoers progress in anything but deviation from the right path.”

verses.arabicUthmani: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٔـٰتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
verses.text: Because of their sins they were drowned, and then admitted into the Fire. So they found no helpers for them besides Allah.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
verses.text: And said NūH, “My Lord, do not leave on earth even a single inhabitant (surviving) out of the disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
verses.text: If You leave them (surviving), they will lead Your servants astray, and will beget none but a sinful disbeliever.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوَٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
verses.text: My Lord, grant pardon to me, and to my parents, and to everyone who enters my home as a believer, and to all the believing men and believing women, and do not increase the wrongdoers but in ruin.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أُوحِىَ إِلَىَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْءَانًا عَجَبًا
verses.text: Say, “It has been revealed to me that a group from Jinn has listened (to the Qur’ān), and said (to their people), ‘Indeed we have heard an amazing Recital (Qur’ān)

verses.arabicUthmani: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًا
verses.text: that guides to the right way, so we have believed in it, and we will never associate a partner with our Lord.’

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ تَعَـٰلَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا ٱتَّخَذَ صَـٰحِبَةً وَلَا وَلَدًا
verses.text: and (then the Jinns started talking to each other) that exalted is the Glory of our Lord; He has taken neither a wife, nor a son,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطًا
verses.text: and that the fools among us used to attribute to Allah extremely absurd things,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا
verses.text: and that we thought that the humans and the Jinn would never tell a lie about Allah, (therefore, we had followed them in shirk under this impression),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالٌ مِّنَ ٱلْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًا
verses.text: and that some guys from human beings used to seek refuge with some guys of the Jinn, and thus they increased them (the Jinns) in arrogance,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا۟ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدًا
verses.text: and that they (humans) thought as you (O Jinns) thought that Allah will never resurrect anyone,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدْنَـٰهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًا شَدِيدًا وَشُهُبًا
verses.text: and that we sought (to reach) the sky, but we found it filled with stern guards and flames,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَـٰعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ ۖ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ ٱلْـَٔانَ يَجِدْ لَهُۥ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا
verses.text: and that we used to sit at places therein to listen; but if one will (try to) listen now, he will find a flame in ambush for him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا
verses.text: and that we do not know whether it is a bad end that is intended for those on earth, or their Lord has intended for them a right thing,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّـٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًا
verses.text: and that some of us are (already) righteous, and some of us are otherwise, and we were on different ways;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
verses.text: and that we have now believed that we can never frustrate Allah on the earth, nor can we baffle Him by escape,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
verses.text: and that when we heard the Guiding Discourse, we believed in it; so if one believes in his Lord, he will have no fear of either any curtailment (in his reward) or any excess (in his punishment),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ ۖ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا
verses.text: and that some of us are Muslims, and some of us are unjust. Now, those who submitted to Islam have found out the right path,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا۟ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًا
verses.text: As for the unjust, they have become firewood for Hell.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقَـٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَـٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا
verses.text: “(And it is also revealed to me) that if they (the people of Makkah) had stood firm on the (right) way, We would have supplied water to them in abundance,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًا
verses.text: so that We test them thereby; and if one turns away from the remembrance of his Lord, He will thrust him into a severe torment,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسَـٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا
verses.text: and that masājid (mosques) belong to Allah; so, do not invoke anyone along with Allah,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا۟ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًا
verses.text: and that when Allah’s servant stood invoking Him, they almost rushed on him in crowds.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
verses.text: Say, “I invoke my Lord, and do not associate anyone with Him.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنِّى لَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا رَشَدًا
verses.text: Say, “I possess no power to cause you any harm or bring you to a right way.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا
verses.text: Say, “No one can ever save me from Allah, and I can never find a refuge save with Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا بَلَـٰغًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَـٰلَـٰتِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يَعْصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
verses.text: However, (I have been given power) of conveying (commands) from Allah, and His messages. The one who disobeys Allah and His Messenger, for him there is the fire of Hell, wherein such people will live forever.

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَضْعَفُ نَاصِرًا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدًا
verses.text: (The disbelievers will continue denying the truth and mock at it) until when they will see what they are promised, they will know whose supporters are weaker, and whose numbers are less.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا
verses.text: Say, “I do not know whether that which you are promised is near, or my Lord has appointed for it a distant term.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
verses.text: (He is the) Knower of the Unseen. So He does not let anyone know the Unseen created by Him,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسْلُكُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِۦ رَصَدًا
verses.text: except a messenger whom He chooses (to inform through revelation), and then He appoints (angels as) watching guards before him and behind him, (so that devils may not tamper with the divine revelation,)

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا۟ رِسَـٰلَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًۢا
verses.text: so that He knows that they (angels) have conveyed the messages of their Lord. And He has encompassed all that is with them, and has comprehensive knowledge of every thing by numbers.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُزَّمِّلُ
verses.text: O you, wrapped up in clothes,

verses.arabicUthmani: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
verses.text: stand at night (for prayer) except a little-

verses.arabicUthmani: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا
verses.text: -half of it, or make it a little less,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا
verses.text: or make it a little more; and recite the Qur’ān clearly with tartīl (in a distinct and measured tone).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا سَنُلْقِى عَلَيْكَ قَوْلًا ثَقِيلًا
verses.text: We are going to send down to you a weighty discourse.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
verses.text: Truly, rising by night (for prayer of tahajjud) is the most effective way to subdue (one’s base self) and to make speech more upright.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا
verses.text: Surely, in daytime, you have a lengthy work to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
verses.text: And remember the name of your Lord, and devote yourself to Him with exclusive devotion.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
verses.text: He is the Lord of the East and the West; there is no god but He; so take Him for (your) Guardian.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
verses.text: And bear patiently what they (the opponents) say, and part with them in a beautiful manner.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
verses.text: And leave Me alone (to deal) with the deniers, the people of luxury, and give them respite for a while.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا
verses.text: Surely with Us are fetters and flaming fire,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.text: and food that chokes, and a painful punishment

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
verses.text: on the Day when the earth and the mountains will quake, and the mountains will turn into a slipping heap of sand.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شَـٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
verses.text: (O people,) We have sent to you a messenger, as a witness over you, just as We sent a messenger to Fir‘aun (Pharaoh).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا
verses.text: Then, Fir‘aun disobeyed the messenger; so We seized him with a severe seizure.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدَٰنَ شِيبًا
verses.text: So, if you disbelieve, how will you save yourself from a day that will turn the small boys into grey-headed old men,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ ۚ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
verses.text: whereby the sky will burst apart. His promise has to be fulfilled.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Indeed, this is a reminder; so let anyone who so wishes, adopt a way to his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَىِ ٱلَّيْلِ وَنِصْفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةٌ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْضَىٰ ۙ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُ ۚ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا ۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًا ۚ وَٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌۢ
verses.text: Your Lord knows that you stand (in prayer) for nearly two thirds of the night, and (at times) for half of it, and (at times) for one third of it, and (so do) a group of those who are with you. And Allah measures the night and the day. He knows that you (O Muslims,) cannot do it in regular way; therefore He turned to you in mercy.Now, recite as much of the Qur’ān as is easy (for you). He knows that some of you may be sick, and others traveling in the land, seeking the grace of Allah, and yet others fighting in Allah’s way. Therefore, recite as much of it as is easy. And establish Salāh, and pay Zakāh, and advance to Allah a goodly loan. And whatever good you will send ahead for your own-selves, you will find it with Allah much better in condition, and much greater in reward. And seek forgiveness from Allah. Indeed Allah is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُدَّثِّرُ
verses.text: O you, enveloped in a mantle,

verses.arabicUthmani: قُمْ فَأَنذِرْ
verses.text: stand up and warn,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرْ
verses.text: and pronounce the greatness of your Lord,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثِيَابَكَ فَطَهِّرْ
verses.text: and purify your clothes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلرُّجْزَ فَٱهْجُرْ
verses.text: and keep away from filth,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَمْنُن تَسْتَكْثِرُ
verses.text: and do not do a favour (to anyone merely) to seek more (in return).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِرَبِّكَ فَٱصْبِرْ
verses.text: And for the sake of your Lord, observe patience.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا نُقِرَ فِى ٱلنَّاقُورِ
verses.text: For when the trumpet will be blown,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَٰلِكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَوْمٌ عَسِيرٌ
verses.text: that day will be a difficult day,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ غَيْرُ يَسِيرٍ
verses.text: not easy for the disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَرْنِى وَمَنْ خَلَقْتُ وَحِيدًا
verses.text: Leave me alone (to deal) with the one whom I created lonely,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْتُ لَهُۥ مَالًا مَّمْدُودًا
verses.text: and gave him extensive wealth,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَنِينَ شُهُودًا
verses.text: and sons present before (his) eyes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَهَّدتُّ لَهُۥ تَمْهِيدًا
verses.text: and extended (power and honour) to him pretty well.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يَطْمَعُ أَنْ أَزِيدَ
verses.text: Still, he aspires that I should give him more.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا عَنِيدًا
verses.text: Never! He is inimical towards Our verses.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَأُرْهِقُهُۥ صَعُودًا
verses.text: I will force him to climb the mountain Sa‘ūd.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَ
verses.text: He pondered and surmised.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقُتِلَ كَيْفَ قَدَّرَ
verses.text: Death onto him! How (bad) is the surmise he put forward!

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ قُتِلَ كَيْفَ قَدَّرَ
verses.text: Again, death unto him! How (bad) is the surmise he put forward!

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ نَظَرَ
verses.text: Then he looked (to those around him,)

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ عَبَسَ وَبَسَرَ
verses.text: then he frowned and scowled,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ
verses.text: then turned his back, and waxed proud,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ
verses.text: then said, “This is nothing but traditional magic;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا قَوْلُ ٱلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: this is nothing but saying of a mortal.”

verses.arabicUthmani: سَأُصْلِيهِ سَقَرَ
verses.text: I will put him into Saqar (Hell).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ
verses.text: And what can let you know what Saqar is?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا تُبْقِى وَلَا تَذَرُ
verses.text: It neither spares (anything inside it from burning) nor leaves (any disbeliever outside).

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوَّاحَةٌ لِّلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: It will disfigure the skins.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَيْهَا تِسْعَةَ عَشَرَ
verses.text: Appointed on it are nineteen (wardens).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا جَعَلْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةً ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَيَزْدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِيمَـٰنًا ۙ وَلَا يَرْتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۙ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ وَٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَـٰذَا مَثَلًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَمَا هِىَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَىٰ لِلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: And We did not make wardens of the Fire but (from) angels, and did not fix their number but as a test for those who disbelieve, so that those who are given the Book may come to believe, and those who believe may improve in belief, and so that those who are given the Book and those who believe may not doubt (its correctness), and so that those having malady in their hearts and the disbelievers say, “What has Allah meant by this strange statement?” Thus Allah lets go astray whomever He wills, and leads to the right path whomever He wills. And no one knows the hosts of your Lord but He. And this is nothing else but a reminder for mankind.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا وَٱلْقَمَرِ
verses.text: Truly, I swear by the moon,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذْ أَدْبَرَ
verses.text: and by the night when it goes back,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَآ أَسْفَرَ
verses.text: and by the morning when it becomes bright,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا لَإِحْدَى ٱلْكُبَرِ
verses.text: it (Saqar : Hell) is one of the greatest things

verses.arabicUthmani: نَذِيرًا لِّلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: as a warning to the mankind,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ
verses.text: to the one from among you who wishes to come forward (towards good deeds) or to go back (from them).

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ رَهِينَةٌ
verses.text: Everyone will be detained (in the Hell) because of what he did,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: except the People of the Right, (i.e. those who will be given their Book of Deeds in their right hands)

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: who will be in gardens, asking

verses.arabicUthmani: عَنِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: about the guilty persons,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا سَلَكَكُمْ فِى سَقَرَ
verses.text: “What has brought you to Saqar? (Hell)”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَمْ نَكُ مِنَ ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.text: They will say, “We were not among those who offered Salāh , (obligatory prayer)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَمْ نَكُ نُطْعِمُ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ
verses.text: and we did not give food to the needy,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ ٱلْخَآئِضِينَ
verses.text: and we indulged (in mocking at the truth) along with those who indulged,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُنَّا نُكَذِّبُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: and we used to deny the Day of Requital,

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰٓ أَتَىٰنَا ٱلْيَقِينُ
verses.text: until when we were overtaken by that which is certain.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمْ شَفَـٰعَةُ ٱلشَّـٰفِعِينَ
verses.text: Then intercession of intercessors will not benefit them.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا لَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلتَّذْكِرَةِ مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: So what has happened to them that they are turning away from the Reminder,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُمْ حُمُرٌ مُّسْتَنفِرَةٌ
verses.text: as if they were wild donkeys,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَّتْ مِن قَسْوَرَةٍۭ
verses.text: fleeing from a lion?

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً
verses.text: Rather, every one of them wishes that he should be given unrolled (divine) scriptures.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا يَخَافُونَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ
verses.text: Never! But they do not fear the Hereafter.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذْكِرَةٌ
verses.text: Never! Indeed, this is a Reminder.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.text: So, whoever so wishes may take advice from it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ
verses.text: And they will not take advice unless Allah so wills. He is worthy to be feared, and worthy to forgive.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ
verses.text: I swear by the Day of Resurrection,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلنَّفْسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ
verses.text: and I swear by the self-reproaching conscience, (that Resurrection is a reality.)

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُۥ
verses.text: Does man think that We will never reassemble his bones?

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ
verses.text: Why (can We) not (do so), while We are able to reset (even) his fingertips perfectly?

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ يُرِيدُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ لِيَفْجُرَ أَمَامَهُۥ
verses.text: But man wishes to go on violating Allah’s injunctions (even in future) ahead of him.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ
verses.text: He asks, “When will be this Day of Resurrection?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا بَرِقَ ٱلْبَصَرُ
verses.text: So, when the eyes will be dazzled,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَسَفَ ٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.text: and the moon will lose its light,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجُمِعَ ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.text: and the sun and the moon will be joined together,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ أَيْنَ ٱلْمَفَرُّ
verses.text: on that day man will say, “Where to escape?”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَا وَزَرَ
verses.text: Never! There will be no refuge at all.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمُسْتَقَرُّ
verses.text: On that day, towards your Lord will be the destination (of everyone.)

verses.arabicUthmani: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
verses.text: Man will be informed of what he sent ahead and what he left behind.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦ بَصِيرَةٌ
verses.text: Rather, man will be a witness against himself,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ أَلْقَىٰ مَعَاذِيرَهُۥ
verses.text: even though he may offer his excuses.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
verses.text: (O Prophet,) do not move your tongue (during revelation) for (reciting) it (the Qur’ān) to receive it in hurry.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا جَمْعَهُۥ وَقُرْءَانَهُۥ
verses.text: It is surely undertaken by Us to store it (in your heart), and to let it be recited (by you after revelation is completed).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا قَرَأْنَـٰهُ فَٱتَّبِعْ قُرْءَانَهُۥ
verses.text: Therefore, when it is recited by Us (through the angel), follow its recitation (by concentration of your heart).

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا بَيَانَهُۥ
verses.text: Then, it is undertaken by Us to explain it.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا بَلْ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ
verses.text: Never, (your denial of Resurrection is never based on any sound reason!) Instead, you love that which is immediate,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَذَرُونَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ
verses.text: and neglect the Hereafter.

verses.arabicUthmani: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاضِرَةٌ
verses.text: Many faces, that day, will be glowing,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٌ
verses.text: looking towards their Lord,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بَاسِرَةٌ
verses.text: and many faces, that day, will be gloomy,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَظُنُّ أَن يُفْعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةٌ
verses.text: realizing that a back-breaking calamity is going to be afflicted on them.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلتَّرَاقِىَ
verses.text: Never, (you will never remain in this world forever!) When the soul (of a patient) reaches the clavicles,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقِيلَ مَنْ ۜ رَاقٍ
verses.text: and it is said, “Who is an enchanter (that can save him?)”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ ٱلْفِرَاقُ
verses.text: and he realizes that it is (the time of) departure (from the world,)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْتَفَّتِ ٱلسَّاقُ بِٱلسَّاقِ
verses.text: and one shank is intertwined with the other shank,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمَسَاقُ
verses.text: then on that day, it is to your Lord that one has to be driven.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ
verses.text: So (the denier of the Hereafter) neither believed, nor prayed,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَـٰكِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: but rejected the truth and turned away (from it),

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ يَتَمَطَّىٰٓ
verses.text: then he went to his home, puffed up with pride.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوْلَىٰ
verses.text: (It will be said to such a man,) Woe to you, then woe to you!

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَوْلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوْلَىٰٓ
verses.text: Again, woe to you, then woe to you!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَن يُتْرَكَ سُدًى
verses.text: Does man presume that he will be left unchecked?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِّن مَّنِىٍّ يُمْنَىٰ
verses.text: Was he not an ejaculated drop of semen?

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
verses.text: Then he became a clot of blood, then He created (him) and made (him) perfect,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلَ مِنْهُ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.text: and made from him two kinds, male and female.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْـِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
verses.text: Has He no power to give life to the dead?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
verses.text: There has come upon man a period of time in which he was nothing worth mentioning.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
verses.text: We have created man from a mixed sperm-drop to put him to a test; then We made him able to hear, able to see.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
verses.text: We have shown him the way to be either grateful or ungrateful.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَلَـٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَـٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
verses.text: We have prepared, for the disbelievers, shackles and iron-collars and a blazing Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
verses.text: Indeed, the righteous will have a drink from a goblet, blended with (a drink from) Camphor

verses.arabicUthmani: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
verses.text: that will be a spring from which Allah’s servants will drink, making it flow (wherever they wish) profusely.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
verses.text: They (are the ones who) fulfill their vows, and fear a day whose evil (events) will spread far and wide,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
verses.text: and they give food, out of their love for Him (Allah), to the needy, and the orphan, and the captive,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
verses.text: (saying to them,) “We feed you only for the sake of Allah; we have no intention of (receiving) either a return from you or thanks.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
verses.text: In fact, we are fearful of a day, from the side of our Lord, that will be frowning, extremely malignant.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
verses.text: So Allah will save them from the evil of that day, and will grant them bloom and delight,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
verses.text: and will give them, in return for their patience, Paradise and (garments of) silk,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
verses.text: wherein they will be reclining on couches, feeling neither heat of the sun nor intense cold.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَـٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
verses.text: And shades of gardens will be hanging low on them, and their fruits will be placed totally under their command.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
verses.text: Circulated among them will be vessels of silver, and cups that will be (as transparent as) crystals,

verses.arabicUthmani: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
verses.text: -crystals (as shining as if made) of silver, measured by those (who filled them) with due measure.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
verses.text: And they will be served with goblet of a drink blended with ginger,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
verses.text: (acquired from) a spring therein called Salsabīl.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
verses.text: And circling around them will be serving boys, blessed with eternal youth; when you would see them, you would take them as scattered pearls.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
verses.text: When you will look around there, you will see the Bliss and a magnificent realm.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
verses.text: Upon them will be garments of green sundus (a kind of fine silk), and of istabraq (a kind of thick silk), and they will be adorned by bracelets of silver. Their Lord will give them a pure beverage to drink:

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
verses.text: “This is a reward for you, and your effort has been appreciated.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
verses.text: Indeed we have revealed to you the Qur’ān through a gradual process.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
verses.text: So, be steadfast patiently in (obeying) your Lord’s command, and do not obey any one of them who is sinner or ungrateful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
verses.text: And pronounce the name of Allah morning and evening.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
verses.text: And in some parts of night prostrate yourself before Him, and pronounce His purity for long times at night.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
verses.text: In fact these people love that which is immediate, and neglect a Heavy Day ahead of them.

verses.arabicUthmani: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَـٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
verses.text: We have created them and have made their joints strong. And whenever We will, We would replace them with others like them, a total replacement.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Indeed, this is a reminder; so let anyone who so wishes, adopt a way to his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
verses.text: And you will not so wish unless Allah so wills. Indeed Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
verses.text: He admits whomsoever He wills to His mercy. As for the wrongdoers, He has prepared for them a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْمُرْسَلَـٰتِ عُرْفًا
verses.text: (I swear) by those (winds) that are sent one after the other,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْعَـٰصِفَـٰتِ عَصْفًا
verses.text: and by those that blow violently,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّـٰشِرَٰتِ نَشْرًا
verses.text: and by those that spread (clouds) all over,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْفَـٰرِقَـٰتِ فَرْقًا
verses.text: and by those (angels) who differentiate (between right and wrong) distinctly,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُلْقِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا
verses.text: then bring down the advice,

verses.arabicUthmani: عُذْرًا أَوْ نُذْرًا
verses.text: leaving no excuse (for the disbelievers) or giving warnings,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
verses.text: that which you are promised is sure to happen.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ طُمِسَتْ
verses.text: So, when the stars will be extinguished,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ فُرِجَتْ
verses.text: and when the sky will be split,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ نُسِفَتْ
verses.text: and when the mountains will be blown away as dust,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلرُّسُلُ أُقِّتَتْ
verses.text: and when the messengers will be assembled at the appointed time, (then all matters will be decided.)

verses.arabicUthmani: لِأَىِّ يَوْمٍ أُجِّلَتْ
verses.text: (Do you know) for which day has all this been delayed?

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيَوْمِ ٱلْفَصْلِ
verses.text: For the Day of Decision!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ
verses.text: And what may let you know what the Day of Decision is?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نُهْلِكِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: Did We not destroy the earlier people?

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ نُتْبِعُهُمُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: Then We will cause the later ones to follow them.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: Thus We deal with the guilty people.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَخْلُقكُّم مِّن مَّآءٍ مَّهِينٍ
verses.text: Did We not create you from a worthless fluid?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ
verses.text: Then We put it in a firm place of rest

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ قَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.text: for a known period.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَدَرْنَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْقَـٰدِرُونَ
verses.text: Thus We did (all this with perfect) measure; so We are the best to measure.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ كِفَاتًا
verses.text: Did We not make the earth a container that collects

verses.arabicUthmani: أَحْيَآءً وَأَمْوَٰتًا
verses.text: the living and the dead?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ شَـٰمِخَـٰتٍ وَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُم مَّآءً فُرَاتًا
verses.text: And We placed towering mountains therein, and provided you with sweet water to drink.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: (It will be said to them on that day,) “Push on to what you used to deny.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ ظِلٍّ ذِى ثَلَـٰثِ شُعَبٍ
verses.text: Push on to a canopy (of Hell’s smoke) having three branches,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا ظَلِيلٍ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ
verses.text: that neither has a comfortable shade, nor is it of any use against the scorching heat.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا تَرْمِى بِشَرَرٍ كَٱلْقَصْرِ
verses.text: It emits sparks (as huge) as castles,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُۥ جِمَـٰلَتٌ صُفْرٌ
verses.text: as if they were yellowish camels.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: This is the day when they will not speak,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يُؤْذَنُ لَهُمْ فَيَعْتَذِرُونَ
verses.text: nor will they be allowed to offer excuses.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ۖ جَمَعْنَـٰكُمْ وَٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: (It will be said to them,) “This is the Day of Decision. We have assembled you and the earlier ones together.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِن كَانَ لَكُمْ كَيْدٌ فَكِيدُونِ
verses.text: Now, if you have a trick, use the trick against Me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: Of course, the God-fearing will be amid shades and streams,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَوَٰكِهَ مِمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.text: and fruits of their desire.

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: It will be said to them, “Eat and drink with pleasure because of what you used to do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: This is how We reward those who do good deeds.
