verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُم مُّجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: “(O disbelievers,) eat and drink for a while! You are guilty ones.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ لَا يَرْكَعُونَ
verses.text: And when it is said to them, “Bow down (i.e. submit to Allah’s commands)”, they do not bow down.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that Day to the deniers!

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثٍۭ بَعْدَهُۥ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Now, in which discourse, after this, will they believe?

verses.arabicUthmani: عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: About what are they asking each other?

verses.arabicUthmani: عَنِ ٱلنَّبَإِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: About the Great Event

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ مُخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.text: in which they dispute!

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Indeed they will soon know.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Again, indeed they will soon know.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ مِهَـٰدًا
verses.text: Did We not make the earth a floor,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَوْتَادًا
verses.text: and the mountains bulwarks?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا
verses.text: And We have created you in pairs,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا نَوْمَكُمْ سُبَاتًا
verses.text: and made your sleep a source of rest,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا
verses.text: and made the night a covering,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشًا
verses.text: and made the day a source of livelihood.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَنَيْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعًا شِدَادًا
verses.text: And We have built seven strong (skies),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا سِرَاجًا وَهَّاجًا
verses.text: and created a luminous lamp (the sun).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمُعْصِرَٰتِ مَآءً ثَجَّاجًا
verses.text: And We have sent down abundant water from the rain-laden clouds,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّنُخْرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبًّا وَنَبَاتًا
verses.text: so that We bring out therewith grain and vegetation,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ أَلْفَافًا
verses.text: and thick gardens.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ كَانَ مِيقَـٰتًا
verses.text: Surely the Day of Decision is an appointed time,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا
verses.text: a day when the trumpet will be blown, so you will come in multitudes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ أَبْوَٰبًا
verses.text: and the sky will be opened, so it will become as gates,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ فَكَانَتْ سَرَابًا
verses.text: and the mountains will be set in motion, so they will be as mirage.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًا
verses.text: Surely Jahannam (the Hell) lurks in ambush.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّلطَّـٰغِينَ مَـَٔابًا
verses.text: (It is) abode for the rebellious people

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّـٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحْقَابًا
verses.text: who will be abiding in it for ages.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا
verses.text: They will taste nothing cool in it, nor a drink,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا حَمِيمًا وَغَسَّاقًا
verses.text: except boiling water and pus,

verses.arabicUthmani: جَزَآءً وِفَاقًا
verses.text: this being a punishment, fully commensurate (with their deeds).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ حِسَابًا
verses.text: They did not expect (to face) accounting (of their deeds),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كِذَّابًا
verses.text: and they rejected Our signs totally.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ كِتَـٰبًا
verses.text: And everything (from their deeds) is thoroughly recorded by Us in writing.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذُوقُوا۟ فَلَن نَّزِيدَكُمْ إِلَّا عَذَابًا
verses.text: “So now taste! We will add nothing to you but torment.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا
verses.text: Of course, the God-fearing will have great achievement,

verses.arabicUthmani: حَدَآئِقَ وَأَعْنَـٰبًا
verses.text: -gardens and grapes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَوَاعِبَ أَتْرَابًا
verses.text: and buxom maidens of matching age,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَأْسًا دِهَاقًا
verses.text: and goblets filled up to the brim.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًا
verses.text: They will not hear any vain talk therein, nor lies,

verses.arabicUthmani: جَزَآءً مِّن رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابًا
verses.text: this being a reward from their Lord, a well calculated grant,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا
verses.text: (from) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, the All-Merciful. No one will have power to address Him,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا
verses.text: on the Day when the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows. They will not speak, except the one who is permitted by the RaHmān (the All-Merciful Allah) and speaks aright.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
verses.text: That is the Day that is sure to come. So whoever so wishes may take refuge with his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَـٰكُمْ عَذَابًا قَرِيبًا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا
verses.text: We have warned you of an approaching torment (that will be inflicted) on a day when one will see what his hands have sent ahead, and the disbeliever will say, “O would that I had turned into dust.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّـٰزِعَـٰتِ غَرْقًا
verses.text: I swear by those (angels) who pull out (the souls of the infidels) with extreme force,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّـٰشِطَـٰتِ نَشْطًا
verses.text: and by those (angels) who untie the knot (of the souls of the believers) smoothly,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّـٰبِحَـٰتِ سَبْحًا
verses.text: and by those who float (in the atmosphere) swiftly,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلسَّـٰبِقَـٰتِ سَبْقًا
verses.text: then proceed forward quickly,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُدَبِّرَٰتِ أَمْرًا
verses.text: then manage (to do) everything (they are ordered to do,)

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلرَّاجِفَةُ
verses.text: (you will be resurrected) on the Day when the shocking event (i.e. the first blowing of the trumpet) will shock (everything),

verses.arabicUthmani: تَتْبَعُهَا ٱلرَّادِفَةُ
verses.text: followed by the next one (i.e. the second blowing of the trumpet.)

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلُوبٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاجِفَةٌ
verses.text: On that day, hearts (of people) will be throbbing,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَبْصَـٰرُهَا خَـٰشِعَةٌ
verses.text: with their eyes downcast.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُونَ أَءِنَّا لَمَرْدُودُونَ فِى ٱلْحَافِرَةِ
verses.text: They (the infidels) say, “Are we going to be brought back to our former state (of Life)?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَـٰمًا نَّخِرَةً
verses.text: Is it when we are turned into decayed bones?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ تِلْكَ إِذًا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌ
verses.text: They say, “If so, that will be a harmful homecoming.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
verses.text: In fact, it will be only a single harsh voice,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا هُم بِٱلسَّاهِرَةِ
verses.text: and in no time they will be (brought) into the plain (of Hashr).

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
verses.text: Has there come to you the narrative about Mūsā?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
verses.text: (Recall) when his Lord called to him in the blessed valley of Tuwā:

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
verses.text: “Go to Fir‘aun (Pharaoh). Indeed, he has crossed all bounds.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.text: And say (to him,) ‘Would you like to purify yourself,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَهْدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: and that I should guide you to your Lord, so that you fear (Him)?’”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَرَىٰهُ ٱلْـَٔايَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.text: So, he (Mūsā) showed him the biggest sign.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبَ وَعَصَىٰ
verses.text: But he rejected and disobeyed,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ يَسْعَىٰ
verses.text: then he turned back, and tried hard (to refute the Messenger),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَحَشَرَ فَنَادَىٰ
verses.text: then he gathered (his people) and shouted

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: and said, “I am your supreme lord.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخَذَهُ ٱللَّهُ نَكَالَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ وَٱلْأُولَىٰٓ
verses.text: So, Allah seized him for an exemplary punishment in the Hereafter and the present world.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ
verses.text: Indeed, there is a lesson for him who fears (Allah).

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
verses.text: Is your creation more difficult or that of the sky? He has built it,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّىٰهَا
verses.text: He has raised its height, then made it proper,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَىٰهَا
verses.text: and darkened its night, and brought forth its daylight,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَىٰهَآ
verses.text: and, after that, He spread out the earth.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرْعَىٰهَا
verses.text: From it, He brought out its water and its meadows,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَرْسَىٰهَا
verses.text: and firmly fixed the mountains,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ
verses.text: (all this) as a benefit to you and your cattle.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلطَّآمَّةُ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.text: So when the Greatest Havoc will take place

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.text: on the day when man will recall what he did,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ
verses.text: and the Hell will be exposed for all who see,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَن طَغَىٰ
verses.text: then for the one who had rebelled,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاثَرَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.text: and preferred the worldly life (to the Hereafter),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
verses.text: the Hell will be the abode,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ
verses.text: whereas for the one who feared to stand before his Lord, and restrained his self from the (evil) desire,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَنَّةَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
verses.text: the Paradise will be the abode.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَىٰهَا
verses.text: They ask you (O Prophet,) about the Hour (the Day of Judgment) as to when it will take place.

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيمَ أَنتَ مِن ذِكْرَىٰهَآ
verses.text: In which capacity are you to tell this?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ مُنتَهَىٰهَآ
verses.text: With your Lord is the final word about it.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُنذِرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰهَا
verses.text: You are only a warner for anyone who fears it.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَىٰهَا
verses.text: The day they will see it, it will seem to them as if they did not live (in the world) but only for one afternoon or for the morning thereof.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
verses.text: He (the Prophet) frowned and turned his face,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن جَآءَهُ ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ
verses.text: because the blind man came to him!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ لَعَلَّهُۥ يَزَّكَّىٰٓ
verses.text: What could tell you (O prophet about the prospects of the blind man?) May be, (if you had attended him properly,) he would have attained purity,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنفَعَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: or have received the advice, and the advice would have benefited him.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰ
verses.text: As for the one who does not care (about faith),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنتَ لَهُۥ تَصَدَّىٰ
verses.text: you are anxious to pursue him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا عَلَيْكَ أَلَّا يَزَّكَّىٰ
verses.text: while there is no blame on you, if he does not attain purity.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَن جَآءَكَ يَسْعَىٰ
verses.text: As regards the one who has come to you rushing eagerly,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ يَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: while he fears (Allah),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنتَ عَنْهُ تَلَهَّىٰ
verses.text: to him you pay no heed!

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّهَا تَذْكِرَةٌ
verses.text: Never! (you should never act in this way,) Indeed this (Qur’ān) is an advice.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.text: So, whoever so wills may pay heed to it.

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى صُحُفٍ مُّكَرَّمَةٍ
verses.text: It is (recorded) in those scripts (of the Preserved Tablet) that are honoured,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّرْفُوعَةٍ مُّطَهَّرَةٍۭ
verses.text: exalted, purified,

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَيْدِى سَفَرَةٍ
verses.text: in the hands of those scribes

verses.arabicUthmani: كِرَامٍۭ بَرَرَةٍ
verses.text: who are honorable, righteous.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُتِلَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَآ أَكْفَرَهُۥ
verses.text: Damned is the man! How ungrateful he is!

verses.arabicUthmani: مِنْ أَىِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ
verses.text: From which stuff did He (Allah) create him?

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ خَلَقَهُۥ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ
verses.text: from a drop of semen! He created him, and designed him in due proportion,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ٱلسَّبِيلَ يَسَّرَهُۥ
verses.text: then He made the way easy for him,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَمَاتَهُۥ فَأَقْبَرَهُۥ
verses.text: Later, he made him die, and put him into grave,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِذَا شَآءَ أَنشَرَهُۥ
verses.text: Thereafter, when He will intend, He will raise him up.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَآ أَمَرَهُۥ
verses.text: No! He has not yet fulfilled what He (Allah) had commanded him.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِلَىٰ طَعَامِهِۦٓ
verses.text: So, the man should consider his food,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنَّا صَبَبْنَا ٱلْمَآءَ صَبًّا
verses.text: how well We poured water,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ شَقَقْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ شَقًّا
verses.text: then how nicely We split the earth,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا حَبًّا
verses.text: then We grew in it grain,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعِنَبًا وَقَضْبًا
verses.text: and grapes and greens,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَزَيْتُونًا وَنَخْلًا
verses.text: and olive and date-palms,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحَدَآئِقَ غُلْبًا
verses.text: and gardens, full of thick trees,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَـٰكِهَةً وَأَبًّا
verses.text: and fruits and fodder,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ
verses.text: as a benefit for you and your cattle.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلصَّآخَّةُ
verses.text: So when the Deafening Noise will occur,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَفِرُّ ٱلْمَرْءُ مِنْ أَخِيهِ
verses.text: the Day when one will flee from his brother,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُمِّهِۦ وَأَبِيهِ
verses.text: and from his mother and father,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَـٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَبَنِيهِ
verses.text: and from his wife and sons,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنِيهِ
verses.text: every one of them will be too engaged in his own affairs to care for others.

verses.arabicUthmani: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ مُّسْفِرَةٌ
verses.text: Many faces, on that day, will be bright,

verses.arabicUthmani: ضَاحِكَةٌ مُّسْتَبْشِرَةٌ
verses.text: laughing, rejoicing,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ
verses.text: and many faces, on that day, will be stained with dust,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَرْهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌ
verses.text: covered by darkness.

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْكَفَرَةُ ٱلْفَجَرَةُ
verses.text: Those are the disbelievers, the nefarious.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا ٱلشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ
verses.text: When the sun will be folded up,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ ٱنكَدَرَتْ
verses.text: and when the stars will swoop down,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتْ
verses.text: and when the mountains will be set in motion,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْعِشَارُ عُطِّلَتْ
verses.text: and when the ten-months pregnant she-camels will be abandoned,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْوُحُوشُ حُشِرَتْ
verses.text: and when the wild beasts will be gathered together,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ سُجِّرَتْ
verses.text: and when the seas will be flared up,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّفُوسُ زُوِّجَتْ
verses.text: and when the people will be arranged in categories,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْمَوْءُۥدَةُ سُئِلَتْ
verses.text: and when the girl-child that was buried alive will be asked,

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَىِّ ذَنۢبٍ قُتِلَتْ
verses.text: for what sin she was killed,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلصُّحُفُ نُشِرَتْ
verses.text: and when the scrolls (of deeds) will be unrolled,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ كُشِطَتْ
verses.text: and when the sky will be stripped off,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَحِيمُ سُعِّرَتْ
verses.text: and when the Hell will be set ablaze,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَنَّةُ أُزْلِفَتْ
verses.text: and when the Paradise will be brought close,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّآ أَحْضَرَتْ
verses.text: then everyone will know what he (or she) has put forward.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلْخُنَّسِ
verses.text: So, I swear by those (stars) that recede,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْكُنَّسِ
verses.text: that proceed, that withdraw from the scene,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا عَسْعَسَ
verses.text: and by the night when it departs,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَا تَنَفَّسَ
verses.text: and the morning when it starts breathing,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: it (the Qur’ān) is surely the word of a noble messenger (Jibra’īl X),

verses.arabicUthmani: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
verses.text: the one possessing power and a high status with the Lord of the Throne,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّطَاعٍ ثَمَّ أَمِينٍ
verses.text: the one obeyed there, trusted.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: Your companion (Muhammad ) is not a madman,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: and he did see him (Jibra’īl X) on the clear horizon.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَى ٱلْغَيْبِ بِضَنِينٍ
verses.text: And he (the Prophet) is not stingy about (the news of) the unseen.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
verses.text: Nor is it the word of an outcast satan (devil).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَيْنَ تَذْهَبُونَ
verses.text: Then where are you going?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It is nothing else but a message of advice for all the worlds,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَسْتَقِيمَ
verses.text: for the benefit of any one from among you who intends to go straight.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And you cannot intend (to do anything) unless it is so willed by Allah, the Lord of all the worlds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنفَطَرَتْ
verses.text: When the sky will be cleft asunder,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْكَوَاكِبُ ٱنتَثَرَتْ
verses.text: and when the stars will disperse,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ فُجِّرَتْ
verses.text: and when the seas will be burst forth,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْقُبُورُ بُعْثِرَتْ
verses.text: and when the graves will be overturned,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ وَأَخَّرَتْ
verses.text: then one will know what he sent ahead and what he left behind.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
verses.text: O man! What has deceived you about your Gracious Lord,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّىٰكَ فَعَدَلَكَ
verses.text: who created you, then perfected you, then brought you in due proportion?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
verses.text: He composed you in whichever form He willed.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا بَلْ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Never! (i.e. one should never be heedless towards him.) But you deny the Requital,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ لَحَـٰفِظِينَ
verses.text: while (appointed) over you there are watchers,

verses.arabicUthmani: كِرَامًا كَـٰتِبِينَ
verses.text: who are noble, writers (of the deeds),

verses.arabicUthmani: يَعْلَمُونَ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: who know whatever you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ
verses.text: Surely the righteous will be in bliss,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ ٱلْفُجَّارَ لَفِى جَحِيمٍ
verses.text: and the sinners in Hell,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَصْلَوْنَهَا يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: in which they will enter on the Day of Requital,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُمْ عَنْهَا بِغَآئِبِينَ
verses.text: and they will not (be able to) keep away from it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: And what may let you know what the Day of Requital is?

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Again, what may let you know what the Day of Requital is?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
verses.text: A Day when no one will have power to do any thing for another! And command, on that Day, will belong to Allah (alone).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ
verses.text: Woe to the curtailers

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
verses.text: who, when they measure something to receive from people, take it in full,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمْ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمْ يُخْسِرُونَ
verses.text: and when they measure or weigh something to give it to them, give less than due.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَا يَظُنُّ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَنَّهُم مَّبْعُوثُونَ
verses.text: Do they not think that they have to be raised up

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: on a Great Day,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلنَّاسُ لِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: the Day when all the people will stand before the Lord of the worlds?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ
verses.text: Never! (i.e. they should never act in such a way.) Indeed the record of deeds of the sinners is in Sijjīn .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سِجِّينٌ
verses.text: And what may let you know what Sijjīn is?

verses.arabicUthmani: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ
verses.text: A register, inscribed!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe that day to the deniers,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: who deny the Day of Requital!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.text: And none denies it but every sinful transgressor.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, “(These are) tales of the ancients.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: No! But that which they used to commit has covered their hearts with rust.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
verses.text: No! Indeed they will be screened off from their Lord on that Day.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ لَصَالُوا۟ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: Then they will have to enter the Hell.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: Then it will be said, “This is what you used to deny.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
verses.text: No! The record of deeds of the righteous is in ‘Illiyyūn .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ
verses.text: And what may let you know what ‘Illiyyūn is ?

verses.arabicUthmani: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ
verses.text: A register inscribed,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَشْهَدُهُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.text: attended by those (angels) who are blessed with nearness to Allah!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ
verses.text: Indeed the righteous will be in absolute bliss.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: While (sitting) on thrones they will be watching (the scenes of Paradise).

verses.arabicUthmani: تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِهِمْ نَضْرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: You will recognize the glamour of bliss on their faces.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُسْقَوْنَ مِن رَّحِيقٍ مَّخْتُومٍ
verses.text: They will be served with a pure sealed wine to drink,

verses.arabicUthmani: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ
verses.text: the seal of which will be of musk.-It is this (bliss) in aspiring for which the competitors should race each other.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ
verses.text: -and it will be blended with (a drink from) Tasnīm ,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.text: a spring from which will drink those who are blessed with nearness.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.text: Indeed those who were guilty used to laugh at those who believed,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا مَرُّوا۟ بِهِمْ يَتَغَامَزُونَ
verses.text: and when they passed by them, they used to wink at one another,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ
verses.text: and when they went back to their family, they went enjoying their mockery,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.text: and when they saw them, they said, “Surely these are the ones who have gone astray”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أُرْسِلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ حَـٰفِظِينَ
verses.text: while they were not sent as watchmen over them.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.text: So, today those who believed will laugh at the disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: While (sitting) on thrones, they will be seeing

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: whether the disbelievers have been paid back for what they used to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنشَقَّتْ
verses.text: When the sky will split apart,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
verses.text: and will listen to (the command of) its Lord,- and it ought to,-

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْأَرْضُ مُدَّتْ
verses.text: and when the earth will be stretched (to give room to more people),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَلْقَتْ مَا فِيهَا وَتَخَلَّتْ
verses.text: and it will throw up whatever it contains, and will become empty,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
verses.text: and will listen to (the command of) its Lord,- and it ought to,- (then man will see the consequences of his deeds.)

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ
verses.text: O man, you have to work hard constantly to reach your Lord, and then you have to meet Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ
verses.text: So, as for him whose book (of deeds) will be given to him in his right hand,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَوْفَ يُحَاسَبُ حِسَابًا يَسِيرًا
verses.text: he will be called to account in an easy manner,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
verses.text: and he will go back to his people joyfully.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
verses.text: As for the one whose book (of deeds) will be given to him from his backside,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَوْفَ يَدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًا
verses.text: he will pray for death,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَصْلَىٰ سَعِيرًا
verses.text: and will enter the blazing fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فِىٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
verses.text: He had been joyful among his people (in the world).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ
verses.text: He thought he would never revert (to Allah).

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا
verses.text: No! Indeed his Lord was watchful over him.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلشَّفَقِ
verses.text: So, I swear by the twilight (after sunset),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ وَمَا وَسَقَ
verses.text: and by the night and what it envelops,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا ٱتَّسَقَ
verses.text: and by the moon when it develops at the full,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَتَرْكَبُنَّ طَبَقًا عَن طَبَقٍ
verses.text: you shall certainly ascend from stage to stage.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا لَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: So, what is wrong with them that they do not believe,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
verses.text: and when the Qur’ān is recited to them, they do not offer sajdah (prostration)?

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: Rather, those who disbelieve deny (the truth).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يُوعُونَ
verses.text: And Allah is most aware of what they store.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبَشِّرْهُم بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.text: So, give him the ‘good news’ of a painful punishment,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ
verses.text: but those who believed and did righteous deeds will have a reward that will never be interrupted.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْبُرُوجِ
verses.text: I swear by the sky, the one having stellar formations,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْمَوْعُودِ
verses.text: and by the Promised Day,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَشَاهِدٍ وَمَشْهُودٍ
verses.text: and by that which attends, and that which is attended,

verses.arabicUthmani: قُتِلَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأُخْدُودِ
verses.text: cursed were the People of the Trench,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلنَّارِ ذَاتِ ٱلْوَقُودِ
verses.text: the (people of the) fire that was rich with fuel,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ هُمْ عَلَيْهَا قُعُودٌ
verses.text: when they were sitting by it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌ
verses.text: and were watching what they were doing with the believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
verses.text: They punished them for nothing but that they believed in Allah, the All-Mighty, the Worthy of All Praise,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
verses.text: the One to whom belongs the Kingdom of the heavens and the earth. And Allah is witness over every thing.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
verses.text: Surely, those who persecuted the believing men and the believing women, then did not repent, -for them there is the torment of Jahannam (Hell), and for them there is the torment of burning.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
verses.text: As for those who believed and did righteous deeds, for them there are gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the big achievement.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ بَطْشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيدٌ
verses.text: The seizure of your Lord is severe indeed!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ يُبْدِئُ وَيُعِيدُ
verses.text: Surely He originates (creation) and repeats (it after death).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلْوَدُودُ
verses.text: And He is the Most-Forgiving, the Most-Loving,

verses.arabicUthmani: ذُو ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْمَجِيدُ
verses.text: the Master of the Throne, the Glorious.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ
verses.text: He is ever doer of what He intends.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْجُنُودِ
verses.text: Has there come to you the story of the forces,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِرْعَوْنَ وَثَمُودَ
verses.text: of Fir‘aun (Pharaoh) and Thamūd?

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى تَكْذِيبٍ
verses.text: But those who disbelieve are (engaged) in denying (the truth).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ مِن وَرَآئِهِم مُّحِيطٌۢ
verses.text: Allah has encompassed them from all sides.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ هُوَ قُرْءَانٌ مَّجِيدٌ
verses.text: The reality is that it is the glorious Qur’ān,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى لَوْحٍ مَّحْفُوظٍۭ
verses.text: (recorded) in the Preserved Tablet (LauH MaHfūZ).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ
verses.text: I swear by the sky and by the Night-Comer,-

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلطَّارِقُ
verses.text: -and what may let you know what the Night-Comer is?

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلنَّجْمُ ٱلثَّاقِبُ
verses.text: The star of piercing brightness!- -

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌ
verses.text: -there is no human being, but there is a watcher over him.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مِمَّ خُلِقَ
verses.text: So, let man consider of which stuff he is created.

verses.arabicUthmani: خُلِقَ مِن مَّآءٍ دَافِقٍ
verses.text: He is created of spouting water

verses.arabicUthmani: يَخْرُجُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ ٱلصُّلْبِ وَٱلتَّرَآئِبِ
verses.text: that comes out from between the loins and the chest-bones.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَجْعِهِۦ لَقَادِرٌ
verses.text: Surely He is Powerful to bring him back

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تُبْلَى ٱلسَّرَآئِرُ
verses.text: on a day when all the secrets will be searched out,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ
verses.text: and he will have neither strength (to defend), nor a supporter.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلرَّجْعِ
verses.text: I swear by the sky that rains,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضِ ذَاتِ ٱلصَّدْعِ
verses.text: and the earth that cracks open (for plants),

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلٌ فَصْلٌ
verses.text: this is a decisive word,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ بِٱلْهَزْلِ
verses.text: and it is not a joke.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًا
verses.text: They are devising plans,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَكِيدُ كَيْدًا
verses.text: and I Am devising plans.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَهِّلِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ أَمْهِلْهُمْ رُوَيْدًۢا
verses.text: So leave the disbelievers alone at the moment; give them respite for a while.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَبِّحِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ ٱلْأَعْلَى
verses.text: Pronounce the purity of the name of your most exalted Lord,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
verses.text: who created (everything), then made (it) well,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِى قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ
verses.text: and who determined a measure (for everything), then guided (it),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلْمَرْعَىٰ
verses.text: and who brought forth pasturage,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلَهُۥ غُثَآءً أَحْوَىٰ
verses.text: then turned it into a blackening stubble.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنُقْرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنسَىٰٓ
verses.text: We will make you recite, then you will not forget

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ
verses.text: except that which Allah wills. Indeed He knows what is manifest and what is hidden.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنُيَسِّرُكَ لِلْيُسْرَىٰ
verses.text: And We will facilitate for you (to reach) the easiest way.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَكِّرْ إِن نَّفَعَتِ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
verses.text: So, extend advice (to people) if advice is useful.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: The one who fears (Allah) will observe the advice,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَتَجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَشْقَى
verses.text: and it will be avoided by the most wretched one

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى يَصْلَى ٱلنَّارَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.text: who will enter the Biggest Fire,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
verses.text: then he will neither die therein, nor live (a desirable life).

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.text: Success is surely achieved by him who purifies himself,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَذَكَرَ ٱسْمَ رَبِّهِۦ فَصَلَّىٰ
verses.text: and pronounces the name of his Lord, then offers prayer.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ تُؤْثِرُونَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.text: But you prefer the worldly life,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
verses.text: while the Hereafter is much better and much more durable.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَفِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: Indeed this is (written) in the earlier divine scripts,

verses.arabicUthmani: صُحُفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: the scripts of Ibrāhīm and Mūsā.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْغَـٰشِيَةِ
verses.text: Has there come to you the description of the Overwhelming Event?

verses.arabicUthmani: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَـٰشِعَةٌ
verses.text: Many faces that day will be humbled,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَامِلَةٌ نَّاصِبَةٌ
verses.text: laboring, exhausted.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَصْلَىٰ نَارًا حَامِيَةً
verses.text: They will enter into the scorching fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: تُسْقَىٰ مِنْ عَيْنٍ ءَانِيَةٍ
verses.text: They will be made to drink water from a boiling spring.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّيْسَ لَهُمْ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٍ
verses.text: There will be no food for them except from a thorny plant

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يُسْمِنُ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِن جُوعٍ
verses.text: that will neither nourish, nor satisfy hunger.

verses.arabicUthmani: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاعِمَةٌ
verses.text: Many faces that day will be full of glamour,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّسَعْيِهَا رَاضِيَةٌ
verses.text: well pleased with their endeavor,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ
verses.text: in a lofty garden,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا لَـٰغِيَةً
verses.text: in which they will not hear any absurd talk.

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا عَيْنٌ جَارِيَةٌ
verses.text: In it there is a flowing spring.

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا سُرُرٌ مَّرْفُوعَةٌ
verses.text: In it there are elevated couches

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَكْوَابٌ مَّوْضُوعَةٌ
verses.text: and goblets, well placed,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَمَارِقُ مَصْفُوفَةٌ
verses.text: and cushions, arrayed

verses.arabicUthmani: وَزَرَابِىُّ مَبْثُوثَةٌ
verses.text: and carpets, spread around.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ
verses.text: So, do they not look at the camels how they are created,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيْفَ رُفِعَتْ
verses.text: and at the sky, how it is raised high,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِلَى ٱلْجِبَالِ كَيْفَ نُصِبَتْ
verses.text: and at the mountains, how they are installed,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَيْفَ سُطِحَتْ
verses.text: and at the earth, how it is spread out?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَكِّرْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُذَكِّرٌ
verses.text: So, (O Prophet,) keep on preaching; you are only a preacher.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّسْتَ عَلَيْهِم بِمُصَيْطِرٍ
verses.text: You are not a taskmaster set up over them,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَن تَوَلَّىٰ وَكَفَرَ
verses.text: but whoever turns away and disbelieves,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيُعَذِّبُهُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَكْبَرَ
verses.text: Allah will punish him with the greatest torment.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ إِلَيْنَآ إِيَابَهُمْ
verses.text: Surely towards Us they have to return,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا حِسَابَهُم
verses.text: then it is Our job to call them to account.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْفَجْرِ
verses.text: I swear by the dawn,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَيَالٍ عَشْرٍ
verses.text: and by Ten Nights,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشَّفْعِ وَٱلْوَتْرِ
verses.text: and by the even and the odd,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَسْرِ
verses.text: and by the night when it moves away,

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ فِى ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِى حِجْرٍ
verses.text: -Is there (not) in such an oath (enough assurance) for a man of sense?-

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
verses.text: Have you not seen how your Lord dealt with (the people) of ‘Ād

verses.arabicUthmani: إِرَمَ ذَاتِ ٱلْعِمَادِ
verses.text: of Iram , the men of tall pillars,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
verses.text: the like of whom were never created in the lands,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثَمُودَ ٱلَّذِينَ جَابُوا۟ ٱلصَّخْرَ بِٱلْوَادِ
verses.text: and (how He dealt) with (the people of) Thamūd who had carved out the rocks in the Valley (of Qurā),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِرْعَوْنَ ذِى ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
verses.text: and with Fir‘aun (Pharaoh), the man of the stakes,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ طَغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
verses.text: - those who had rebelled in the cities,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَكْثَرُوا۟ فِيهَا ٱلْفَسَادَ
verses.text: and spread a lot of mischief therein.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَصَبَّ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّكَ سَوْطَ عَذَابٍ
verses.text: So, your Lord let loose on them the whip of torment.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِٱلْمِرْصَادِ
verses.text: Surely your Lord is ever on the watch.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
verses.text: As for man, when his Lord tests him, and thus gives him honour and bounties, he says, “My Lord has honoured me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ
verses.text: But when he tests him, and thus straitens his provision for him, he says, “My Lord has disgraced me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا تُكْرِمُونَ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
verses.text: No! But you do not honour the orphan,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَحَـٰٓضُّونَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.text: and do not encourage one another to feed the needy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَأْكُلُونَ ٱلتُّرَاثَ أَكْلًا لَّمًّا
verses.text: And you devour the inheritance with a sweeping gulp,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتُحِبُّونَ ٱلْمَالَ حُبًّا جَمًّا
verses.text: and love wealth, an excessive love.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
verses.text: No! When the earth will be crushed thoroughly to be turned into bits,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَٱلْمَلَكُ صَفًّا صَفًّا
verses.text: and your Lord will come, and the angels as well, lined up in rows,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
verses.text: and Jahannam (Hell), on that day, will be brought forward, it will be the day when man will realize the truth, but from where will he take advantage of such realization?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى قَدَّمْتُ لِحَيَاتِى
verses.text: He will say, “O Would that I had sent ahead (some good deeds) for (this) my life!”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُعَذِّبُ عَذَابَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: So no one can punish like He will punish, that day,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: nor can anyone shackle like He will shackle.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيَّتُهَا ٱلنَّفْسُ ٱلْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ
verses.text: (As for an obedient man, it will be said to him,) “O content soul,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱرْجِعِىٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً
verses.text: come back to your Lord, well-pleased, well-pleasing.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱدْخُلِى فِى عِبَـٰدِى
verses.text: So, enter among My (special) servants,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱدْخُلِى جَنَّتِى
verses.text: and enter My Paradise.”

verses.arabicUthmani: لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
verses.text: I swear by this city,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنتَ حِلٌّۢ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
verses.text: -and (O Prophet,) you are going to be allowed (to fight) in this city-

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَالِدٍ وَمَا وَلَدَ
verses.text: and by the father and all those he begot,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِى كَبَدٍ
verses.text: indeed We have created man (to live) in hard struggle.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: Does he think that no one has power over him?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُ أَهْلَكْتُ مَالًا لُّبَدًا
verses.text: He says, “I have spent a lot of wealth.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّمْ يَرَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: Does he think that no one has seen him?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ عَيْنَيْنِ
verses.text: Did We not make for him two eyes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِسَانًا وَشَفَتَيْنِ
verses.text: and one tongue and two lips,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلنَّجْدَيْنِ
verses.text: and showed him the two ways?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا ٱقْتَحَمَ ٱلْعَقَبَةَ
verses.text: Yet he did not make his way through the steep course,- -

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْعَقَبَةُ
verses.text: - And what may let you know what the steep course is?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكُّ رَقَبَةٍ
verses.text: (It is) freeing of the neck of a slave,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ إِطْعَـٰمٌ فِى يَوْمٍ ذِى مَسْغَبَةٍ
verses.text: or giving food in a day of hunger

verses.arabicUthmani: يَتِيمًا ذَا مَقْرَبَةٍ
verses.text: to an orphan near of kin,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ مِسْكِينًا ذَا مَتْرَبَةٍ
verses.text: or to a needy person lying in dust- -

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ
verses.text: - then he did not join those who believe and advise each other to be patient and advise each other to be merciful.

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ
verses.text: Those are the People of the Right Hand. (i.e. their books of deeds will be given in their right hands)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
verses.text: As for those who reject Our verses, they are the People of the Left Hand. (i.e. their books of deeds will be given in their left hands.)

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَيْهِمْ نَارٌ مُّؤْصَدَةٌۢ
verses.text: Upon them will be the Fire, enveloping them with closed exits.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشَّمْسِ وَضُحَىٰهَا
verses.text: I swear by the sun and his broad light,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the moon when she follows him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا جَلَّىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the day when it shows his brightness,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the night when it envelops him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا بَنَىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the sky, and the One who built it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا طَحَىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the earth, and the One who spread it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَفْسٍ وَمَا سَوَّىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the soul, and the One who made it well,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَلْهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقْوَىٰهَا
verses.text: then inspired it with its (instincts of) evil and piety,

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن زَكَّىٰهَا
verses.text: success is really attained by him who purifies it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَدْ خَابَ مَن دَسَّىٰهَا
verses.text: and failure is really suffered by him who pollutes it.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِطَغْوَىٰهَآ
verses.text: (The People of) Thamūd denied the truth because of their transgression,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذِ ٱنۢبَعَثَ أَشْقَىٰهَا
verses.text: when rose up the one who was most wretched of them.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ نَاقَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَسُقْيَـٰهَا
verses.text: So, the Messenger of Allah said to them, “Be careful of Allah’s she-camel and her right to drink.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمْدَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّهُم بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسَوَّىٰهَا
verses.text: But they rejected him and killed her, so their Lord sent eradicating torment upon them because of their sin, and made it equal for all.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَخَافُ عُقْبَـٰهَا
verses.text: And He has no fear of its consequence.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ
verses.text: I swear by the night when it covers (the sun),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ
verses.text: and by the day when it unveils itself,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا خَلَقَ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.text: and by the One who created the male and the female,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ سَعْيَكُمْ لَشَتَّىٰ
verses.text: your efforts are diverse:

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أَعْطَىٰ وَٱتَّقَىٰ
verses.text: As for the one who gives (in charity) and fears Allah,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَدَّقَ بِٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
verses.text: and believes in the best (religion),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلْيُسْرَىٰ
verses.text: We will facilitate for him the way to extreme ease (i.e. the comforts of Paradise).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنۢ بَخِلَ وَٱسْتَغْنَىٰ
verses.text: But the one who is miser and deems himself self-sufficient,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَّبَ بِٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
verses.text: and rejects the best (religion),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلْعُسْرَىٰ
verses.text: We will facilitate for him the way to extreme distress.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
verses.text: And his wealth will not help him when he will fall down (into Hell).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا لَلْهُدَىٰ
verses.text: Of course, it is undertaken by Us to guide,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لَنَا لَلْـَٔاخِرَةَ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: and in Our control is the Hereafter and the worldly life.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنذَرْتُكُمْ نَارًا تَلَظَّىٰ
verses.text: So I have warned you of a blazing fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يَصْلَىٰهَآ إِلَّا ٱلْأَشْقَى
verses.text: None will enter it but the wretched one,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: who rejected (the truth) and turned away (from it).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَسَيُجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَتْقَى
verses.text: And saved from it will be the most God-fearing one,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى يُؤْتِى مَالَهُۥ يَتَزَكَّىٰ
verses.text: who gives his wealth (in charity) to become purified,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعْمَةٍ تُجْزَىٰٓ
verses.text: while no one has conferred any favour on him for which he would give a return,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ وَجْهِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: but (he gave his wealth in charity) only to seek the Countenance of his Lord, the Most High.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَسَوْفَ يَرْضَىٰ
verses.text: And surely he will soon be happy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلضُّحَىٰ
verses.text: I swear by the forenoon,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا سَجَىٰ
verses.text: and by the night when it becomes peaceful,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ
verses.text: your Lord (O Prophet,) has neither forsaken you, nor has become displeased.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: Surely the Hereafter is much better for you than the present life.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰٓ
verses.text: And of course, your Lord will give you so much that you will be pleased.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَجِدْكَ يَتِيمًا فَـَٔاوَىٰ
verses.text: Did He not find you an orphan, and give you shelter?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَجَدَكَ ضَآلًّا فَهَدَىٰ
verses.text: And He found you unaware of the way (the Sharī‘ah ), then He guided you.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلًا فَأَغْنَىٰ
verses.text: and He found you in need, then made you need-free.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا ٱلْيَتِيمَ فَلَا تَقْهَرْ
verses.text: Therefore, as for orphan, do not oppress him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا ٱلسَّآئِلَ فَلَا تَنْهَرْ
verses.text: and as for the beggar, do not scold him.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ فَحَدِّثْ
verses.text: And about the bounty of your Lord, do talk.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ
verses.text: Have We not caused your bosom to be wide open for you?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَضَعْنَا عَنكَ وِزْرَكَ
verses.text: And We removed from you your burden

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنقَضَ ظَهْرَكَ
verses.text: that had (almost) broken your back,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَرَفَعْنَا لَكَ ذِكْرَكَ
verses.text: and We raised high your name.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verses.text: So, undoubtedly, along with the hardship there is ease.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verses.text: Undoubtedly, along with the hardship there is ease.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا فَرَغْتَ فَٱنصَبْ
verses.text: So, when you are free (from collective services), toil hard (in worship),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَٱرْغَب
verses.text: and towards your Lord turn with eagerness.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلتِّينِ وَٱلزَّيْتُونِ
verses.text: I swear by the Fig and the Olive,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَطُورِ سِينِينَ
verses.text: and by Tūr, the mount of Sinai,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ ٱلْأَمِينِ
verses.text: and by this peaceful city,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ
verses.text: We have created man in the best composition,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ رَدَدْنَـٰهُ أَسْفَلَ سَـٰفِلِينَ
verses.text: then We turned him into the lowest of the low,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ
verses.text: except those who believed and did righteous deeds, because for them there is a reward never ending.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا يُكَذِّبُكَ بَعْدُ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: So, what can make you, after all this, to deny the Requital?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِأَحْكَمِ ٱلْحَـٰكِمِينَ
verses.text: Is Allah not the Greatest Ruler of all the rulers?

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ
verses.text: Read with the name of your Lord who created (every thing),

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ
verses.text: He created man from a clot of blood.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلْأَكْرَمُ
verses.text: Read, and your Lord is the most gracious,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَ بِٱلْقَلَمِ
verses.text: who imparted knowledge by means of the pen.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ
verses.text: He taught man what he did not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَيَطْغَىٰٓ
verses.text: In fact, man crosses the limits,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن رَّءَاهُ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰٓ
verses.text: because he deems himself to be free of need.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلرُّجْعَىٰٓ
verses.text: Surely to your Lord is the return.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يَنْهَىٰ
verses.text: Have you seen him who forbids

verses.arabicUthmani: عَبْدًا إِذَا صَلَّىٰٓ
verses.text: a servant of Allah when he prays?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَانَ عَلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
verses.text: Tell me, if he is on the right path,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ أَمَرَ بِٱلتَّقْوَىٰٓ
verses.text: or bids piety, (would the former still forbid him?)

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
verses.text: Tell me, if he rejects (the true faith) and turns away,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَعْلَم بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرَىٰ
verses.text: does he not know that Allah is watching (him)?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ
verses.text: No! If he does not desist, We will certainly drag (him) by forelock,

verses.arabicUthmani: نَاصِيَةٍ كَـٰذِبَةٍ خَاطِئَةٍ
verses.text: a lying, sinful forelock.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَدْعُ نَادِيَهُۥ
verses.text: So let him call the men of his council,

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنَدْعُ ٱلزَّبَانِيَةَ
verses.text: We will call the soldiers of the Hell.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَا تُطِعْهُ وَٱسْجُدْ وَٱقْتَرِب ۩
verses.text: No! Never obey him, and bow down in sajdah, and come close to Me.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ
verses.text: We have sent it (the Qur’ān) down in the Night of Qadr.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ
verses.text: And what may let you know what the Night of Qadr is?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
verses.text: The Night of Qadr is much better than one thousand months.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
verses.text: The angels and the Spirit descend in it, with the leave of your Lord, along with every command.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ هِىَ حَتَّىٰ مَطْلَعِ ٱلْفَجْرِ
verses.text: Peace it is till the debut of dawn.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
verses.text: Those who disbelieved from among the People of the Book and the polytheists were not (expected) to desist (from their wrong beliefs) unless there comes to them a clear proof,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
verses.text: a messenger from Allah who recites the purified scrolls

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا كُتُبٌ قَيِّمَةٌ
verses.text: containing (right and) straight writings.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
verses.text: And those who were given the Book did not disagree but after the clear proof came to them,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
verses.text: while they were not ordered but to worship Allah, making their submission exclusive for him with no deviation, and to establish Salāh and pay Zakāh. That is the way of the straight religion.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
verses.text: Surely those who disbelieved from among the People of the Book and the polytheists will be in the fire of Jahannam , in which they will be living forever. Those are the worst of all human beings.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
verses.text: As for those who believed and did righteous deeds, they are the best of all human beings.

verses.arabicUthmani: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
verses.text: Their reward, with their Lord, is gardens of eternity beneath which rivers flow, in which they will be abiding forever. Allah is well pleased with them, and they are well pleased with Him. That (reward) is for him who has awe of his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
verses.text: When the earth will be trembled with its quake,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَخْرَجَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ أَثْقَالَهَا
verses.text: and the earth will bring forth its burdens,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا لَهَا
verses.text: and man will say, “What has happened to it?”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا
verses.text: That day it will describe all its happenings,

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا
verses.text: because its Lord will have so commanded it.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
verses.text: That day the people will come back (from the place of reckoning) in different groups, so that they may be shown (the fruits of) their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
verses.text: So, whoever does any good act (even) to the weight of a particle will see it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
verses.text: And whoever does evil (even) to the weight of a particle will see it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْعَـٰدِيَـٰتِ ضَبْحًا
verses.text: (I swear) by those (horses) that run snorting,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُورِيَـٰتِ قَدْحًا
verses.text: then those that create sparks by striking (their hoofs) on the stones,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُغِيرَٰتِ صُبْحًا
verses.text: then those that invade at morning,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَثَرْنَ بِهِۦ نَقْعًا
verses.text: then raise, at the same time, a trail of dust,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَسَطْنَ بِهِۦ جَمْعًا
verses.text: then enter, at the same time, into the centre of the (opposing) host,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٌ
verses.text: man is, indeed, very ungrateful to his Lord,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكَ لَشَهِيدٌ
verses.text: and he himself is a witness to that fact,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لِحُبِّ ٱلْخَيْرِ لَشَدِيدٌ
verses.text: and in his love for wealth, he is very intense.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ
verses.text: Does he not then know (what will happen) when all that is contained in the graves will be overturned,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُصِّلَ مَا فِى ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: and all that is contained in the hearts will be exposed.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّهُم بِهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّخَبِيرٌۢ
verses.text: Surely your Lord, that day, is fully aware of them.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
verses.text: The Striking Event!

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
verses.text: What is the Striking Event?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
verses.text: And what may let you know what the Striking Event is?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَكُونُ ٱلنَّاسُ كَٱلْفَرَاشِ ٱلْمَبْثُوثِ
verses.text: (It will happen) on a day when people will be like scattered moths,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ ٱلْمَنفُوشِ
verses.text: and the mountains will be like carded wool.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
verses.text: Then, as for him whose scales (of good deeds) are heavy,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
verses.text: he will be in a happy life.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
verses.text: But he whose scales are light,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأُمُّهُۥ هَاوِيَةٌ
verses.text: -his abode will be Abyss.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا هِيَهْ
verses.text: And what may let you know what that (Abyss) is?

verses.arabicUthmani: نَارٌ حَامِيَةٌۢ
verses.text: A blazing Fire!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلْهَىٰكُمُ ٱلتَّكَاثُرُ
verses.text: You are distracted by mutual competition in amassing (worldly benefits),

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰ زُرْتُمُ ٱلْمَقَابِرَ
verses.text: until you reach the graves.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: No! (This is not a correct attitude.) You will soon know (the reality).

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Again, you will soon know.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: No! Only if you knew (it) with a sure knowledge!

verses.arabicUthmani: لَتَرَوُنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ
verses.text: You will certainly see the Hell,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَتَرَوُنَّهَا عَيْنَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: then you will see it with full certitude.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: Then you will be asked about all the pleasures (you enjoyed in the world).

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْعَصْرِ
verses.text: (I swear) by the Time,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَفِى خُسْرٍ
verses.text: man is in a state of loss indeed,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
verses.text: except those who believed and did righteous deeds, and exhorted each other to follow truth, and exhorted each other to observe patience.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍ لُّمَزَةٍ
verses.text: Woe to every backbiter, derider

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى جَمَعَ مَالًا وَعَدَّدَهُۥ
verses.text: who accumulates wealth and counts it.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَحْسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُۥٓ أَخْلَدَهُۥ
verses.text: He thinks that his wealth has made him eternal.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ لَيُنۢبَذَنَّ فِى ٱلْحُطَمَةِ
verses.text: Never! He will certainly be thrown into the Crushing Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحُطَمَةُ
verses.text: And what may let you know what the Crushing Fire is?

verses.arabicUthmani: نَارُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُوقَدَةُ
verses.text: It is Allah’s kindled fire

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّتِى تَطَّلِعُ عَلَى ٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةِ
verses.text: that will peep into the hearts.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا عَلَيْهِم مُّؤْصَدَةٌ
verses.text: It will be closed on them,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى عَمَدٍ مُّمَدَّدَةٍۭ
verses.text: in outstretched columns.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
verses.text: Have you not seen how your Lord dealt with the People of the Elephant?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِى تَضْلِيلٍ
verses.text: Has He not turned their plan into nullity?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَرْسَلَ عَلَيْهِمْ طَيْرًا أَبَابِيلَ
verses.text: And He sent upon them flying birds in flocks,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَرْمِيهِم بِحِجَارَةٍ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
verses.text: throwing upon them stones of baked clay,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلَهُمْ كَعَصْفٍ مَّأْكُولٍۭ
verses.text: and thus He turned them into an eaten-up chaff.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِإِيلَـٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ
verses.text: Because of the familiarity of the Quraish,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِۦلَـٰفِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ ٱلشِّتَآءِ وَٱلصَّيْفِ
verses.text: that is, their familiarity with the trips of winter and summer,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّ هَـٰذَا ٱلْبَيْتِ
verses.text: they must worship the Lord of this House,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
verses.text: who gave them food against hunger, and gave them security against fear.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يُكَذِّبُ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Have you seen him who denies the Requital?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَٰلِكَ ٱلَّذِى يَدُعُّ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
verses.text: So, he is the one who pushes away the orphan,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.text: and does not persuade (others) to feed the needy.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.text: So, Woe to those performers of Salāh,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ
verses.text: who are neglectful of their Salāh,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ يُرَآءُونَ
verses.text: who (do good only to) show off,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَمْنَعُونَ ٱلْمَاعُونَ
verses.text: and refuse (to give even) small gifts.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَعْطَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْكَوْثَرَ
verses.text: (O Prophet,) surely We have given to you Al-Kauthar.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ
verses.text: So, offer Salāh (prayer) to your Lord, and sacrifice.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ ٱلْأَبْتَرُ
verses.text: Surely it is your enemy whose traces are cut off.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
verses.text: Say, “O disbelievers,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَآ أَعْبُدُ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: I do not worship that which you worship,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
verses.text: nor do you worship the One whom I worship.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَآ أَنَا۠ عَابِدٌ مَّا عَبَدتُّمْ
verses.text: And neither I am going to worship that which you have worshipped,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
verses.text: nor will you worship the One whom I worship.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِىَ دِينِ
verses.text: For you is your faith, and for me, my faith.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ
verses.text: (O Prophet,) When there comes Allah’s help and the Victory,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
verses.text: and you see people entering Allah’s (approved) religion in multitudes,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
verses.text: then pronounce the purity and praise of your Lord, and seek forgiveness from Him. Surely He is Ever-Relenting.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ
verses.text: Perish the two hands of Abū Lahab, and perish he!

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
verses.text: Neither his wealth benefited him, nor what he earned.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍ
verses.text: He will soon enter a Fire, full of flames,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ حَمَّالَةَ ٱلْحَطَبِ
verses.text: and his wife as well,-the wicked carrier of firewood.

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جِيدِهَا حَبْلٌ مِّن مَّسَدٍۭ
verses.text: Around her neck, there is (a collar of iron, like) a well-twisted rope.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: Say, “The truth is that Allah is One.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ ٱلصَّمَدُ
verses.text: Allah is Besought of all, needing none.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
verses.text: He neither begot anyone, nor was he begotten.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌۢ
verses.text: And equal to Him has never been any one.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ
verses.text: Say, “I seek refuge with the Lord of the daybreak

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
verses.text: from the evil of everything He has created,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ
verses.text: and from the evil of the dark night when it penetrates,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن شَرِّ ٱلنَّفَّـٰثَـٰتِ فِى ٱلْعُقَدِ
verses.text: and from the evil of the women who blow on the knots,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
verses.text: and from the evil of an envier when he envies.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: Say, “I seek refuge with the Lord of mankind,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَلِكِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: the King of mankind,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَـٰهِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: the God of mankind,

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ
verses.text: from the evil of the whisperer who withdraws (when Allah’s name is pronounced),

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى يُوَسْوِسُ فِى صُدُورِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: the one who whispers in the hearts of people,

verses.arabicUthmani: مِنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: whether from among the Jinn or Mankind.
